query_text:
WITH excluded_users AS (
    SELECT user_id FROM analytics.stg.stg_mongo__users WHERE is_internal_user = TRUE
),
step_1_events AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        user_id as user_id,
        timestamp as event_time, platform
    FROM analytics.stg.stg_segment__user_signed_up
    WHERE timestamp::DATE BETWEEN '2025-11-27' AND (LEAST('2025-12-03'::DATE, DATEADD(day, -7, CURRENT_DATE())))
      AND is_mobile_web = FALSE
      AND is_mobile_app = FALSE
      AND (platform = 'riverside' OR platform = '' OR platform IS NULL)
      AND user_id NOT IN (SELECT user_id FROM excluded_users)
),
step_2_events AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        user_id as user_id,
        timestamp as event_time
    FROM analytics.stg.stg_segment__account_trial_started
    WHERE timestamp::DATE >= '2025-11-27'
      AND user_id NOT IN (SELECT user_id FROM excluded_users)
)
SELECT
    COUNT(DISTINCT step1.user_id) as step_1_users,
    COUNT(DISTINCT step2.user_id) as step_2_users,
    ROUND(
        COUNT(DISTINCT step2.user_id)::FLOAT / 
        NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT step1.user_id), 0) * 100, 
        2
    ) as conversion_rate, step1.platform as platform
FROM step_1_events step1
LEFT JOIN step_2_events step2 
    ON step1.user_id = step2.user_id
    AND step2.event_time >= step1.event_time
    AND step2.event_time <= DATEADD(day, 7, step1.event_time)
GROUP BY step1.platform
ORDER BY conversion_rate DESC
business_question: What is the signup-to-trial conversion rate by platform for recent signups (excluding internal users)?

query_text:
WITH excluded_users AS (
    SELECT user_id FROM analytics.stg.stg_mongo__users WHERE is_internal_user = TRUE
),
step_1_events AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        user_id,
        timestamp as event_time
    FROM analytics.stg.stg_segment__user_signed_up
    WHERE timestamp::DATE BETWEEN '2025-11-27' AND (LEAST('2025-12-03'::DATE, DATEADD(day, -1, CURRENT_DATE()))) AND is_mobile_web = FALSE AND is_mobile_app = FALSE AND (platform = 'riverside' OR platform = '' OR platform IS NULL) AND user_id NOT IN (SELECT user_id FROM excluded_users)
),
step_2_events AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        user_id,
        timestamp as event_time
    FROM analytics.stg.stg_segment__account_onboarding_flow_trial_offer_viewed
    WHERE timestamp::DATE >= '2025-11-27'
),
step_3_events AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        user_id,
        timestamp as event_time
    FROM analytics.stg.stg_segment__account_pricing_page_cta_clicked
    WHERE timestamp::DATE >= '2025-11-27' AND pricing_page_link_source = 'onboarding' AND cta_location = 'onboarding_plans_screen'
),
step_4_events AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        user_id,
        timestamp as event_time
    FROM analytics.stg.stg_segment__account_trial_started
    WHERE timestamp::DATE >= '2025-11-27'
)
SELECT
    COUNT(DISTINCT s1.user_id) as step_1_users,
    COUNT(DISTINCT s2.user_id) as step_2_users,
    COUNT(DISTINCT s3.user_id) as step_3_users,
    COUNT(DISTINCT s4.user_id) as step_4_users,
    ROUND(
        COUNT(DISTINCT s2.user_id)::FLOAT / 
        NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT s1.user_id), 0) * 100, 
        2
    ) as step_2_conversion_rate,
    ROUND(
        COUNT(DISTINCT s3.user_id)::FLOAT / 
        NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT s1.user_id), 0) * 100, 
        2
    ) as step_3_conversion_rate,
    ROUND(
        COUNT(DISTINCT s4.user_id)::FLOAT / 
        NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT s1.user_id), 0) * 100, 
        2
    ) as step_4_conversion_rate
FROM step_1_events s1
LEFT JOIN step_2_events s2
    ON s1.user_id = s2.user_id
    AND s2.event_time >= s1.event_time
    AND s2.event_time <= DATEADD(day, 1, s1.event_time)
LEFT JOIN step_3_events s3
    ON s1.user_id = s3.user_id
    AND s3.event_time >= s2.event_time
    AND s3.event_time <= DATEADD(day, 1, s1.event_time)
LEFT JOIN step_4_events s4
    ON s1.user_id = s4.user_id
    AND s4.event_time >= s3.event_time
    AND s4.event_time <= DATEADD(day, 1, s1.event_time)

query_text:
WITH first_assignment AS (
  SELECT
    user_id,
    MIN_BY(variation, TIMESTAMP) AS variation,
    MIN_BY(device_type, TIMESTAMP) AS device_type,
    MIN(TIMESTAMP) AS first_assignment
  FROM analytics.stg.stg_segment__experiment_assignment
  WHERE experiment = 'magicEpisodeEditingAdoptionExperiment'
    AND TIMESTAMP >= '2026-01-20 15:30:00.000'
  GROUP BY ALL
),
experiment_users AS (
  SELECT
    ea.user_id,
    ea.variation,
    ea.device_type,
    ea.first_assignment
  FROM first_assignment ea
  LEFT JOIN analytics.stg.stg_segment__user_signed_up u ON ea.user_id = u.user_id
  WHERE ea.user_id NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT user_id
    FROM analytics.fs.users
    WHERE IS_INTERNAL_USER = TRUE
      OR email LIKE 'S%@5iosbw0g.mailosaur.net'
      OR email LIKE 'riverside%@gmail.com'
      OR email LIKE '%@m1.rsfmbox.com'
      OR CREATED_AT < '2026-01-20 15:30:00.000'
  )
  AND (u.platform <> 'spotify' OR u.platform IS NULL)
)
,
-- First export per user
user_first_export AS (
  SELECT
    eu.user_id,
    eu.variation,
    MIN(ex.TIMESTAMP) AS first_export_ts
  FROM experiment_users eu
  JOIN analytics.stg.stg_segment__clip_file_export_completed ex
    ON eu.user_id = ex.user_id
    AND ex.TIMESTAMP >= eu.first_assignment
  GROUP BY eu.user_id, eu.variation
),
-- Check for repeat exports within D7/D14/D30
export_retention AS (
  SELECT
    ufe.user_id,
    ufe.variation,
    ufe.first_export_ts,
    -- D7 retention: only include if user has had 7+ days since first export
    CASE WHEN DATEDIFF('day', ufe.first_export_ts, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()) >= 7 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS eligible_d7,
    CASE WHEN DATEDIFF('day', ufe.first_export_ts, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()) >= 14 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS eligible_d14,
    CASE WHEN DATEDIFF('day', ufe.first_export_ts, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()) >= 30 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS eligible_d30,
    -- Did they export again?
    MAX(CASE WHEN ex2.TIMESTAMP > ufe.first_export_ts 
              AND DATEDIFF('day', ufe.first_export_ts, ex2.TIMESTAMP) BETWEEN 1 AND 7 
         THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS exported_d7,
    MAX(CASE WHEN ex2.TIMESTAMP > ufe.first_export_ts 
              AND DATEDIFF('day', ufe.first_export_ts, ex2.TIMESTAMP) BETWEEN 1 AND 14 
         THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS exported_d14,
    MAX(CASE WHEN ex2.TIMESTAMP > ufe.first_export_ts 
              AND DATEDIFF('day', ufe.first_export_ts, ex2.TIMESTAMP) BETWEEN 1 AND 30 
         THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS exported_d30
  FROM user_first_export ufe
  LEFT JOIN analytics.stg.stg_segment__clip_file_export_completed ex2
    ON ufe.user_id = ex2.user_id
    AND ex2.TIMESTAMP > ufe.first_export_ts
  GROUP BY ufe.user_id, ufe.variation, ufe.first_export_ts
)
SELECT
  variation,
  -- D7
  SUM(CASE WHEN eligible_d7 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS d7_eligible,
  SUM(CASE WHEN eligible_d7 AND exported_d7 = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS d7_retained,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN eligible_d7 AND exported_d7 = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) 
    / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN eligible_d7 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0), 2) AS d7_retention_pct,
  -- D14
  SUM(CASE WHEN eligible_d14 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS d14_eligible,
  SUM(CASE WHEN eligible_d14 AND exported_d14 = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS d14_retained,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN eligible_d14 AND exported_d14 = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) 
    / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN eligible_d14 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0), 2) AS d14_retention_pct,
  -- D30
  SUM(CASE WHEN eligible_d30 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS d30_eligible,
  SUM(CASE WHEN eligible_d30 AND exported_d30 = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS d30_retained,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN eligible_d30 AND exported_d30 = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) 
    / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN eligible_d30 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0), 2) AS d30_retention_pct
FROM export_retention
GROUP BY variation
ORDER BY variation
business_question: In the Magic Episode Editing Adoption experiment, what is the 7-, 14-, and 30-day retention of first exports by variation?

query_text:
WITH 

base AS (
  SELECT
    customer_group_id,
    period,
    COUNT(DISTINCT product_type) AS product_types
  FROM analytics.bi.monthly_customer_mrr
  WHERE customer_group_status != 'Churn'
  GROUP BY 1, 2
),

wdw AS (
  SELECT
    customer_group_id,
    period,
    product_types > 1 AS has_multiple_products_in_period,
    CONDITIONAL_CHANGE_EVENT(has_multiple_products_in_period)
      OVER (PARTITION BY customer_group_id ORDER BY period) AS part,
    CONDITIONAL_TRUE_EVENT(has_multiple_products_in_period)
      OVER (PARTITION BY customer_group_id ORDER BY period) AS periods_in_a_row
  FROM base
)
,
runs AS (
  SELECT
        customer_group_id,
        MAX(periods_in_a_row) AS max_number_mixed_periods_in_a_row
    FROM wdw
    WHERE has_multiple_products_in_period
    GROUP BY 1
)
,

classification AS (
    
    SELECT
        customer_group_id,
        BOOLOR_AGG(product_type = 'Business') AS has_been_business,
        BOOLOR_AGG(product_type = 'Self-Service') AS has_been_self_service,
        BOOLAND_AGG(product_type = 'Business') AS has_been_only_business,
        BOOLAND_AGG(product_type = 'Self-Service') AS has_been_only_self_service,
        MIN(CASE WHEN product_type = 'Business' THEN period END) AS first_business_period,
        MIN(CASE WHEN product_type = 'Self-Service' THEN period END) AS first_self_service_period,
        MAX(CASE WHEN product_type = 'Business' THEN period END) AS last_business_period,
        MAX(CASE WHEN product_type = 'Self-Service' THEN period END) AS last_self_service_period,    
        MAX(runs.max_number_mixed_periods_in_a_row >= 6) AS has_six_or_more_mixed_periods_in_a_row
    FROM analytics.bi.monthly_customer_mrr m
    LEFT JOIN runs USING(customer_group_id) 
    WHERE customer_group_status != 'Churn'
    GROUP BY 1
    HAVING has_been_business IS NOT NULL
), c AS(

SELECT
    customer_group_id,
    CASE
        WHEN has_been_only_self_service THEN 'ss_only'
        WHEN has_been_only_business THEN 'business_only'
        WHEN has_been_business AND has_been_self_service AND has_six_or_more_mixed_periods_in_a_row THEN 'business_and_self_service'
        WHEN has_been_business AND has_been_self_service  AND first_business_period > first_self_service_period AND last_business_period < last_self_service_period THEN 'ss_to_business_to_ss'
        WHEN has_been_business AND has_been_self_service AND first_business_period > first_self_service_period THEN 'ss_to_business'
        WHEN has_been_business AND has_been_self_service AND first_self_service_period > first_business_period THEN 'business_to_ss'
        WHEN has_been_business AND has_been_self_service AND first_business_period = first_self_service_period THEN 'business_only'
    END AS category,
    * EXCLUDE (customer_group_id)
FROM classification
)
-- select * from c where category is null;

SELECT customer_group_id, category
FROM c
ORDER BY 2 DESC
;
business_question: What are the lifecycle categories of customer groups based on their historical mix and transitions between Business and Self-Service products over time?

query_text:
with 

clips_features as (
select 
    clip_id
    , count(distinct feature_name) as features_per_clip
from ANALYTICS.TRF.EDITOR_FEATURE_ADOPTION
group by 1)

, users as (
select 
    case when account_type = 'Self-Service' then 'Pro' else account_type end as account_type
    -- magic_type as account_type
    , user_id
    , count_if(was_coco_request_sent) clips_With_coco
    , count(1) clips_opened_in_editor
    , count_if(was_coco_request_sent=False) clips_without_coco
    , count_if(was_coco_request_sent and was_exported)  clips_with_coco_and_exported
    , count_if(was_coco_request_sent= False and was_exported)  clips_without_coco_and_exported
    , median(case when was_coco_request_sent = true  then datediff(minute, first_open_in_editor_at, first_clip_exported_at) end) coco_avg_minutes_editor_opened_to_exported
    , median(case when was_coco_request_sent = false then datediff(minute, first_open_in_editor_at, first_clip_exported_at) end) no_coco_avg_minutes_editor_opened_to_exported
    , count_if(was_coco_request_sent = true and was_downloaded) as clips_with_coco_and_Downloaded
    , count_if(was_coco_request_sent = false and was_downloaded) as clips_without_coco_and_Downloaded
    , count_if(was_coco_request_sent = true and was_share_button_clicked) as clips_with_coco_and_shared
    , count_if(was_coco_request_sent = false and was_share_button_clicked) as clips_without_coco_and_shared
    , count_if(was_coco_request_sent = true and (was_downloaded or was_share_button_clicked)) as clips_with_coco_and_shared_or_downloaded
    , count_if(was_coco_request_sent = false and (was_downloaded or was_share_button_clicked)) as clips_without_coco_and_shared_or_downloaded
    , avg(case when was_coco_request_sent = true then num_features end) as avg_features_coco
    , avg(case when was_coco_request_sent = false then num_features end) as avg_features_without_coco

from analytics.ba.clips_opened_on_editor_for_coco_analysis
-- where account_type in ('Self-Service', 'Business')
group by 1,2
)

select 
    COALESCE(account_type, 'Total') as account_type
    , count(1) "Users opened editor"
    , count_if(clips_With_coco > 0) "Users with 1+ co-creator request"
    , "Users with 1+ co-creator request" / "Users opened editor" as "% users used co-creator"
    , sum(clips_opened_in_editor) "Clips opened in editor"
    , sum(clips_With_coco) "Clips w/ co-creator requests"
    , "Clips w/ co-creator requests" / "Clips opened in editor" as "% Clips w/ co-creator of clips opened in editor"
    , sum(clips_with_coco_and_exported) / sum(clips_With_coco) "% exported w/ co-creator"
    , sum(clips_without_coco_and_exported) / sum(clips_without_coco) "% exported w/o co-creator"
    , "% exported w/ co-creator" / "% exported w/o co-creator"  - 1 as "co-creator % export lift"
    , median(coco_avg_minutes_editor_opened_to_exported) "median time to export with coco"
    , median(no_coco_avg_minutes_editor_opened_to_exported) "median time to export without coco"
    --download
    , sum(clips_with_coco_and_Downloaded) / sum(clips_with_coco_and_exported) "% downloaded w/ co-creator"
    , sum(clips_without_coco_and_Downloaded) / sum(clips_without_coco_and_exported) "% downloaded w/o co-creator"
    , "% downloaded w/ co-creator" / "% downloaded w/o co-creator"  - 1 as "co-creator % download lift"

    , avg(avg_features_coco) "# features per clip - w/ coco"	
    , avg(avg_features_without_coco) "# features per clip - w/o coco"
    
    -- share
    , sum(clips_with_coco_and_shared) / sum(clips_with_coco_and_exported) "% share w/ co-creator"
    , sum(clips_without_coco_and_shared) / sum(clips_without_coco_and_exported) "% share w/o co-creator"
    -- , "% share w/ co-creator" / "% share w/o co-creator"  - 1 as "co-creator % share lift"
    -- download or share
    , sum(clips_with_coco_and_shared_or_downloaded) / sum(clips_with_coco_and_exported) "% downloaded or share w/ co-creator"
    , sum(clips_without_coco_and_shared_or_downloaded) / sum(clips_without_coco_and_exported) "% downloaded or share w/o co-creator"
    , "% downloaded or share w/ co-creator" / "% downloaded or share w/o co-creator"  - 1 as "co-creator % downloaded or share lift"
    

from users
GROUP BY GROUPING SETS (
    (account_type),   -- normal grouped rows
    ()            -- empty grouping = TOTAL row
)
order by 
    case 
        when account_type = 'Free' then 'a'
        when account_type= 'Trial' then 'b'
        when account_type = 'Pro' then 'c'
        when account_type = 'Business'then 'd'
        when account_type = 'Total' then 'e'
    end

    -- case
    --     when account_type = 'magic episode' then 'a'
    --     when account_type = 'magic clip' then 'b'
    --     when account_type = 'magic hook' then 'c'
    --     when account_type = 'magic segment' then 'd'
    --     when account_type = 'non magic' then 'e'
    --     when account_type = 'Total' then 'f'
    -- end
        
;
business_question: How does using the co-creator feature affect editor activity and clip outcomes across account types (openings, exports, downloads, shares, and timing to export)?

query_text:
with 
users as (
select 
    user_id
    
    , min(account_created_at) as account_created_at
    , min(first_open_in_editor_at) as first_open_in_editor_at
    , min(first_coco_request_timestamp) as first_coco_request_timestamp
    , min(trial_started_at) as trial_started_at
    , datediff('minute', min(account_created_at), min(first_open_in_editor_at)) as days_account_created_to_trial
from analytics.ba.clips_opened_on_editor_for_coco_analysis

group by 1
having min(account_created_at) > '2025-09-20 00:00:00.000'
)

select
    trial_started_at is not null as trial_started
    , case when trial_started_at < first_open_in_editor_at then true else false end as trial_started_before_editor_opened
    , case 
        when first_coco_request_timestamp < first_open_in_editor_at + interval '10 minute' then 'coco within 10 min from editor'
        when first_coco_request_timestamp < first_open_in_editor_at + interval '1 hour' then 'coco within 1 hour from editor'
        when first_coco_request_timestamp is not null then 'over 1 hour'
        else 'no co-creator usage'
    end as coco_timing
    , count(1) users
    , count_if(trial_started_at is not null) trials
    , trials / users as perc_trial
        
from users
where trial_started_before_editor_opened = False

group by 1,2,3
order by 1,2,3
business_question: What is the distribution of COCO usage timing and whether a trial started among users who did not start a trial before opening the editor?

query_text:
with a AS(
SELECT
    months_since_becoming_business AS months_since_business_upgrade,
    CASE 
    WHEN latest_mrr BETWEEN 0 AND 499.9999 THEN '[ 0-500 )'
    WHEN latest_mrr BETWEEN 500 AND 999.9999 THEN '[ 500-1000 )'
    WHEN latest_mrr BETWEEN 1000 AND 1499.9999 THEN '[ 1000-1500 )'
    WHEN latest_mrr BETWEEN 1500 AND 1999.9999 THEN '[ 1500-2000 )'
    WHEN latest_mrr BETWEEN 2000 AND 2499.9999 THEN '[ 2000-2500 )'
    WHEN latest_mrr BETWEEN 2500 AND 2999.9999 THEN '[ 2500-3000 )'
    WHEN latest_mrr BETWEEN 3000 AND 3499.9999 THEN '[ 3000-2500 )'
    WHEN latest_mrr BETWEEN 3500 AND 3999.9999 THEN '[ 3500-4000 )'
    WHEN latest_mrr BETWEEN 4000 AND 4499.9999 THEN '[ 4000-4500 )'
    WHEN latest_mrr BETWEEN 4500 AND 4999.9999 THEN '[ 4500-5000 )'
    WHEN latest_mrr >= 5000 THEN  '[ 5000 + ]'
    END AS MRR_BUCKET,
    -- DIV0(SUM(self_service_mrr) , SUM(initial_self_service_mrr)),
    DIV0(SUM(business_mrr) , SUM(initial_business_mrr)) AS business_nrr,
    -- DIV0(SUM(CASE WHEN latest_mrr > 500 THEN business_mrr END) ,SUM(CASE WHEN latest_mrr > 500 THEN initial_business_mrr END)) AS business_nrr_greater_500,

    -- DIV0(SUM(company_mrr) , SUM(initial_company_mrr)),
    
FROM analytics.bi.acq_period_monthly_grr_nrr_new
WHERE months_since_business_upgrade IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 1,2
)

SELECT
    *
FROM a
PIVOT(MAX( business_nrr) FOR MRR_BUCKET IN (ANY ORDER BY MRR_BUCKET))
WHERE months_since_business_upgrade <= 36
ORDER BY 1,2,3
business_question: How does business net revenue retention vary across MRR buckets for customers within 36 months of upgrading their business?

query_text:
WITH monthly AS (
    SELECT
        DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', submitted_at) AS month,
        CASE
            WHEN form_type IN ('Legacy Form', 'Redesigned Form', 'Chatbot Demo Booking', 'Web DE') THEN 'website'
            WHEN form_type IN ('In Product Form', 'Product Dev', 'Web App Dev DE') THEN 'product'
            ELSE 'unknown'
        END AS form_type_grouped,
        COUNT(DISTINCT mql_id) AS mql_count,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN intro_meeting_booked = 'Booked' THEN mql_id END) AS meeting_booked_mqls
    FROM ANALYTICS.FS.MQLS
    WHERE submitted_at >= DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', DATEADD('MONTH', -5, CURRENT_DATE()))
    GROUP BY 1, 2
),
monthly_sqls AS (
    SELECT
        DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', sfa.mql_created_date) AS month,
        CASE
            WHEN m.form_type IN ('Legacy Form', 'Redesigned Form', 'Chatbot Demo Booking', 'Web DE') THEN 'website'
            WHEN m.form_type IN ('In Product Form', 'Product Dev', 'Web App Dev DE') THEN 'product'
            ELSE 'unknown'
        END AS form_type_grouped,
        COUNT(DISTINCT sfa.mql_id) AS mqls_converted_to_sql
    FROM ANALYTICS.BI.SALES_FUNNEL_ANALYSIS sfa
    LEFT JOIN ANALYTICS.FS.MQLS m
      ON sfa.mql_id = m.mql_id
    WHERE sfa.mql_created_date >= DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', DATEADD('MONTH', -5, CURRENT_DATE()))
      AND sfa.last_touch_source = 'Inbound'
      AND sfa.mql_id IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY 1, 2
)
SELECT
    monthly.month,
    monthly.form_type_grouped,
    monthly.mql_count,
    monthly.meeting_booked_mqls,
    ROUND(DIV0NULL(monthly.meeting_booked_mqls * 100.0, monthly.mql_count), 2) AS mql_to_meeting_booked_cvr_pct,
    COALESCE(monthly_sqls.mqls_converted_to_sql, 0) AS mqls_converted_to_sql,
    ROUND(DIV0NULL(COALESCE(monthly_sqls.mqls_converted_to_sql, 0) * 100.0, monthly.mql_count), 2) AS mql_to_sql_cvr_pct
FROM monthly
LEFT JOIN monthly_sqls
  ON monthly.month = monthly_sqls.month
 AND monthly.form_type_grouped = monthly_sqls.form_type_grouped
ORDER BY monthly.month, monthly.mql_count DESC;
business_question: What are the monthly MQL counts, booked meetings, and conversion rates from MQL to SQL by form type (website vs product) over the last five months?

query_text:
WITH current_period AS (
    -- Current period funnel
    SELECT
        'current' as period,
        COUNT(DISTINCT step1.user_id) as step_1_users,
        COUNT(DISTINCT step2.user_id) as step_2_users,
        ROUND(
            COUNT(DISTINCT step2.user_id)::FLOAT / 
            NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT step1.user_id), 0) * 100, 
            2
        ) as conversion_rate
    FROM (
        SELECT DISTINCT
            user_id as user_id,
            timestamp as event_time
        FROM analytics.stg.stg_segment__user_signed_up
        WHERE timestamp::DATE BETWEEN '2025-10-01' AND (LEAST('2025-10-31'::DATE, DATEADD(day, -30, CURRENT_DATE())))
    ) step1
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT DISTINCT
            user_id as user_id,
            timestamp as event_time
        FROM analytics.stg.stg_segment__account_trial_started
        WHERE timestamp::DATE >= '2025-10-01'
    ) step2 
        ON step1.user_id = step2.user_id
        AND step2.event_time >= step1.event_time
        AND step2.event_time <= DATEADD(day, 30, step1.event_time)
    
),
comparison_period AS (
    -- Comparison period funnel
    SELECT
        'comparison' as period,
        COUNT(DISTINCT step1.user_id) as step_1_users,
        COUNT(DISTINCT step2.user_id) as step_2_users,
        ROUND(
            COUNT(DISTINCT step2.user_id)::FLOAT / 
            NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT step1.user_id), 0) * 100, 
            2
        ) as conversion_rate
    FROM (
        SELECT DISTINCT
            user_id as user_id,
            timestamp as event_time
        FROM analytics.stg.stg_segment__user_signed_up
        WHERE timestamp::DATE BETWEEN '2025-09-01' AND (LEAST('2025-09-30'::DATE, DATEADD(day, -30, CURRENT_DATE())))
    ) step1
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT DISTINCT
            user_id as user_id,
            timestamp as event_time
        FROM analytics.stg.stg_segment__account_trial_started
        WHERE timestamp::DATE >= '2025-09-01'
    ) step2 
        ON step1.user_id = step2.user_id
        AND step2.event_time >= step1.event_time
        AND step2.event_time <= DATEADD(day, 30, step1.event_time)
    
)
SELECT
    cp.period,
    cp.step_1_users as current_step_1_users,
    cp.step_2_users as current_step_2_users,
    cp.conversion_rate as current_conversion_rate,
    comp.step_1_users as comparison_step_1_users,
    comp.step_2_users as comparison_step_2_users,
    comp.conversion_rate as comparison_conversion_rate,
    ROUND(cp.conversion_rate - comp.conversion_rate, 2) as conversion_rate_change,
    ROUND(
        ((cp.conversion_rate - comp.conversion_rate) / NULLIF(comp.conversion_rate, 0)) * 100,
        2
    ) as conversion_rate_change_pct
FROM current_period cp
CROSS JOIN comparison_period comp
business_question: What is the signup-to-trial conversion rate for the current period versus the prior period, and how has the conversion rate changed between them?

query_text:
WITH visits AS (
  SELECT column1 AS clips_opened_after_first_coco
  FROM (VALUES (2),(3),(4),(5),(6),(7),(8),(9))
),

users_first AS (
  SELECT
      user_id,
      MIN(first_coco_request_timestamp) AS first_coco_request_timestamp,
      DATE(DATE_TRUNC('month', MIN(first_coco_request_timestamp))) AS month
  FROM analytics.ba.clips_opened_on_editor_for_coco_analysis
  WHERE account_type IN ('Business', 'Self-Service')
  GROUP BY 1
),

clips2 AS (
  SELECT
      a.user_id,
      b.month,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY a.user_id ORDER BY a.first_open_in_editor_at) AS clip_num,
      a.was_coco_request_sent
  FROM analytics.ba.clips_opened_on_editor_for_coco_analysis a
  JOIN users_first b
    ON a.user_id = b.user_id
   AND (
        a.was_coco_request_sent
        OR a.first_open_in_editor_at >= b.first_coco_request_timestamp
       )
)

SELECT
    c.month,
    v.clips_opened_after_first_coco,
    COUNT_IF(c.clip_num = v.clips_opened_after_first_coco) AS clips_opened,
    COUNT_IF(c.clip_num = v.clips_opened_after_first_coco AND c.was_coco_request_sent) AS clips_coco,
    clips_coco / NULLIF(clips_opened, 0) AS perc_coco
FROM clips2 c
JOIN visits v
GROUP BY 1,2
ORDER BY 1,2;
business_question: What percentage of clips opened after a user's first COCO interaction are followed by sending a COCO request, by month?

query_text:
select

    , count_if(was_coco_request_sent and was_exported)  clips_with_coco_and_exported

    , median(case when was_coco_request_sent = false then datediff(minute, first_open_in_editor_at, first_clip_exported_at) end) no_coco_avg_minutes_editor_opened_to_exported
    , count_if(was_coco_request_sent = true and was_downloaded) as clips_with_coco_and_Downloaded
    , count_if(was_coco_request_sent = false and was_downloaded) as clips_without_coco_and_Downloaded

query_text:
with 

minutes_cte as (
select column1 as minutes
from (values (5), (10), (60), (180), (1440))
)

,users as (
select 
    user_id
    , min(account_created_at) as account_created_at
    , min(first_open_in_editor_at) as first_open_in_editor_at
    , min(first_coco_request_timestamp) as first_coco_request_timestamp
    , min(trial_started_at) as trial_started_at
    , min(latest_subscription_created_at) as latest_subscription_created_at
    , datediff('minute', min(account_created_at), min(first_open_in_editor_at)) as days_account_created_to_trial

from analytics.ba.clips_opened_on_editor_for_coco_analysis

group by 1
having min(account_created_at) > '2025-09-20 00:00:00.000'
)

, used_not_used_coco as (
select
    minutes
    , case when first_coco_request_timestamp < dateadd(minute, m.minutes, u.first_open_in_editor_at) then true else false end as use_coco_first_x_minutes
    , count(1) users
    , count_if(trial_started_at is not null) trials
    , count_if(trial_started_at is not null and latest_subscription_created_at is not null) subscribers_after_trial
    , trials / users as perc_trial
        
from users u
join minutes_cte m on 1=1
where coalesce(trial_started_at, '2099-12-31') > dateadd(minute, m.minutes, u.first_open_in_editor_at)

group by 1,2
order by 1,2 desc
)

select 
    minutes
    , sum(users) as "users (opened editot and didn't start trial within time window)"
    , sum(case when use_coco_first_x_minutes then users end) "users used coco"
    , sum(case when use_coco_first_x_minutes then trials end) "users used coco and started trial"
    , "users used coco and started trial" / "users used coco" as "used coco - % trial"
    , sum(case when use_coco_first_x_minutes = False then users end) "users not used coco"
    , sum(case when use_coco_first_x_minutes = False then trials end) "users not used coco and started trial"
    , "users not used coco and started trial" / "users not used coco" as "not used coco - % trial"
    , "used coco - % trial" / "not used coco - % trial" - 1 as "coco trial lift"
    , "users not used coco" * ("used coco - % trial" - "not used coco - % trial") "trial delta due to coco"
    , sum(case when use_coco_first_x_minutes then subscribers_after_trial end) "users used coco and subscribed"
    , sum(case when use_coco_first_x_minutes = False then subscribers_after_trial end) "users not used coco and subscribed"

from used_not_used_coco
group by 1
order by 1
;
business_question: What is the impact of using COCO within key minutes after first opening the editor on trial start rates and subsequent subscriptions?

query_text:
WITH
monthly_nrr AS (
        SELECT 
                * REPLACE (

                                TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(
                                        company_market,
                                        '()',
                                        '',
                                        1, 0, 'i' 
                                )) AS company_market ,

                                TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(
                                        last_touch_source,
                                        '()',
                                        '',
                                        1, 0, 'i' 
                                )) AS last_touch_source 

                ) 
        FROM analytics.bi.acq_period_monthly_grr_nrr_new
        WHERE customer_group_first_business_period >= '2021-01-01'

                        AND customer_group_product_type NOT IN( 'Self-Service')
                        AND months_since_becoming_business IS NOT NULL

),
cohorts_size AS (
        SELECT
                company_market, last_touch_source,
                COUNT(DISTINCT customer_group_id) AS cohort_size,
                 FALSE  AS is_residual_group
        FROM monthly_nrr

        group by 1,2

        QUALIFY SUM(cohort_size) OVER (PARTITION BY is_residual_group) >= 0 
)

,
summarized_monthly_nrr AS (
        SELECT
                m.customer_group_first_business_period,
                m.months_since_becoming_business,

                        IFF(c.is_residual_group, 'other', m.company_market) AS company_market,

                        IFF(c.is_residual_group, 'other', m.last_touch_source) AS last_touch_source,

                ANY_VALUE(m.period) AS period,
                'existing' AS month_type,
                COUNT(1) AS cohort_size,
                ROUND(SUM(business_mrr::DECIMAL(22, 5)), 2) AS business_mrr,
                ROUND(SUM(initial_business_mrr::DECIMAL(22, 5)), 2) AS initial_business_mrr,
                LAST_VALUE(months_since_becoming_business) 
                        OVER(PARTITION BY m.customer_group_first_business_period,  IFF(c.is_residual_group, 'other', m.company_market),  IFF(c.is_residual_group, 'other', m.last_touch_source) 
                                ORDER BY months_since_becoming_business
                ) + 1 AS first_unavailable_real_month_from_acquisition,
                LAST_VALUE(ROUND(SUM(business_mrr::DECIMAL(22, 5)), 2)) 
                        OVER(PARTITION BY m.customer_group_first_business_period,  IFF(c.is_residual_group, 'other', m.company_market),  IFF(c.is_residual_group, 'other', m.last_touch_source) 
                                ORDER BY months_since_becoming_business
                ) AS last_real_business_mrr
        FROM monthly_nrr m

        INNER JOIN cohorts_size c
                ON 
                        m.company_market = c.company_market
                        AND

                        m.last_touch_source = c.last_touch_source

        group by 1,2,3,4
)

,
growth_rates AS (
        SELECT
                s.months_since_becoming_business,

                        s.company_market,

                        s.last_touch_source,

                DIV0(SUM(s.business_mrr), SUM(s2.business_mrr)) AS growth_rate,
                MAX(s.months_since_becoming_business) 

                        OVER(PARTITION BY  s.company_market, s.last_touch_source)

                AS max_historical_estimate
        FROM summarized_monthly_nrr s
        LEFT JOIN summarized_monthly_nrr s2
                ON s.customer_group_first_business_period = s2.customer_group_first_business_period

                        AND s.company_market = s2.company_market

                        AND s.last_touch_source = s2.last_touch_source

                        AND s.months_since_becoming_business  = s2.months_since_becoming_business + 1
        WHERE s.months_since_becoming_business <= 999
        group by 1,2,3
        HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT s.customer_group_first_business_period) >= 12
)

,
dimension_values AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT
                company_market, last_touch_source
        FROM summarized_monthly_nrr
),
month_sequence AS (
        SELECT
                dimension_values.*,
                ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY company_market, last_touch_source ORDER BY SEQ4()) - 1 AS months_since_becoming_business
        FROM TABLE(GENERATOR(ROWCOUNT => 61))
        CROSS JOIN dimension_values
),
acquisition_months AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT
                customer_group_first_business_period,
                company_market, last_touch_source,
                cohort_size,
                initial_business_mrr,
                first_unavailable_real_month_from_acquisition,
                last_real_business_mrr
        FROM summarized_monthly_nrr
)

,
expanded_acquisition_months AS (
        SELECT
                am.customer_group_first_business_period,

                        am.company_market,

                        am.last_touch_source,

                DATEADD('month', ms.months_since_becoming_business, am.customer_group_first_business_period) AS period,
                ms.months_since_becoming_business,
                FLOOR((ms.months_since_becoming_business - 1) / 12) + 1 AS years_from_acquisition,
                am.cohort_size,
                am.initial_business_mrr,
                am.first_unavailable_real_month_from_acquisition,
                am.last_real_business_mrr
        FROM acquisition_months am

        INNER JOIN month_sequence ms
                        ON 
                                am.company_market = ms.company_market
                                AND

                                am.last_touch_source = ms.last_touch_source

),
final AS (
        SELECT
                eam.customer_group_first_business_period AS acquisition_period,

                        eam.company_market,

                        eam.last_touch_source,

                eam.months_since_becoming_business AS periods_from_acquisition,
                ANY_VALUE(eam.period) AS period,
                ANY_VALUE(eam.years_from_acquisition) AS years_from_acquisition,
                ANY_VALUE(eam.cohort_size) AS cohort_size,
                ANY_VALUE(eam.initial_business_mrr) AS initial_business_mrr,
                ANY_VALUE(CASE
                        WHEN smn.customer_group_first_business_period IS NOT NULL THEN 'existing'
                        WHEN rr.growth_rate IS NOT NULL THEN 'estimated_via_historical_data'
                        WHEN rr.growth_rate IS NULL THEN 'unestimated_due_to_missing_historical_data'
                END) AS month_type,
                --BOOLAND_AGG(rr.growth_rate IS NULL) OVER(PARTITION BY eam.months_from_acquisition) AS month_value_estimated_via_parameters,
                COALESCE(ANY_VALUE(smn.business_mrr), ANY_VALUE(eam.last_real_business_mrr) * EXP(SUM(LN(rr.growth_rate)))) AS business_mrr
        FROM expanded_acquisition_months eam
        LEFT JOIN summarized_monthly_nrr smn
                ON eam.customer_group_first_business_period = smn.customer_group_first_business_period
                        AND eam.months_since_becoming_business = smn.months_since_becoming_business

                        AND 
                                        eam.company_market = smn.company_market
                                AND

                                        eam.last_touch_source = smn.last_touch_source

        LEFT JOIN growth_rates rr
                ON rr.months_since_becoming_business BETWEEN eam.first_unavailable_real_month_from_acquisition AND eam.months_since_becoming_business
                        AND eam.months_since_becoming_business <= rr.max_historical_estimate

                        AND 
                                        eam.company_market = rr.company_market
                                AND

                                        eam.last_touch_source = rr.last_touch_source

        group by 1,2,3,4
)

SELECT *
FROM FINAL where acquisition_period = '2024-03-01'

AND  company_market = 'Enterprise'
 and last_touch_source = 'Inbound';
business_question: What are the historical and projected MRR growth patterns by acquisition cohort across markets and last_touch_source?

query_text:
WITH long_take_users AS (
  SELECT
    t.AUTHOR_USER_ID AS user_id,
    MIN(t.CREATED_AT) AS first_long_take_at
  FROM analytics.fs.takes t
  WHERE t.DURATION_IN_MINUTES >= 5
    AND t.CREATED_AT >= DATEADD(day, -90, CURRENT_DATE())
  GROUP BY t.AUTHOR_USER_ID
),
t3_cohort AS (
  SELECT
    ltu.user_id,
    ltu.first_long_take_at,
    u.SIGN_UP_AT,
    CASE
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', u.SIGN_UP_AT, CURRENT_DATE()) <= 30 THEN 'new'
      ELSE 'mature'
    END AS user_maturity
  FROM long_take_users ltu
  JOIN analytics.fs.users u ON ltu.user_id = u.USER_ID
  WHERE (u.IS_INTERNAL_USER = FALSE OR u.IS_INTERNAL_USER IS NULL)
),
all_exports AS (
  SELECT
    c.CREATED_BY_USER_ID AS user_id,
    c.CLIP_ID,
    c.FIRST_EXPORTED_AT,
    CASE
      WHEN c.IS_MAGIC_EPISODE = TRUE THEN 'longform'
      WHEN c.IS_MAGIC_CLIP = TRUE THEN 'shortform'
      WHEN c.IS_MAGIC_HOOK = TRUE OR c.IS_MAGIC_SEGMENT = TRUE THEN 'shortform'
      WHEN c.CLIP_DURATION_IN_MINUTES >= 5 THEN 'longform'
      ELSE 'shortform'
    END AS export_category
  FROM analytics.fs.clips c
  WHERE c.IS_EXPORT = TRUE
),
user_export_summary AS (
  SELECT
    co.user_id,
    co.user_maturity,
    co.first_long_take_at,
    MAX(CASE WHEN ae.export_category = 'longform' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_longform,
    MAX(CASE WHEN ae.export_category = 'shortform' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_shortform,
    MIN(CASE WHEN ae.export_category = 'longform' THEN ae.FIRST_EXPORTED_AT END) AS first_longform_at,
    MIN(CASE WHEN ae.export_category = 'shortform' THEN ae.FIRST_EXPORTED_AT END) AS first_shortform_at
  FROM t3_cohort co
  LEFT JOIN all_exports ae
    ON co.user_id = ae.user_id
    AND ae.FIRST_EXPORTED_AT >= co.first_long_take_at
  GROUP BY co.user_id, co.user_maturity, co.first_long_take_at
),
t3_segments AS (
  SELECT
    *,
    CASE
      WHEN has_longform = 1 AND has_shortform = 1 THEN 'both'
      WHEN has_longform = 1 AND has_shortform = 0 THEN 'longform_only'
      WHEN has_longform = 0 AND has_shortform = 1 THEN 'clips_only'
      ELSE 'neither'
    END AS segment
  FROM user_export_summary
)
,
first_export_typed AS (
  SELECT
    user_id,
    user_maturity,
    first_longform_at,
    first_shortform_at,
    CASE
      WHEN first_longform_at IS NOT NULL AND (first_shortform_at IS NULL OR first_longform_at <= first_shortform_at) THEN 'longform_first'
      WHEN first_shortform_at IS NOT NULL AND (first_longform_at IS NULL OR first_shortform_at < first_longform_at) THEN 'clips_first'
    END AS first_export_type,
    CASE
      WHEN first_longform_at IS NOT NULL AND (first_shortform_at IS NULL OR first_longform_at <= first_shortform_at) THEN first_longform_at
      ELSE first_shortform_at
    END AS first_export_at
  FROM t3_segments
  WHERE segment IN ('longform_only', 'clips_only', 'both')
)
SELECT
  user_maturity,
  first_export_type,
  COUNT(*) AS n_users,
  -- D30 cross-adoption
  SUM(CASE
    WHEN first_export_type = 'clips_first' AND first_longform_at IS NOT NULL
         AND DATEDIFF('day', first_shortform_at, first_longform_at) <= 30 THEN 1
    WHEN first_export_type = 'longform_first' AND first_shortform_at IS NOT NULL
         AND DATEDIFF('day', first_longform_at, first_shortform_at) <= 30 THEN 1
    ELSE 0
  END) AS cross_adopted_d30,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE
    WHEN first_export_type = 'clips_first' AND first_longform_at IS NOT NULL
         AND DATEDIFF('day', first_shortform_at, first_longform_at) <= 30 THEN 1
    WHEN first_export_type = 'longform_first' AND first_shortform_at IS NOT NULL
         AND DATEDIFF('day', first_longform_at, first_shortform_at) <= 30 THEN 1
    ELSE 0
  END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS cross_adopted_d30_pct,
  -- D60
  SUM(CASE
    WHEN first_export_type = 'clips_first' AND first_longform_at IS NOT NULL
         AND DATEDIFF('day', first_shortform_at, first_longform_at) <= 60 THEN 1
    WHEN first_export_type = 'longform_first' AND first_shortform_at IS NOT NULL
         AND DATEDIFF('day', first_longform_at, first_shortform_at) <= 60 THEN 1
    ELSE 0
  END) AS cross_adopted_d60,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE
    WHEN first_export_type = 'clips_first' AND first_longform_at IS NOT NULL
         AND DATEDIFF('day', first_shortform_at, first_longform_at) <= 60 THEN 1
    WHEN first_export_type = 'longform_first' AND first_shortform_at IS NOT NULL
         AND DATEDIFF('day', first_longform_at, first_shortform_at) <= 60 THEN 1
    ELSE 0
  END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS cross_adopted_d60_pct,
  -- D90
  SUM(CASE
    WHEN first_export_type = 'clips_first' AND first_longform_at IS NOT NULL
         AND DATEDIFF('day', first_shortform_at, first_longform_at) <= 90 THEN 1
    WHEN first_export_type = 'longform_first' AND first_shortform_at IS NOT NULL
         AND DATEDIFF('day', first_longform_at, first_shortform_at) <= 90 THEN 1
    ELSE 0
  END) AS cross_adopted_d90,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE
    WHEN first_export_type = 'clips_first' AND first_longform_at IS NOT NULL
         AND DATEDIFF('day', first_shortform_at, first_longform_at) <= 90 THEN 1
    WHEN first_export_type = 'longform_first' AND first_shortform_at IS NOT NULL
         AND DATEDIFF('day', first_longform_at, first_shortform_at) <= 90 THEN 1
    ELSE 0
  END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS cross_adopted_d90_pct
FROM first_export_typed
GROUP BY user_maturity, first_export_type
ORDER BY user_maturity, first_export_type
business_question: What percentage of new vs mature users who export clips adopt both longform and shortform formats within 30, 60, and 90 days after their first export?

query_text:
with 
exploded as (
SELECT distinct
    f.value AS feature
FROM analytics.ba.clips_opened_on_editor_for_coco_analysis t,
     LATERAL FLATTEN(

group by 1,2,3,4

;

query_text:
SELECT
    months_since_acquisition AS months_since_acquisition,
    recurring_interval,
    DIV0(SUM(self_service_mrr) , SUM(initial_self_service_mrr)) AS ss_nrr,
    DIV0(SUM(capped_self_service_mrr) , SUM(initial_self_service_mrr)) AS ss_grr,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN customer_group_product_type IN ('Self-Service', 'Self-Service-to-Business') THEN customer_group_id END) AS ss_cohort_size,
    -- DIV0(SUM(business_mrr) , SUM(initial_business_mrr)),

GROUP BY 1,2

query_text:
WITH assignments AS (
    SELECT
        ce.anonymous_id AS combined_id,
        'Pricing Page Button CTA Test' AS Experiment_name,
        TIMESTAMP AS first_assignment,
        CASE
            WHEN variation_letter = 'A' THEN 'Control'
            WHEN variation_letter = 'B' THEN 'Treatment'
            ELSE NULL 
        END AS variation,
        mf.channel_group,
        mf.utm_medium,
        mf.utm_source,
        mf.page_name,
        mf.campaign_type,
        mf.absolute_page_name,
        mf.first_visit_region,
        mf.email_type,
    FROM analytics.stg.stg_segment__convert_event ce
    LEFT JOIN analytics.bi.marketing_funnel_analysis mf
        ON ce.anonymous_id = mf.anonymous_id
    WHERE test_number = '1004182080'
        -- AND email_type = 'brand'
    QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ce.anonymous_id ORDER BY TIMESTAMP ASC) = 1
),

identity_signup AS (
    SELECT
        si.anonymous_id,
        si.user_id,
        u.sign_up_at
    FROM analytics.trf.int_segment__last_user_id_for_anon_id si
    LEFT JOIN analytics.fs.users u 
        ON si.user_id = u.user_id
    WHERE u.sign_up_at IS NOT NULL
),

first_customer_date AS (
    SELECT 
        account_id,
        MIN(pivot_day) first_customer_date
    FROM analytics.bi.daily_customer_mrr
    GROUP BY 1
),

trials AS (
    SELECT
        isi.anonymous_id,
        MIN(ts.timestamp) AS trial_started_timestamp
    FROM identity_signup isi
    JOIN analytics.stg.stg_segment__account_trial_started ts 
        ON isi.user_id = ts.user_id
    WHERE ts.timestamp IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY 1
),

subscriptions AS (
    SELECT
        isi.anonymous_id,
        sc.timestamp AS sub_timestamp,
        sc.interval
    FROM analytics.stg.stg_segment__subscription_created sc
    JOIN identity_signup isi 
        ON sc.user_id = isi.user_id
    LEFT JOIN analytics.mrt.dim_plans dp 
        ON sc.plan_id = dp.plan_id
    LEFT JOIN analytics.trf.core__products dpr 
        ON dp.product_id = dpr.product_id
    WHERE dpr.product_type = 'Self-Service'
      AND sc.interval IN ('month', 'year')
),

mrr AS (
    SELECT
        isi.anonymous_id,
        sc.timestamp AS mrr_timestamp,
        ROUND(CASE WHEN sc.interval = 'year' THEN dp.amount_in_dollars/12
            ELSE dp.amount_in_dollars END, 2) AS mrr_base,
        ROUND(
            (CASE WHEN sc.interval = 'year' THEN dp.amount_in_dollars/12 ELSE dp.amount_in_dollars END) * COALESCE(cr.exchange_rate,1), 
        2) AS usd_mrr
    FROM analytics.stg.stg_segment__subscription_created sc
    JOIN identity_signup isi 
        ON sc.user_id = isi.user_id
    LEFT JOIN analytics.mrt.dim_plans dp 
        ON sc.plan_id = dp.plan_id
    LEFT JOIN analytics.stg.stg_netsuite__currency_rate cr 
        ON dp.currency = LOWER(cr.transaction_currency) 
        AND LOWER(cr.base_currency) = 'usd' 
        AND cr.effective_date = (
            SELECT MAX(effective_date) 
            FROM analytics.stg.stg_netsuite__currency_rate 
            WHERE dp.currency = LOWER(transaction_currency) AND LOWER(base_currency) = 'usd'
        )
),

aggregated_results AS (
    SELECT
        a.variation,
        COUNT(DISTINCT a.combined_id) AS total_assigned_users,

        -- Added Sign-ups logic
        COUNT(DISTINCT su.anonymous_id) AS sign_ups_7d,

        COUNT(DISTINCT t.anonymous_id) AS trial_starts_7d,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN s.interval = 'year' THEN s.anonymous_id END) AS yearly_subs_30d,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN s.interval = 'month' THEN s.anonymous_id END) AS monthly_subs_30d,
        SUM(m.usd_mrr) AS total_usd_mrr_30d
    FROM assignments a

    -- Added JOIN for Sign-ups within 7 days
    LEFT JOIN identity_signup su
        ON a.combined_id = su.anonymous_id
        AND su.sign_up_at >= a.first_assignment
        AND su.sign_up_at <= DATEADD(day, 7, a.first_assignment)

    LEFT JOIN trials t
        ON a.combined_id = t.anonymous_id
        AND t.trial_started_timestamp >= a.first_assignment
        AND t.trial_started_timestamp <= DATEADD(day, 7, a.first_assignment)

    LEFT JOIN subscriptions s
        ON a.combined_id = s.anonymous_id
        AND s.sub_timestamp >= a.first_assignment
        AND s.sub_timestamp <= DATEADD(day, 30, a.first_assignment)

    LEFT JOIN mrr m
        ON a.combined_id = m.anonymous_id
        AND m.mrr_timestamp >= a.first_assignment
        AND m.mrr_timestamp <= DATEADD(day, 30, a.first_assignment)

    WHERE a.variation IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY 1
)

SELECT 
    variation,
    total_assigned_users,

    -- New Sign-Up Metrics
    sign_ups_7d,
    ROUND(sign_ups_7d::FLOAT / NULLIF(total_assigned_users, 0), 4) AS sign_up_cvr_7d,

    trial_starts_7d,
    ROUND(trial_starts_7d::FLOAT / NULLIF(total_assigned_users, 0), 4) AS trial_cvr_7d,

    yearly_subs_30d,
    ROUND(yearly_subs_30d::FLOAT / NULLIF(total_assigned_users, 0), 4) AS yearly_sub_cvr_30d,

    monthly_subs_30d,
    ROUND(monthly_subs_30d::FLOAT / NULLIF(total_assigned_users, 0), 4) AS monthly_sub_cvr_30d,

    COALESCE(total_usd_mrr_30d, 0) AS total_usd_mrr_30d,
    ROUND(COALESCE(total_usd_mrr_30d, 0)::FLOAT / NULLIF(total_assigned_users, 0), 4) AS mrr_per_assignment_30d

FROM aggregated_results
ORDER BY variation;

;
business_question: What is the Pricing Page Button CTA Test's impact on signups, trials, paid subscriptions, and 30-day MRR by variation (Control vs Treatment)?

query_text:
WITH 
    users_activity as (
    SELECT 
    f.user_id,
    f.latest_campaign_type,
    f.latest_utm_medium,
    f.latest_utm_source,
    f.channel_group,
    f.clay_enriched_persona_group,
    f.clay_enriched_persona_seniority,
    f.trial_started_at,
    f.trial_cancelled_at,
    f.trial_ended_at,
    f.email_type IN ('brand') as is_brand_domain,
    datediff ('day',trial_started_at,trial_cancelled_at) as trial_days_to_cancel,
    f.acquisition_date,
    a.takes_activity,
    a.assets_activity,
    a.is_active
    FROM analytics.bi.marketing_funnel_analysis f
    LEFT JOIN analytics.bi.daily_users_product_activity a
        ON f.user_id = a.user_id
        AND a.date_day BETWEEN f.trial_started_at AND COALESCE (trial_cancelled_at::DATE,trial_ended_at::DATE)
    WHERE f.user_id IS NOT NULL
        AND f.had_trial
        AND f.trial_started_at >= '2025-07-01'
        AND f.trial_started_at <= dateadd ('day',-15,current_date())
        AND (trial_days_to_cancel IS NULL OR trial_days_to_cancel <=14)
        -- AND f.product_group NOT IN ('Mobile Plus')

    )
    SELECT 
    user_id,
    is_brand_domain,
    latest_campaign_type,
    latest_utm_medium,
    CASE 
    WHEN latest_utm_medium NOT IN ('affiliate','cpc','organic','referral','organic llm','integration partner') THEN 'Other'
    ELSE latest_utm_medium
    END as latest_utm_medium_grouped,
    latest_utm_source,
    CASE 
    WHEN LATEST_UTM_SOURCE NOT IN ('direct','google','spotify','bing','guest','youtube','chatgpt.com') THEN 'Other'
    ELSE LATEST_UTM_SOURCE 
    END as latest_utm_source_grouped,
    CASE 
        WHEN channel_group NOT IN ('direct','paid search brand','organic search brand','paid search','organic search non brand','paid search','guest','organic llm','integration partner','affiliate') THEN 'Other'
        ELSE channel_group
        END as channel_group,
    clay_enriched_persona_group,
    clay_enriched_persona_seniority,
    trial_started_at,
    date_trunc('month',trial_started_at) as trial_month,
    trial_cancelled_at,
    trial_ended_at,
    trial_days_to_cancel,
    acquisition_date,
    COALESCE(BOOLOR_AGG(takes_activity),  FALSE) AS had_takes_activity,
    COALESCE(BOOLOR_AGG(assets_activity), FALSE) AS had_assets_activity,
    COALESCE(BOOLOR_AGG(is_active), FALSE) AS was_active

    FROM users_activity
    GROUP BY ALL
;
business_question: What are trial-to-subscription outcomes and engagement patterns by campaign/source/UTM and persona among new signups in the recent period?

query_text:
with
requests_raw as (
    SELECT
        a.timestamp,
        a.id as request_id,
        a.resource_id as user_id,
        a.thread_id,
        a.run_id,
        a.request

    from analytics.stg.stg_eds__ai_agent_result a 
    -- inner join self_serve_users b on a.resource_id = b.user_id
    where 1=1
        and year >= 2025
        and timestamp >= '2025-09-21 00:00:00.000'
        and domain = 'editor'
    qualify row_number() over(partition by a.id order by timestamp desc) = 1 -- 7% of requests are duplicated rows
)

, requests_parsed AS (
    select 
        *,-- exclude(r1,r2,r3,r4,r5,r6),
        r6 as request_str,
        row_number() over(partition by thread_id order by timestamp asc) as rn_in_thread, 
        row_number() over(partition by run_id order by timestamp asc) as rn_in_run
    from 
    (
    select 
        *,
        REGEXP_REPLACE(request, '\\n|\\t','') as r1,
        SUBSTR(r1, 37) as r2,
        replace(r2,'\\302\\240', '') as r3,
        replace(r3, '"', '') as r4,
        left(r4, LENGTH(r4) - 4) as r5,
        replace(r5,'\\', '') as r6
        
    from requests_raw
    where r6 IS NOT NULL 
      and trim(r6) != ''
    )
)

select 
    
    request,
    r1,
r2,
r3,
r4,
r5,
 r6
 

from requests_parsed
limit 100
business_question: What does a sample of parsed editor-domain agent requests look like and how are the request components structured after cleaning?

query_text:
WITH
base_mrr_data AS (
        SELECT *
        FROM "ANALYTICS"."BI"."MONTHLY_CUSTOMER_MRR"
        WHERE customer_group_status != 'Churn'
                AND period < DATE_TRUNC('mon', CURRENT_DATE())
),
customer_group_classification AS (
        SELECT 
                b.customer_group_id,
                ANY_VALUE(c.acquisition_period) AS customer_group_first_period,
                ANY_VALUE(c.business_acquisition_period) AS customer_group_first_business_period,
                ANY_VALUE(has_been_self_service) AS has_been_self_service,
                ANY_VALUE(has_been_business) AS has_been_business,
                ANY_VALUE( 
                        CASE
                                WHEN c.has_been_self_service AND NOT c.has_been_business THEN 'Self-Service'
                                WHEN c.has_been_business AND NOT c.has_been_self_service THEN 'Business'
                                WHEN c.has_been_self_service AND c.business_acquisition_period = c.acquisition_period THEN 'Business'
                                WHEN c.has_been_business AND c.business_acquisition_period > c.acquisition_period THEN 'Self-Service-to-Business'
                END) AS customer_group_product_type,
                COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN c.has_been_business THEN CASE WHEN COALESCE(company_market, 'Unknown') IN ( 'Unknown', 'Mid Market') THEN 'Agency' ELSE company_market END  END), 'Undefined') AS company_market,
                COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN c.has_been_business THEN CASE WHEN COALESCE(c.first_last_touch_source, 'Unknown') IN ( 'Unknown', 'Customer Success') THEN 'Inbound' ELSE c.first_last_touch_source END  END), 'Undefined') AS last_touch_source,
                MIN_BY(
                        b.plan_platform,
                        DATEADD('day', 
                                CASE
                                        WHEN b.plan_platform = LOWER('web') THEN 0
                                        WHEN b.plan_platform = LOWER('iOs') THEN 1
                                        WHEN b.plan_platform = LOWER('android') THEN 2
                                        ELSE 3
                                END, b.pivot_day)
                ) AS first_plan_platform,
                ANY_VALUE(c.first_mrr_source) AS first_mrr_source,
                ANY_VALUE(c.first_email_type) AS first_email_type,
                ANY_VALUE(c.first_mrr) AS first_mrr,
                ANY_VALUE(c.max_mrr) AS max_mrr,
                ANY_VALUE(c.latest_mrr) AS latest_mrr,
                ANY_VALUE(c.first_country) AS first_country,
                ANY_VALUE(IFF(c.had_yearly_subscription, 'year', 'month')) AS recurring_interval,
                ANY_VALUE(c.first_utm_source) AS first_utm_source,
                ANY_VALUE(c.first_utm_medium) AS first_utm_medium,
                ANY_VALUE(c.first_utm_campaign) AS first_utm_campaign,
                ANY_VALUE(c.first_campaign_type) AS first_campaign_type,
                CASE 
                        WHEN customer_group_product_type IN ('Self-Service', 'Self-Service-to-Business')
                                THEN CASE 
                                        WHEN ANY_VALUE(c.first_product_group) IN ('Webinar','Basic plan','Account Access','Pro plan + Live Studio','Pro plan', 'Legacy', 'Creators Pro Plan') 
                                                THEN 'Pro plan'
                                        WHEN ANY_VALUE(c.first_product_group) IN ('Standard plan + Live Studio','Standard plan')
                                                THEN 'Standard plan'
                                        ELSE ANY_VALUE(c.first_product_group)
                                END
                        ELSE 'Business'
                END AS first_product_group,

                        ANY_VALUE(c.purpose_is_customer_testimonials) AS purpose_is_customer_testimonials,

                        ANY_VALUE(c.purpose_is_executive_interviews) AS purpose_is_executive_interviews,

                        ANY_VALUE(c.purpose_is_internal_communication) AS purpose_is_internal_communication,

                        ANY_VALUE(c.purpose_is_keynote_speakers) AS purpose_is_keynote_speakers,

                        ANY_VALUE(c.purpose_is_live_streaming) AS purpose_is_live_streaming,

                        ANY_VALUE(c.purpose_is_panel_discussions) AS purpose_is_panel_discussions,

                        ANY_VALUE(c.purpose_is_podcasts) AS purpose_is_podcasts,

                        ANY_VALUE(c.purpose_is_screen_recording) AS purpose_is_screen_recording,

                        ANY_VALUE(c.purpose_is_talking_head_video) AS purpose_is_talking_head_video,

                        ANY_VALUE(c.purpose_is_video_interviews) AS purpose_is_video_interviews,

                        ANY_VALUE(c.purpose_is_video_marketing) AS purpose_is_video_marketing,

                        ANY_VALUE(c.purpose_is_virtual_conferences) AS purpose_is_virtual_conferences,

                        ANY_VALUE(c.purpose_is_virtual_events) AS purpose_is_virtual_events,

                        ANY_VALUE(c.purpose_is_voice_over) AS purpose_is_voice_over,

                        ANY_VALUE(c.purpose_is_webinars) AS purpose_is_webinars,

                        ANY_VALUE(c.use_type) AS use_type,

        FROM base_mrr_data b

        INNER JOIN ANALYTICS.fs.customer_groups c
                ON b.customer_group_id = c.customer_group_id
        GROUP BY 1
),
customers_data AS (
	SELECT
		m.customer_group_id,
		m.customer_id,
		m.pivot_day,
		m.period,
		m.product_type,
		m.mrr,
		m.email,
		m.customer_group_status,
		c.customer_group_product_type,
		c.customer_group_first_period,
		c.customer_group_first_business_period,
        c.has_been_self_service,
        c.has_been_business,
		c.company_market,
		c.last_touch_source,
		c.recurring_interval,
		c.first_mrr_source,
		c.first_email_type,
		c.first_country,
		c.first_mrr,
		c.max_mrr,
		c.latest_mrr,
		c.first_plan_platform,
		c.first_product_group
	FROM base_mrr_data m
	INNER JOIN customer_group_classification c
		ON m.customer_group_id = c.customer_group_id
)

SELECT
    customer_group_id,
    BOOLOR_AGG(product_type = 'Business') AS has_been_business,
    BOOLOR_AGG(product_type = 'Self-Service') AS has_been_self_service,
    BOOLAND_AGG(product_type = 'Business') AS has_been_only_busines,
    BOOLAND_AGG(product_type = 'Self-Service') AS has_been_only_self_service,
    MIN(CASE WHEN product_type = 'Business' THEN period END) AS first_business_period,
    MIN(CASE WHEN product_type = 'Self-Service' THEN period END) AS first_self_service_period
FROM analytics.bi.monthly_customer_mrr
WHERE customer_group_status != 'Churn'
GROUP BY 1
;
business_question: What is the mix of Business vs Self-Service adoption among customer groups and their first periods?

query_text:
WITH 
    users_activity as (
    SELECT 
    f.user_id,
    f.latest_campaign_type,
    f.latest_utm_medium,
    f.latest_utm_source,
    f.channel_group,
    f.clay_enriched_persona_group,
    f.clay_enriched_persona_seniority,
    f.trial_started_at,
    DATE_TRUNC ('month',trial_started_at) as trial_month,
    f.trial_cancelled_at,
    f.trial_ended_at,
    f.email_type IN ('brand') as is_brand_domain,
    datediff ('day',trial_started_at,trial_cancelled_at) as trial_days_to_cancel,
    -- f.acquisition_date,
    a.takes_activity,
    a.assets_activity,
    a.is_active,
    FROM analytics.bi.marketing_funnel_analysis f
    LEFT JOIN analytics.bi.daily_users_product_activity a
        ON f.user_id = a.user_id
        AND a.date_day BETWEEN TO_DATE(f.trial_started_at)
              AND COALESCE(TO_DATE(f.trial_cancelled_at), TO_DATE(f.trial_ended_at))  
    LEFT JOIN analytics.fs.takes ta
        ON ta.created_at BETWEEN TO_DATE(f.trial_started_at)
              AND COALESCE(TO_DATE(f.trial_cancelled_at), TO_DATE(f.trial_ended_at)) 
        AND f.user_id = ta.author_user_id 

        WHERE f.user_id IS NOT NULL
        AND f.had_trial
        AND f.trial_started_at >= '2025-07-01'
        AND f.trial_started_at <= dateadd ('day',-15,current_date())
        AND (trial_days_to_cancel IS NULL OR trial_days_to_cancel <=14)
        -- AND f.product_group NOT IN ('Mobile Plus')
    )
    ,trial_takes as (

    SELECT
    f.user_id,
    datediff ('day',trial_started_at,trial_cancelled_at) as trial_days_to_cancel,
    COUNT (take_id) as n_trial_takes,
    COUNT_if (type = 'internal') as n_internal_takes,
    COUNT_if (type = 'external') as n_external_takes,
    SUM (duration_in_minutes) as trial_recorded_minutes,
    SUM ( 
    CASE WHEN type = 'internal' THEN (duration_in_minutes) 
    ELSE 0
    END )as internal_trial_recorded_minutes,
    SUM ( 
    CASE WHEN type = 'external' THEN (duration_in_minutes) 
    ELSE 0
    END )as external_trial_recorded_minutes,
    FROM analytics.bi.marketing_funnel_analysis f
    LEFT JOIN analytics.fs.takes ta
        ON ta.created_at BETWEEN TO_DATE(f.trial_started_at)
              AND COALESCE(TO_DATE(f.trial_cancelled_at), TO_DATE(f.trial_ended_at)) 
        AND f.user_id = ta.author_user_id 
    WHERE f.user_id IS NOT NULL
      AND f.had_trial
      AND f.trial_started_at >= '2025-07-01'
      AND f.trial_started_at <= dateadd ('day',-15,current_date())
      AND (trial_days_to_cancel IS NULL OR trial_days_to_cancel <=14)
    GROUP BY 1,2

    )

    ,final_cte as (
    SELECT 
    -- COUNT (*),COUNT (distinct ua.user_id)
    ua.user_id,
    ua.is_brand_domain,
    trial_month,
    ua.latest_campaign_type,
    ua.latest_utm_medium,
    CASE 
    WHEN latest_utm_medium NOT IN ('affiliate','cpc','organic','referral','organic llm','integration partner') THEN 'Other'
    ELSE latest_utm_medium
    END as latest_utm_medium_grouped,
    latest_utm_source,
    CASE 
    WHEN LATEST_UTM_SOURCE NOT IN ('direct','google','spotify','bing','guest','youtube','chatgpt.com') THEN 'Other'
    ELSE LATEST_UTM_SOURCE 
    END as latest_utm_source_grouped,
    CASE 
        WHEN channel_group NOT IN ('direct','paid search brand','organic search brand','paid search','organic search non brand','paid search','guest','organic llm','integration partner','affiliate') THEN 'Other'
        ELSE channel_group
        END as channel_group,
    ua.clay_enriched_persona_group,
    ua.clay_enriched_persona_seniority,
    ua.trial_started_at,
    ua.trial_cancelled_at,
    ua.trial_ended_at,
    ua.trial_days_to_cancel,
    -- acquisition_date,
    COALESCE(BOOLOR_AGG(takes_activity),  FALSE) AS had_takes_activity,
    COALESCE(BOOLOR_AGG(assets_activity), FALSE) AS had_assets_activity,
    COALESCE(BOOLOR_AGG(is_active), FALSE) AS was_active,
    n_internal_takes,
    n_internal_takes,
    trial_recorded_minutes,
    internal_trial_recorded_minutes,
    external_trial_recorded_minutes,
    FROM users_activity ua
    LEFT JOIN trial_takes tt
        ON ua.user_id = tt.user_id
    GROUP BY ALL
    )

    SELECT 
    *
    FROM final_cte
;
business_question: What factors drive trial retention and conversion to paid for Self-Service signups, including channel/utm, brand domain, and in-trial engagement metrics?

query_text:
WITH first_assignment AS (
  SELECT
    user_id,
    MIN_BY(variation, TIMESTAMP) AS variation,
    MIN_BY(device_type, TIMESTAMP) AS device_type,
    MIN(TIMESTAMP) AS first_assignment
  FROM analytics.stg.stg_segment__experiment_assignment
  WHERE experiment = 'magicEpisodeEditingAdoptionExperiment'
    AND TIMESTAMP >= '2026-01-20 15:30:00.000'
  GROUP BY ALL
),
experiment_users AS (
  SELECT
    ea.user_id,
    ea.variation,
    ea.device_type,
    ea.first_assignment
  FROM first_assignment ea
  LEFT JOIN analytics.stg.stg_segment__user_signed_up u ON ea.user_id = u.user_id
  WHERE ea.user_id NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT user_id
    FROM analytics.fs.users
    WHERE IS_INTERNAL_USER = TRUE
      OR email LIKE 'S%@5iosbw0g.mailosaur.net'
      OR email LIKE 'riverside%@gmail.com'
      OR email LIKE '%@m1.rsfmbox.com'
      OR CREATED_AT < '2026-01-20 15:30:00.000'
  )
  AND (u.platform <> 'spotify' OR u.platform IS NULL)
)
,
-- Population 1: Control crossovers (previewed raw AND visited MFY)
control_crossovers AS (
  SELECT eu.user_id, eu.first_assignment, 'control_crossover' AS population
  FROM experiment_users eu
  WHERE eu.variation = 'Control'
    AND eu.user_id IN (
      SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM analytics.stg.stg_segment__project_clip_play_clicked
      WHERE clip_type = 'clipTypeRawRecording' AND TIMESTAMP >= '2026-01-20 15:30:00.000'
    )
    AND eu.user_id IN (
      SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM analytics.stg.stg_segment__project_tab_navigated
      WHERE TAB = 'made_for_you_tab' AND TIMESTAMP >= '2026-01-20 15:30:00.000'
    )
),
-- Population 2: Treatment bouncers (MFY -> Recording tab within 60s)
treatment_first_mfy AS (
  SELECT
    eu.user_id,
    eu.first_assignment,
    MIN(tn.TIMESTAMP) AS first_mfy_ts
  FROM experiment_users eu
  JOIN analytics.stg.stg_segment__project_tab_navigated tn
    ON eu.user_id = tn.user_id
    AND tn.TIMESTAMP >= eu.first_assignment
    AND tn.TAB = 'made_for_you_tab'
  WHERE eu.variation = 'Treatment'
  GROUP BY eu.user_id, eu.first_assignment
),
treatment_bouncers AS (
  SELECT
    fm.user_id,
    fm.first_assignment,
    'treatment_bouncer' AS population
  FROM treatment_first_mfy fm
  JOIN analytics.stg.stg_segment__project_tab_navigated tn2
    ON fm.user_id = tn2.user_id
    AND tn2.TAB = 'recordings_tab'
    AND tn2.TIMESTAMP > fm.first_mfy_ts
    AND DATEDIFF('second', fm.first_mfy_ts, tn2.TIMESTAMP) <= 60
  GROUP BY fm.user_id, fm.first_assignment
),
-- Combined
both_populations AS (
  SELECT user_id, first_assignment, population FROM control_crossovers
  UNION ALL
  SELECT user_id, first_assignment, population FROM treatment_bouncers
),
-- Raw preview counts per user (0 bucket possible for treatment bouncers)
raw_preview_counts AS (
  SELECT
    bp.user_id,
    bp.population,
    bp.first_assignment,
    COALESCE(rpc.n_raw_previews, 0) AS n_raw_previews,
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(rpc.n_raw_previews, 0) = 0 THEN '0'
      WHEN rpc.n_raw_previews = 1 THEN '1x'
      WHEN rpc.n_raw_previews BETWEEN 2 AND 3 THEN '2-3x'
      ELSE '4+'
    END AS preview_bucket
  FROM both_populations bp
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) AS n_raw_previews
    FROM analytics.stg.stg_segment__project_clip_play_clicked
    WHERE clip_type = 'clipTypeRawRecording'
      AND TIMESTAMP >= '2026-01-20 15:30:00.000'
    GROUP BY user_id
  ) rpc ON bp.user_id = rpc.user_id
)
,
-- For treatment bouncers: find first recording_tab visit, then check for MFY return
bouncer_mfy_return AS (
  SELECT
    rpc.user_id,
    rpc.preview_bucket,
    rpc.n_raw_previews,
    -- Did they return to MFY tab after going to recordings?
    MAX(CASE WHEN tn.TAB = 'made_for_you_tab'
              AND tn.TIMESTAMP > (
                SELECT MIN(tn2.TIMESTAMP)
                FROM analytics.stg.stg_segment__project_tab_navigated tn2
                WHERE tn2.user_id = rpc.user_id
                  AND tn2.TAB = 'recordings_tab'
                  AND tn2.TIMESTAMP >= rpc.first_assignment
              )
         THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS returned_to_mfy
  FROM raw_preview_counts rpc
  LEFT JOIN analytics.stg.stg_segment__project_tab_navigated tn
    ON rpc.user_id = tn.user_id
    AND tn.TIMESTAMP >= rpc.first_assignment
  WHERE rpc.population = 'treatment_bouncer'
  GROUP BY rpc.user_id, rpc.preview_bucket, rpc.n_raw_previews
)
SELECT
  preview_bucket,
  COUNT(*) AS n_bouncers,
  SUM(returned_to_mfy) AS n_returned_to_mfy,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(returned_to_mfy) / COUNT(*), 2) AS return_to_mfy_pct,
  ROUND(AVG(n_raw_previews), 1) AS avg_raw_previews
FROM bouncer_mfy_return
GROUP BY preview_bucket
ORDER BY preview_bucket
business_question: Did exposing users to the MFY editing flow increase the share who return to MFY after their first MFY interaction, and how does initial preview activity relate to this retention?

WITH 
requests as (
    SELECT
        ai.timestamp,
        ai.id as request_id,
        ai.resource_id as user_id,
        ai.thread_id,
        ai.run_id,
        ai.request,
        case
            when m.product_type in ('Business', 'Self-Service') 
            then m.product_type
            
            when ai.timestamp
                between a.trial_started_at
                and least(a.trial_cancelled_at, a.trial_ended_at, a.trial_expired_at)
            then 'Trial'
            else 'Free'
        end as account_type,

    from analytics.stg.stg_eds__ai_agent_result ai
    left join ANALYTICS.FS.USERS u on ai.resource_id = u.user_id
    left join analytics.bi.daily_customer_mrr m on u.account_id = m.account_id and date(ai.timestamp) = m.pivot_day
    join analytics.fs.accounts a on u.account_id = a.account_id
    where 1=1
        and year >= 2025
        and timestamp > '2025-09-21 00:00:00.000'
        and domain = 'editor'
    qualify row_number() over(partition by ai.id order by timestamp desc) = 1 -- 7% of requests are duplicated rows
)

, clip_per_request as (
select 
    cc.request_id
    , cc.user_id
    , max_by(e.clip_id, e.timestamp) clip_id
    
from requests cc
join analytics.stg.stg_segment__clip_editor_opened e
    on cc.user_id = e.user_id
    and e.timestamp < cc.timestamp
group by 1,2
)

, clips_with_editor_coco_ind as (
select 
    c.clip_id
    , min_by(c.user_id, r.timestamp) as user_id
    , case when count(1) > 0 then True else False end as was_coco_request_sent
    , count(1) num_coco_requests
    , min(r.timestamp) first_coco_request_timestamp
    , max(r.timestamp) last_coco_request_timestamp
from requests r
join clip_per_request c on r.request_id = c.request_id
where c.clip_id is not null
group by 1
)

select * from clips_with_editor_coco_ind limit 100;

query_text:
WITH params AS (
    SELECT
        TO_DATE('2026-03-04') AS asof_day,
        DATEADD(DAY, -7, TO_DATE('2026-03-04')) AS wow_day
),
base AS (
    SELECT
        d.pivot_day,
        SUM(d.mrr) AS mrr,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.customer_group_status IN ('New', 'Reactivation') THEN d.delta_mrr ELSE 0 END) AS new_mrr,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.customer_group_status = 'New' THEN d.delta_mrr ELSE 0 END) AS new_to_business_mrr,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.customer_group_status = 'Expansion' THEN d.delta_mrr ELSE 0 END) AS expansion_mrr,
        ABS(SUM(CASE WHEN d.customer_group_status = 'Churn' THEN d.delta_mrr ELSE 0 END)) AS churned_mrr,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.customer_group_status = 'Reduction' THEN d.delta_mrr ELSE 0 END) AS reduction_mrr,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.customer_group_status <> 'No Change' THEN d.delta_mrr ELSE 0 END) AS net_new_mrr
    FROM ANALYTICS.BI.DAILY_CUSTOMER_MRR d
    JOIN params p
        ON d.pivot_day IN (p.asof_day, p.wow_day)
    WHERE d.is_latest_pivot_day_of_period = TRUE
    GROUP BY 1
),
calc AS (
    SELECT
        pivot_day,
        mrr,
        mrr * 12 AS arr,
        new_mrr,
        new_to_business_mrr,
        (expansion_mrr + reduction_mrr) AS net_expansion_mrr,
        churned_mrr,
        net_new_mrr
    FROM base
),
joined AS (
    SELECT
        p.asof_day,
        p.wow_day,
        c.*,
        w.arr AS wow_arr,
        w.mrr AS wow_mrr,
        w.new_mrr AS wow_new_mrr,
        w.new_to_business_mrr AS wow_new_to_business_mrr,
        w.net_expansion_mrr AS wow_net_expansion_mrr,
        w.churned_mrr AS wow_churned_mrr,
        w.net_new_mrr AS wow_net_new_mrr
    FROM params p
    LEFT JOIN calc c ON c.pivot_day = p.asof_day
    LEFT JOIN calc w ON w.pivot_day = p.wow_day
)
SELECT
    'ARR' AS metric,
    arr::NUMERIC(18, 2) AS value,
    wow_arr::NUMERIC(18, 2) AS wow_value,
    (arr - wow_arr)::NUMERIC(18, 2) AS wow_abs_change,
    (DIV0NULL(arr - wow_arr, wow_arr) * 100)::NUMERIC(18, 2) AS wow_pct_change
FROM joined

UNION ALL
SELECT
    'MRR' AS metric,
    mrr::NUMERIC(18, 2) AS value,
    wow_mrr::NUMERIC(18, 2) AS wow_value,
    (mrr - wow_mrr)::NUMERIC(18, 2) AS wow_abs_change,
    (DIV0NULL(mrr - wow_mrr, wow_mrr) * 100)::NUMERIC(18, 2) AS wow_pct_change
FROM joined

UNION ALL
SELECT
    'New MRR (New + Reactivation)' AS metric,
    new_mrr::NUMERIC(18, 2) AS value,
    wow_new_mrr::NUMERIC(18, 2) AS wow_value,
    (new_mrr - wow_new_mrr)::NUMERIC(18, 2) AS wow_abs_change,
    (DIV0NULL(new_mrr - wow_new_mrr, wow_new_mrr) * 100)::NUMERIC(18, 2) AS wow_pct_change
FROM joined

UNION ALL
SELECT
    'New to business MRR (Status=New)' AS metric,
    new_to_business_mrr::NUMERIC(18, 2) AS value,
    wow_new_to_business_mrr::NUMERIC(18, 2) AS wow_value,
    (new_to_business_mrr - wow_new_to_business_mrr)::NUMERIC(18, 2) AS wow_abs_change,
    (DIV0NULL(new_to_business_mrr - wow_new_to_business_mrr, wow_new_to_business_mrr) * 100)::NUMERIC(18, 2) AS wow_pct_change
FROM joined

UNION ALL
SELECT
    'Net expansion MRR (Expansion + Reduction)' AS metric,
    net_expansion_mrr::NUMERIC(18, 2) AS value,
    wow_net_expansion_mrr::NUMERIC(18, 2) AS wow_value,
    (net_expansion_mrr - wow_net_expansion_mrr)::NUMERIC(18, 2) AS wow_abs_change,
    (DIV0NULL(net_expansion_mrr - wow_net_expansion_mrr, wow_net_expansion_mrr) * 100)::NUMERIC(18, 2) AS wow_pct_change
FROM joined

UNION ALL
SELECT
    'Churned MRR (abs)' AS metric,
    churned_mrr::NUMERIC(18, 2) AS value,
    wow_churned_mrr::NUMERIC(18, 2) AS wow_value,
    (churned_mrr - wow_churned_mrr)::NUMERIC(18, 2) AS wow_abs_change,
    (DIV0NULL(churned_mrr - wow_churned_mrr, wow_churned_mrr) * 100)::NUMERIC(18, 2) AS wow_pct_change
FROM joined

UNION ALL
SELECT
    'Net New MRR (sum of deltas excl No Change)' AS metric,
    net_new_mrr::NUMERIC(18, 2) AS value,
    wow_net_new_mrr::NUMERIC(18, 2) AS wow_value,
    (net_new_mrr - wow_net_new_mrr)::NUMERIC(18, 2) AS wow_abs_change,
    (DIV0NULL(net_new_mrr - wow_net_new_mrr, wow_net_new_mrr) * 100)::NUMERIC(18, 2) AS wow_pct_change
FROM joined
ORDER BY metric;
business_question: How did ARR and MRR evolve over the last week, and what were the contributions from new, expansion, churn, reductions, and net new MRR?

query_text:
WITH 
reps AS (
    select 
        t.rep_id, 
        ANY_VALUE(o.email) AS rep_email,
        ANY_VALUE(t.rep_name) AS rep_name, 
        MAX_BY(t.team_lead, t.quota_start_date) AS team_lead,
        MAX_BY(t.sales_team, t.quota_start_date) AS sales_team,
        ANY_VALUE(t.director) AS director
    from ANALYTICS.STG.STG_GOOGLE_DRIVE__SALES_REPRESENTATIVE_TARGETS t
    left join ANALYTICS.STG.STG_HUBSPOT__OWNERS o
        ON t.rep_id = o.owner_id
    where department = 'Sales'
    GROUP BY rep_id
),

start_and_termination_dates AS (
    select 
        p.person_id,
        ANY_VALUE(p.full_name) AS full_name, 
        ANY_VALUE(p.email) AS email,
        ANY_VALUE(p.start_date) AS hiring_date,
        -- AE start date derived from work history
        MIN(IFF(w.job_title ILIKE '%account executive%', w.from_date, NULL)) AS start_date,
        -- Termination date derived from lifecycle history
        MAX(IFF(lc.status = 'terminated', lc.from_date, NULL)) AS termination_date
    from ANALYTICS.STG.STG_HIBOB__PEOPLE p
    LEFT JOIN ANALYTICS.STG.STG_HIBOB__WORK_HISTORY w
        ON p.person_id = w.person_id
    LEFT JOIN ANALYTICS.STG.STG_HIBOB__LIFECYCLE_HISTORY lc
        ON p.person_id = lc.person_id
    GROUP BY p.person_id
)

select 
    r.*,
    d.hiring_date,
    d.start_date,
    -- Guaranteed date = 3 months after start date
    DATEADD(month, 3, d.start_date) AS guaranteed_date,
    d.termination_date
FROM reps r
LEFT JOIN start_and_termination_dates d
    ON r.rep_email = d.email
    
;
business_question: What is the onboarding and tenure timeline for each sales rep, including hiring date, account-executive start, termination, and their 3-month guaranteed date?

query_text:
select 
    -- upload_page_component_ab_test_variation, 
    count(distinct anonymous_id) as guests
    -- , count(distinct case when guest_page_visited_at is not null then anonymous_id end) guest_page
    , count(distinct case when already_signed_up = false then anonymous_id end) as non_signed_up_already
    , count(distinct case when already_signed_up = false and is_host_business = false then anonymous_id end) as host_not_business
    --, count(distinct case when already_signed_up = false and is_host_business = false and end_call_at is not null then anonymous_id end) as reached_end_call
    , count(distinct case when end_call_at is not null then anonymous_id end) as reached_end_call
    , count(distinct case when already_signed_up = false and is_host_business = false and end_call_at is not null and still_end_call_at is not null then anonymous_id end) as still_end_call
    , count(distinct case when already_signed_up = false and is_host_business = false and end_call_at is not null and still_end_call_at is not null and ineligible_at is null then anonymous_id end) as eligible
    , count(distinct case when already_signed_up = false and is_host_business = false and end_call_at is not null and still_end_call_at is not null and ineligible_at is null and guest_page_visited_at is not null then anonymous_id end) as visited_guest_page
    , count(distinct case when guest_page_visited_at is not null then anonymous_id end) as visited_guest_page_2

    , count(distinct case 
                        when already_signed_up = false 
                        -- and end_call_at is not null 
                        -- and still_end_call_at is not null 
                        and guest_page_visited_at is not null 
                        and last_trial_started_at < joined_studio_at + interval '30 days'
                        then anonymous_id end) as trial_30d_guest_page
    , round(trial_30d_guest_page * 1.85 * 2 * 1.6, 0) as expected_trial_180d_guest_page
     , count(distinct case 
                        when already_signed_up = false 
                        and last_trial_started_at < joined_studio_at + interval '30 days'
                        then anonymous_id end) * 2 as trial_180

                        
    -- , count(distinct case when already_signed_up = false 
    --             and first_trial_started_at < joined_studio_at + interval '30 days'
    --             then anonymous_id end) trial_30d

from analytics.ba.guest_page_funnel
where 1=1
  and joined_studio_at between '2025-11-10' and '2025-12-10'
   -- and rec_stopped_at is not null
  -- and internal_user_ind = False
