query_text:
SELECT
    months_since_becoming_business AS months_since_business_upgrade,
    CASE 
    WHEN latest_mrr BETWEEN 0 AND 19.99999 THEN '[ 0-20 )'
    WHEN latest_mrr BETWEEN 20 AND 29.9999 THEN '[ 20-30 )'
    WHEN latest_mrr BETWEEN 30 AND 499.9999 THEN '[ 30-500 )'
    WHEN latest_mrr BETWEEN 500 AND 999.9999 THEN '[ 500-1000 )'
    WHEN latest_mrr BETWEEN 1000 AND 1499.9999 THEN '[ 1000-1500 )'
    WHEN latest_mrr BETWEEN 1500 AND 1999.9999 THEN '[ 1500-2000 )'
    WHEN latest_mrr BETWEEN 2000 AND 2499.9999 THEN '[ 2000-2500 )'
    WHEN latest_mrr BETWEEN 2500 AND 2999.9999 THEN '[ 2500-3000 )'
    WHEN latest_mrr BETWEEN 3000 AND 3499.9999 THEN '[ 3000-2500 )'
    WHEN latest_mrr BETWEEN 3500 AND 3999.9999 THEN '[ 3500-4000 )'
    WHEN latest_mrr BETWEEN 4000 AND 4499.9999 THEN '[ 4000-4500 )'
    WHEN latest_mrr BETWEEN 4500 AND 4999.9999 THEN '[ 4500-5000 )'
    WHEN latest_mrr >= 5000 THEN  '[ 5000 + ]'
    END AS MRR_BUCKET,
    -- DIV0(SUM(self_service_mrr) , SUM(initial_self_service_mrr)),
    DIV0(SUM(business_mrr) , SUM(initial_business_mrr)) AS business_nrr,
    DIV0(SUM(capped_business_mrr) , SUM(initial_business_mrr)) AS business_grr,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN customer_group_product_type IN ('Business', 'Self-Service-to-Business') THEN customer_group_id END) AS business_cohort_size,

    -- DIV0(SUM(company_mrr) , SUM(initial_company_mrr)),
    
FROM analytics.bi.acq_period_monthly_grr_nrr_new
WHERE months_since_business_upgrade IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 1,2
ORDER BY 1,2;
business_question: How does business MRR performance (NRR/GRR) and cohort size vary across months since customers upgraded to business?

query_text:
WITH cohort AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT account_id
    FROM ANALYTICS.bi.monthly_customer_mrr
    WHERE period = '2025-07-01'
      AND product_group != 'Mobile Plus'
      AND product_type = 'Self-Service'
      AND recurring_interval = 'month'
),

account_customers_monthly AS (
    SELECT
        mrr.account_id,
        DATE_TRUNC('month', mrr.pivot_day) AS month,
        mrr.customer_id,
        BOOLOR_AGG(mrr.status_wo_early_cancellations = 'Churn') AS customer_churned
    FROM ANALYTICS.bi.daily_customer_mrr mrr
    JOIN cohort c ON mrr.account_id = c.account_id
    WHERE mrr.pivot_day >= '2025-07-01'
    GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
),

account_monthly AS (
    SELECT
        account_id,
        month,
        COUNT(*) AS n_customers,
        SUM(CASE WHEN customer_churned THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS n_churned_customers,
        BOOLOR_AGG(customer_churned) AS any_churned,
        BOOLAND_AGG(customer_churned) AS all_churned
    FROM account_customers_monthly
    GROUP BY 1, 2
)

SELECT
    month,
    COUNT(DISTINCT account_id) AS total_accounts,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN n_customers > 1 THEN account_id END) AS multi_customer_accounts,
    SUM(CASE WHEN any_churned THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS churned_any,
    SUM(CASE WHEN all_churned THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS churned_all,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN any_churned THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS churn_pct_any,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN all_churned THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS churn_pct_all
FROM account_monthly
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1
business_question: What is the monthly churn rate for Self-Service accounts (excluding Mobile Plus), and how does it differ between any churned vs. all churned across accounts?
Are the total clip counts in the raw MongoDB source aligned with the transformed clip dimension, indicating data consistency across layers?

query_text:
WITH first_assignment AS (
    SELECT
        ea.user_id,
        MIN_BY(ea.variation, ea.timestamp)   AS variation,
        MIN_BY(ea.device_type, ea.timestamp) AS device_type,
        MIN(ea.timestamp)                    AS first_assignment
    FROM analytics.stg.stg_segment__experiment_assignment ea
    INNER JOIN analytics.fs.users u ON ea.user_id = u.user_id
    WHERE ea.experiment = 'proTrial'
      AND ea.timestamp  >= '2024-10-27 15:00:00.000 +0000'
      --AND u.email NOT IN ('yoknehesto@gufum.com','yetom70818@digopm.com','zurkosakko@gufum.com','i42pt@livinitlarge.net','dze3v@livinitlarge.net','nm7wn@livinitlarge.net','tgad1@livinitlarge.net')
      AND NOT (u.email LIKE '%rsfmbox.com')
      AND COALESCE(NOT u.is_internal_user, TRUE)
    GROUP BY ea.user_id
),

assigned AS (
    SELECT
        fa.user_id,
        fa.variation,
        fa.device_type,
        fa.first_assignment                                                              AS assignment_timestamp,
        DATEDIFF('second', '2024-10-27 15:00:00.000 +0000', fa.first_assignment) / (60*60*24)      AS days_from_experiment_start,
        -- visitor properties from marketing funnel analysis
        mf.utm_medium,
        mf.utm_source,
        mf.utm_campaign,
        mf.page_name                                                                     AS first_page_name,
        mf.channel_group
    FROM first_assignment fa
    LEFT JOIN analytics.bi.marketing_funnel_analysis mf ON fa.user_id = mf.user_id
),

purchase AS (
    SELECT
        sc.user_id,
        sc.timestamp       AS purchase_timestamp,
        m.pivot_day        AS mrr_purchase_date,
        m.account_id,
        m.mrr,
        m.recurring_interval AS interval,
        m.product_group,
        m.product_name
    FROM analytics.stg.stg_segment__subscription_created sc
    INNER JOIN analytics.bi.daily_customer_mrr m
        ON  sc.account_id = m.account_id
        AND m.pivot_day BETWEEN sc.timestamp::DATE AND DATEADD('DAY', 30, sc.timestamp::DATE)
    WHERE m.status = 'New'
      AND m.product_group IN ('Pro plan','Standard plan','Pro plan + Live Studio','Standard plan + Live Studio')
    QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY sc.user_id ORDER BY sc.timestamp DESC) = 1
),

trial_started AS (
    SELECT
        user_id,
        timestamp                                                                    AS trial_started_timestamp,
        IFF(DIV0(amount, 100) = 288, 24, DIV0(amount, 100))                         AS trial_mrr,
        IFF(DIV0(amount, 100) = 288, 'year', 'month')                               AS trial_interval
    FROM analytics.stg.stg_segment__account_trial_started
    WHERE trial_duration = 14
    QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY timestamp) = 1
),

trial_canceled AS (
    SELECT
        user_id,
        timestamp AS trial_canceled_timestamp
    FROM analytics.stg.stg_segment__account_trial_cancelled
    QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY timestamp) = 1
),

joined AS (
    SELECT
        a.user_id,
        a.variation,
        a.device_type,
        a.assignment_timestamp,
        a.days_from_experiment_start,
        a.utm_medium,
        a.utm_source,
        a.utm_campaign,
        a.first_page_name,
        a.channel_group,

        p.purchase_timestamp,
        p.mrr_purchase_date,
        p.mrr,
        p.interval,
        p.product_group,
        p.product_name,

        ts.trial_started_timestamp,
        ts.trial_mrr,
        ts.trial_interval,
        tc.trial_canceled_timestamp,

        COALESCE(ts.trial_started_timestamp::DATE < p.mrr_purchase_date, FALSE)                                         AS successful_trial,
        COALESCE(ts.trial_started_timestamp < tc.trial_canceled_timestamp AND p.purchase_timestamp IS NULL, FALSE)      AS canceled_trial,
        COALESCE(ts.trial_started_timestamp IS NOT NULL AND p.purchase_timestamp IS NULL
                 AND tc.trial_canceled_timestamp IS NULL, FALSE)                                                         AS failed_payments,

        DATEDIFF('second', a.assignment_timestamp,
                 LEAST_IGNORE_NULLS(ts.trial_started_timestamp, p.purchase_timestamp)) / (60*60*24)
                                                                                                                         AS days_assignment_to_conversion,
        DATEDIFF('second', ts.trial_started_timestamp, p.purchase_timestamp) / (60*60*24)                               AS days_trial_to_purchase

    FROM assigned a
    LEFT JOIN purchase p
        ON  a.user_id = p.user_id
        AND a.assignment_timestamp < p.purchase_timestamp
    LEFT JOIN trial_started ts
        ON  a.user_id = ts.user_id
        AND a.assignment_timestamp < ts.trial_started_timestamp
    LEFT JOIN trial_canceled tc
        ON  a.user_id = tc.user_id
        AND ts.trial_started_timestamp < tc.trial_canceled_timestamp
    WHERE COALESCE(NOT (ts.trial_started_timestamp BETWEEN '2024-11-06 11:59:00.000'
                        AND '2024-11-06 22:42:00.000'), TRUE)
      AND COALESCE(NOT (p.purchase_timestamp BETWEEN '2024-11-06 11:59:00.000'
                        AND '2024-11-06 22:42:00.000'), TRUE)
)

SELECT *
FROM joined
WHERE variation IN ('Control', 'Treatment')
business_question: Did the ProTrial experiment increase trial-to-paid conversions vs control, and how did time-to-conversion vary by variation?

query_text:
WITH 
reps AS (
    select 
        t.rep_id, 
        ANY_VALUE(o.email) AS rep_email,
        ANY_VALUE(t.rep_name) AS rep_name, 
        MAX_BY(t.team_lead, t.quota_start_date) AS team_lead,
        MAX_BY(t.sales_team, t.quota_start_date) AS sales_team,
        MAX_BY(t.region, t.quota_start_date) AS target_market,
        ANY_VALUE(t.director) AS director
    from ANALYTICS.STG.STG_GOOGLE_DRIVE__SALES_REPRESENTATIVE_TARGETS t
    left join ANALYTICS.STG.STG_HUBSPOT__OWNERS o
        ON t.rep_id = o.owner_id
    WHERE department = 'Sales' 
    -- change to the quota_start_date of the next Q
    AND t.quota_start_date < '2026-02-01'
    GROUP BY rep_id
),

start_and_termination_dates AS (
    select 
        p.person_id,
        ANY_VALUE(p.full_name) AS full_name, 
        ANY_VALUE(p.email) AS email,
        ANY_VALUE(p.location) AS location,
        ANY_VALUE(p.start_date) AS hiring_date,
        -- AE start date derived from work history
        MIN(IFF(w.job_title ILIKE '%account executive%', w.from_date, NULL)) AS start_date,
        -- Termination date derived from lifecycle history
        MAX(IFF(lc.status = 'terminated', lc.from_date, NULL)) AS termination_date
    from ANALYTICS.STG.STG_HIBOB__PEOPLE p
    LEFT JOIN ANALYTICS.STG.STG_HIBOB__WORK_HISTORY w
        ON p.person_id = w.person_id
    LEFT JOIN ANALYTICS.STG.STG_HIBOB__LIFECYCLE_HISTORY lc
        ON p.person_id = lc.person_id
    GROUP BY p.person_id
),

achievements AS (
    SELECT
        deal_closed_quarter_start_date,
        owner_id,
        owner_name,
        quarterly_mrr_quota AS mrr_quarterly_target,
        yearly_mrr_quota AS mrr_annual_target,
        attained_mrr_quarter,
        attained_mrr_year,
        attained_mrr_quarter/mrr_quarterly_target AS quarterly_attainment_pct,
        attained_mrr_year/mrr_annual_target AS yearly_attainment_pct, -- what to do with annual reps?
        CASE WHEN quarterly_attainment_pct > 1
            THEN attained_mrr_quarter - mrr_quarterly_target
            ELSE 0
        END as quarterly_overachievement,
        CASE WHEN yearly_attainment_pct > 1
            THEN attained_mrr_year - mrr_annual_target
            ELSE 0
        END as yearly_overachievement,
        net_eligible_mrr_quarter 
        + (quarterly_overachievement * overachievement_quarterly_multiplier) as total_mrr_for_quarterly_payout,
        net_eligible_mrr_quarter 
        + ( yearly_overachievement * overachievement_quarterly_multiplier) as total_mrr_for_yearly_payout,
        total_mrr_for_quarterly_payout/mrr_quarterly_target AS quarterly_payout_pct,
        total_mrr_for_yearly_payout/mrr_annual_target AS yearly_payout_pct,
    FROM ANALYTICS.BI.SALES_REPRESENTATIVE_TARGETS
    WHERE deal_closed_quarter_start_date = '2025-11-01'
)

select
    a.deal_closed_quarter_start_date,
    r.*,
    d.location,
    d.hiring_date,
    d.start_date,
    -- Guaranteed date = 3 months after start date
    DATEADD(month, 3, d.start_date) AS guaranteed_date,
    d.termination_date,
    a.mrr_quarterly_target,
    a.mrr_quarterly_target * 12 AS arr_quarterly_target,
    a.mrr_annual_target,
    a.mrr_annual_target * 12 AS arr_annual_target,
    a.attained_mrr_quarter AS won_mrr,
    a.attained_mrr_quarter * 12 AS won_arr,
    a.quarterly_attainment_pct,
    a.yearly_attainment_pct, -- what to do with quarterly reps?
    a.quarterly_payout_pct,
    a.yearly_payout_pct -- what to do with quarterly reps?
FROM reps r
LEFT JOIN start_and_termination_dates d
    ON r.rep_email = d.email
LEFT JOIN achievements a
    ON r.rep_id = a.owner_id
    
;
business_question: What is each sales rep's attainment vs quarterly/annual targets and projected payout for the latest closed quarter?

query_text:
WITH email_marketing_raw as (

    SELECT
    e.email_campaign_id,
    us.account_id,
    e.first_delivered_at::DATE as first_delivered_date,
    e.first_opened_at::DATE as first_opened_date

    FROM analytics.bi.email_campaign_user_engagement e
    LEFT JOIN analytics.trf.core__user_to_account_mapping us
        ON e.user_id = us.user_id
        AND first_sent_at BETWEEN us.valid_from AND valid_to
        AND first_delivered_at >= '2024-02-01'

    ),

    daily_deliveries as (
    SELECT 
    account_id,
    first_delivered_date,
    COUNT(*) as delivery_count 
    FROM email_marketing_raw 
    WHERE first_delivered_date IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY 1, 2
    ),

    daily_opens as (
    SELECT 
    account_id,
    first_opened_date,
    COUNT(*) as open_count 
    FROM email_marketing_raw 
    WHERE first_opened_date IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY 1, 2
    ),

    account_active_days as (
    SELECT 
    date_day as pivot_day,
    account_id,
    is_active
    FROM analytics.bi.daily_users_product_activity   
    WHERE product_type IN ('Self-Service')
        AND is_active
        AND date_day>= '2024-02-01'
    ),

    final_cte as (  
    SELECT 
    m.pivot_day,
    m.customer_id,
    m.state,status,
    m.status_wo_early_cancellations,

    -- If I am Active Today, but Churn Tomorrow, then TODAY is my "Cancellation Day".
    IFF(
        m.status_wo_early_cancellations <> 'Churn' -- Currently Active
        AND 
        LEAD(m.status_wo_early_cancellations) OVER (
            PARTITION BY m.account_id 
            ORDER BY m.pivot_day
        ) = 'Churn', -- Becomes Churn Tomorrow
        TRUE, 
        FALSE
    ) AS is_cancelled_today,

    m.recurring_interval,
    m.email,
    -- m.acquisition_date,
    -- DATEDIFF ('day',acquisition_date,current_date ())/ 30 < 3 as first_three_month_customer,
    de.delivery_count IS NOT NULL as email_deliverd,
    o.open_count IS NOT NULL as email_opened,
    (COALESCE(de.delivery_count, 0) > 0) AS is_emailed_today,

    -- FLAG 2: "48 Hour Window" (Window Function here, safe inside CTE)
    (COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(de.delivery_count, 0)) OVER (
        PARTITION BY m.account_id 
        ORDER BY m.pivot_day 
        ROWS BETWEEN 1 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
        ), 0) > 0) AS is_emailed_last_48h,    

    --- flaging delivered within 48 hours -- 
    COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(de.delivery_count, 0)) OVER (
        PARTITION BY m.account_id 
        ORDER BY m.pivot_day 
        ROWS BETWEEN 1 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
        ), 0) > 0 as delivered_last_48h,

    (COALESCE(SUM(IFF(a.is_active, 1, 0)) OVER (
        PARTITION BY m.account_id 
        ORDER BY m.pivot_day 
        ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
        ), 0) > 0) AS is_active_last_30d,

   --- flaging opened within 48 hours -- 

    -- COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(o.open_count, 0)) OVER (
    --     PARTITION BY m.account_id 
    --     ORDER BY m.pivot_day 
    --     ROWS BETWEEN 1 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
    --     ), 0) > 0 as opened_last_48h,

    -- SUM(COALESCE(de.delivery_count, 0)) OVER (
    --     PARTITION BY m.account_id 
    --     ORDER BY m.pivot_day 
    --     ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
    --     ) as del_30d,

    -- SUM(COALESCE(o.open_count, 0)) OVER (
    --     PARTITION BY m.account_id 
    --     ORDER BY m.pivot_day 
    --     ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
    --     ) as open_30d

FROM analytics.bi.daily_customer_mrr m
LEFT JOIN daily_deliveries de
    ON m.account_id = de.account_id
    AND m.pivot_day = de.first_delivered_date
    -- DATEADD ('day',-1,de.first_delivered_date)
LEFT JOIN daily_opens o
    ON m.account_id = o.account_id
    AND m.pivot_day = o.first_opened_date
    -- DATEADD ('day',-1,o.first_opened_date)
LEFT JOIN account_active_days a
    ON m.pivot_day = a.pivot_day
    AND m.account_id = a.account_id

WHERE m.product_type IN ('Self-Service')
    AND m.pivot_day >= '2024-02-01'
    -- AND m.recurring_interval IN ('month')

)

SELECT *
FROM final_cte
WHERE TRUE
;
business_question: What is the daily impact of email marketing on customer engagement and subsequent churn/retention for Self-Service customers?

query_text:
with monthly_mrr as(
select *, 
    case when product_group like 'Pro %' then 'Pro Plan'
        when  product_group like 'Standard %' then 'Standard Plan'
        when  product_group like 'Studio%' then 'Studio Plan'
        when  product_group like 'Agency %' then 'Agency Plan'
        when  product_group like 'Enterprise %' then 'Enterprise Plan'
        when  product_group like 'Accelerator %' then 'Accelerator Plan'
    else product_group end as product,
    lag(product_group) over (partition by customer_id order by period) prev_product, product_group,
    lag(product_group) over (partition by customer_id order by period) = product_group is_same_product_group,
    lag(product) over (partition by customer_id order by period) = product is_same_product,
    lag(recurring_interval) over (partition by customer_id order by period) = recurring_interval is_same_recurring_interval,
    coalesce(base_mrr, 0) - coalesce(lag(base_mrr) over (partition by customer_id order by period), 0) as delta_base_mrr,
    coalesce(addons_mrr, 0) - coalesce(lag(addons_mrr) over (partition by customer_id order by period), 0) as delta_addons_mrr,
     CASE WHEN is_same_product_group and NOT has_addons AND is_same_recurring_interval THEN 'Terms Changed'
            WHEN is_same_product_group and NOT has_addons AND NOT is_same_recurring_interval THEN 'Interval Changed' 
            WHEN NOT is_same_product_group  and  is_same_product  AND not has_addons THEN 'Product Updated' 
            WHEN NOT is_same_product_group AND not has_addons THEN 'Product Changed' 
            WHEN has_addons THEN 'Addons'
            end as reason,
from  analytics.bi.monthly_customer_mrr
where product_group is not null 
 and period between  dateadd('month', -16 ,current_date -1) and current_date -1 
)
select *
from monthly_mrr where reason='Product Updated'
business_question: What share of customers changed their plan (without addons) in the last 16 months, and how did their base and addons MRR evolve?

query_text: WITH old AS ( SELECT take_id, was_exported_to_premiere FROM analytics.mrt.dim_takes ), new AS ( SELECT t.take_id, COALESCE(f.was_exported_to_premiere, FALSE) AS was_exported_to_premiere FROM analytics.mrt.fact_takes t LEFT JOIN analytics.mrt.fact_take_event_flags f ON t.take_id = f.take_id ) SELECT CASE WHEN old.take_id IS NOT NULL AND new.take_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'both' WHEN old.take_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'only_old' ELSE 'only_new' END AS presence, SUM(CASE WHEN old.was_exported_to_premiere THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS old_premiere_count, SUM(CASE WHEN new.was_exported_to_premiere THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS new_premiere_count, COUNT(*) AS total_takes FROM old FULL OUTER JOIN new ON old.take_id = new.take_id WHERE COALESCE(old.was_exported_to_premiere, FALSE) OR COALESCE(new.was_exported_to_premiere, FALSE) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

query_text:
WITH daily_metrics AS (
    SELECT
        pivot_day,
        SUM(mrr) AS mrr,
        SUM(mrr) * 12 AS arr,
        SUM(CASE WHEN customer_group_status IN ('New', 'Reactivation') THEN delta_mrr ELSE 0 END) AS new_mrr,
        SUM(CASE WHEN customer_group_status = 'New-to-Business' THEN delta_mrr ELSE 0 END) AS new_to_business_mrr,
        SUM(CASE WHEN customer_group_status IN ('Expansion', 'Reduction') THEN delta_mrr ELSE 0 END) AS net_expansion_mrr,
        SUM(CASE WHEN customer_group_status = 'Churn' THEN delta_mrr ELSE 0 END) AS churned_mrr,
        SUM(CASE WHEN customer_group_status <> 'No Change' THEN delta_mrr ELSE 0 END) AS net_new_mrr
    FROM ANALYTICS.BI.DAILY_CUSTOMER_MRR
    WHERE pivot_day IN ('2026-03-04', DATEADD(DAY, -7, '2026-03-04'::DATE))
    GROUP BY pivot_day
),
comp AS (
    SELECT
        curr.pivot_day AS current_day,
        prev.pivot_day AS wow_day,
        ROUND(curr.arr, 2) AS arr,
        ROUND(prev.arr, 2) AS arr_wow,
        ROUND(curr.arr - prev.arr, 2) AS arr_wow_delta,
        ROUND(DIV0((curr.arr - prev.arr), ABS(prev.arr)) * 100, 2) AS arr_wow_pct,
        ROUND(curr.mrr, 2) AS mrr,
        ROUND(prev.mrr, 2) AS mrr_wow,
        ROUND(curr.mrr - prev.mrr, 2) AS mrr_wow_delta,
        ROUND(DIV0((curr.mrr - prev.mrr), ABS(prev.mrr)) * 100, 2) AS mrr_wow_pct,
        ROUND(curr.new_mrr, 2) AS new_mrr,
        ROUND(prev.new_mrr, 2) AS new_mrr_wow,
        ROUND(curr.new_mrr - prev.new_mrr, 2) AS new_mrr_wow_delta,
        ROUND(DIV0((curr.new_mrr - prev.new_mrr), ABS(prev.new_mrr)) * 100, 2) AS new_mrr_wow_pct,
        ROUND(curr.new_to_business_mrr, 2) AS new_to_business_mrr,
        ROUND(prev.new_to_business_mrr, 2) AS new_to_business_mrr_wow,
        ROUND(curr.new_to_business_mrr - prev.new_to_business_mrr, 2) AS new_to_business_mrr_wow_delta,
        ROUND(DIV0((curr.new_to_business_mrr - prev.new_to_business_mrr), ABS(prev.new_to_business_mrr)) * 100, 2) AS new_to_business_mrr_wow_pct,
        ROUND(curr.net_expansion_mrr, 2) AS net_expansion_mrr,
        ROUND(prev.net_expansion_mrr, 2) AS net_expansion_mrr_wow,
        ROUND(curr.net_expansion_mrr - prev.net_expansion_mrr, 2) AS net_expansion_mrr_wow_delta,
        ROUND(DIV0((curr.net_expansion_mrr - prev.net_expansion_mrr), ABS(prev.net_expansion_mrr)) * 100, 2) AS net_expansion_mrr_wow_pct,
        ROUND(curr.churned_mrr, 2) AS churned_mrr,
        ROUND(prev.churned_mrr, 2) AS churned_mrr_wow,
        ROUND(curr.churned_mrr - prev.churned_mrr, 2) AS churned_mrr_wow_delta,
        ROUND(DIV0((curr.churned_mrr - prev.churned_mrr), ABS(prev.churned_mrr)) * 100, 2) AS churned_mrr_wow_pct,
        ROUND(curr.net_new_mrr, 2) AS net_new_mrr,
        ROUND(prev.net_new_mrr, 2) AS net_new_mrr_wow,
        ROUND(curr.net_new_mrr - prev.net_new_mrr, 2) AS net_new_mrr_wow_delta,
        ROUND(DIV0((curr.net_new_mrr - prev.net_new_mrr), ABS(prev.net_new_mrr)) * 100, 2) AS net_new_mrr_wow_pct
    FROM daily_metrics curr
    JOIN daily_metrics prev
      ON curr.pivot_day = '2026-03-04'::DATE
     AND prev.pivot_day = DATEADD(DAY, -7, '2026-03-04'::DATE)
)
SELECT * FROM comp;
business_question: What is the week-over-week change in ARR and MRR, and how do the subcomponents (new, new-to-business, expansions, churn) drive the delta?

query_text:
WITH first_assignment AS (
    SELECT
      user_id,
      MIN_BY(variation, TIMESTAMP) AS variation,
      MIN(TIMESTAMP) AS first_assignment
    FROM analytics.stg.stg_segment__experiment_assignment
    WHERE experiment = 'projectPageDefaultTabTest'
      AND TIMESTAMP >= '2025-09-17 09:00:00.000'
    GROUP BY user_id
  )
  SELECT
    ea.variation,
    COUNT(*) AS n_clean_users
  FROM first_assignment ea
  JOIN analytics.fs.users us ON ea.user_id = us.user_id
  LEFT JOIN analytics.stg.stg_segment__user_signed_up u ON ea.user_id = u.user_id
  WHERE ea.user_id NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM analytics.stg.stg_mongo__users WHERE is_internal_user
  )
  AND (u.platform <> 'spotify' OR u.platform IS NULL)
  AND us.created_at >= '2025-09-17 09:00:00.000'
  AND us.created_at NOT BETWEEN '2025-10-19 11:41:21.000' AND '2025-11-16 10:00:00.000'
  AND ea.first_assignment NOT BETWEEN '2025-10-19 11:41:21.000' AND '2025-11-16 10:00:00.000'
  GROUP BY ea.variation
  ORDER BY ea.variation

query_text:
WITH daily_path_share AS (
    SELECT
        DATE_TRUNC('day', f.timestamp) AS day,
        COALESCE(p.standardized_path, f.standardized_path) AS standardized_path,
        COUNT(*) AS visits,
        RATIO_TO_REPORT(COUNT(*)) OVER (
            PARTITION BY DATE_TRUNC('day', f.timestamp)
        ) AS share
    FROM analytics.mrt.fact_visits f
    LEFT JOIN analytics.mrt.dim_page_paths p
        ON f.standardized_path = p.standardized_path
    WHERE f.timestamp >= '2025-12-22'::DATE
      AND f.timestamp <  '2025-12-30'::DATE
    GROUP BY 1,2
),

picked_days AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM daily_path_share
    WHERE day IN ('2025-12-22'::DATE, '2025-12-29'::DATE)
),

pivoted AS (
    SELECT
        standardized_path,

        MAX(CASE WHEN day = '2025-12-22'::DATE THEN visits END) AS visits_2025_12_22,
        MAX(CASE WHEN day = '2025-12-29'::DATE THEN visits END) AS visits_2025_12_29,

        MAX(CASE WHEN day = '2025-12-22'::DATE THEN share END)  AS share_2025_12_22,
        MAX(CASE WHEN day = '2025-12-29'::DATE THEN share END)  AS share_2025_12_29
    FROM picked_days
    GROUP BY 1
),

diffs AS (
    SELECT
        standardized_path,
        visits_2025_12_22,
        visits_2025_12_29,
        share_2025_12_22,
        share_2025_12_29,
        share_2025_12_29 - share_2025_12_22 AS delta,
        ABS(share_2025_12_29 - share_2025_12_22) AS abs_delta
    FROM pivoted
    WHERE share_2025_12_22 IS NOT NULL
      AND share_2025_12_29 IS NOT NULL
)

SELECT *
FROM diffs
ORDER BY abs_delta DESC
LIMIT 50;
business_question: Which product/navigation paths gained or lost the most share of daily visits between the two selected days?

query_text:
WITH exported_clips AS (
    SELECT
        clip_id,
        MIN(timestamp) AS first_export_ts
    FROM analytics.trf.int_segment__clip_events
    WHERE event_name IN ('clip_file_export_initiated', 'clip_export_clicked', 'clip_export_initiated')
      AND clip_id IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY 1
),

total_exported AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM exported_clips
),

post_export_editing AS (
    SELECT
        ex.clip_id,
        BOOLOR_AGG(e.event_name IN ('clip_timeline_trimmed', 'clip_timeline_split_clicked', 'clip_transcript_delete_clicked', 'clip_set_pace_apply_clicked', 'clip_crop_applied', 'clip_captions_change_applied', 'clip_media_added_to_edit', 'clip_transcript_correct_clicked', 'clip_section_dropped', 'clip_edit_added')) AS was_re_edited,
        BOOLOR_AGG(e.event_name IN ('clip_file_export_initiated', 'clip_export_clicked', 'clip_export_initiated') AND e.timestamp > DATEADD('minute', 5, ex.first_export_ts)) AS was_re_exported,
        BOOLOR_AGG(e.event_name = 'clip_first_edited' AND e.timestamp > ex.first_export_ts) AS had_first_edited_after_export
    FROM exported_clips ex
    INNER JOIN analytics.trf.int_segment__clip_events e
        ON ex.clip_id = e.clip_id
        AND e.timestamp > DATEADD('minute', 5, ex.first_export_ts)
        AND e._dbt_source_schema = 'WEB'
    GROUP BY 1
)

SELECT
    t.total AS total_exported_clips,
    COUNT_IF(p.was_re_edited) AS clips_re_edited_after_export,
    ROUND(100.0 * clips_re_edited_after_export / t.total, 2) AS pct_re_edited,
    COUNT_IF(p.was_re_exported) AS clips_re_exported,
    ROUND(100.0 * clips_re_exported / t.total, 2) AS pct_re_exported,
    COUNT_IF(p.was_re_edited AND p.was_re_exported) AS clips_re_edited_and_re_exported,
    COUNT_IF(p.had_first_edited_after_export) AS clips_first_edited_after_export
FROM post_export_editing p
CROSS JOIN total_exported t
GROUP BY t.total
business_question: What fraction of exported clips are edited after export, re-exported, or edited for the first time after export, and what is the overall rate?

query_text: WITH raw AS ( SELECT take_id, BOOLOR_AGG(event_name IN ('clip_generate_clicked', 'clip_magic_clip_generate_clicked')) AS has_clicked_to_generate_clips, BOOLOR_AGG(event_name = 'take_show_notes_clicked_generate') AS has_clicked_to_generate_show_notes, BOOLOR_AGG(event_name = 'timeline_export_success') AS timeline_was_exported FROM ANALYTICS.TRF.INT_SEGMENT__TAKE_EVENTS WHERE take_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY take_id ), flags AS ( SELECT take_id, has_clicked_to_generate_clips, has_clicked_to_generate_show_notes, timeline_was_exported FROM ANALYTICS.TRF.INT_SEGMENT__TAKE_EVENT_FLAGS ) SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_takes, SUM(IFF(r.has_clicked_to_generate_clips = f.has_clicked_to_generate_clips, 1, 0)) AS match_gen_clips, SUM(IFF(r.has_clicked_to_generate_show_notes = f.has_clicked_to_generate_show_notes, 1, 0)) AS match_gen_notes, SUM(IFF(r.timeline_was_exported = f.timeline_was_exported, 1, 0)) AS match_exported, SUM(IFF(r.has_clicked_to_generate_clips != f.has_clicked_to_generate_clips, 1, 0)) AS mismatch_gen_clips, SUM(IFF(r.has_clicked_to_generate_show_notes != f.has_clicked_to_generate_show_notes, 1, 0)) AS mismatch_gen_notes, SUM(IFF(r.timeline_was_exported != f.timeline_was_exported, 1, 0)) AS mismatch_exported FROM raw r JOIN flags f ON r.take_id = f.take_id

query_text:
WITH paying_users AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT user_id
    FROM ANALYTICS.TRF.CORE__USER_TO_PRODUCT_MAPPING_UNIFIED
    WHERE is_paid_product = TRUE 
      AND is_current = TRUE
),

eligible_projects AS (
    SELECT
        p.project_id,
        p.created_by_user_id,
        p.created_at AS project_created_at
    FROM ANALYTICS.FS.PROJECTS p
    INNER JOIN paying_users pu ON p.created_by_user_id = pu.user_id
    WHERE p.created_at >= '2025-10-01'
),

-- Magic clips with source take duration
-- Note: 99.98% of magic clips have exactly 1 take, but we use QUALIFY to handle the 0.02% with multiple takes
-- We pick the take with maximum duration when multiple takes exist
magic_clips_with_duration AS (
    SELECT
        c.clip_id,
        c.project_id,
        c.created_by_user_id,
        c.created_at,
        c.is_export,
        c.was_meaningful_export,
        c.source_clip_id,
        t.duration_in_seconds / 60.0 AS source_take_duration_minutes,
        CASE
            WHEN t.duration_in_seconds / 60.0 < 30 THEN 'Under 30 min'
            WHEN t.duration_in_seconds / 60.0 < 45 THEN '30-45 min'
            WHEN t.duration_in_seconds / 60.0 < 60 THEN '45-60 min'
            ELSE '60+ min'
        END AS take_duration_bucket
    FROM ANALYTICS.FS.CLIPS c
    INNER JOIN LATERAL FLATTEN(c.take_ids) ti
    INNER JOIN ANALYTICS.FS.TAKES t ON ti.value::TEXT = t.take_id
    WHERE c.is_magic_clip = TRUE
    QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY c.clip_id ORDER BY t.duration_in_seconds DESC) = 1
),

-- First magic clip export per project
first_mc_export AS (
    SELECT
        mc.project_id,
        mc.take_duration_bucket,
        MIN(mc.created_at) AS first_export_at
    FROM magic_clips_with_duration mc
    WHERE mc.is_export = TRUE
    GROUP BY mc.project_id, mc.take_duration_bucket
),

-- Count views before first export for each project
views_before_export AS (
    SELECT
        ep.project_id,
        fe.take_duration_bucket,
        fe.first_export_at,
        ep.project_created_at,
        COUNT(DISTINCT v.clip_id) AS n_views_before_first_export
    FROM eligible_projects ep
    INNER JOIN first_mc_export fe ON ep.project_id = fe.project_id
    LEFT JOIN ANALYTICS.STG.STG_SEGMENT__PROJECT_CLIP_PLAY_CLICKED v
        ON v.project_id = ep.project_id
        AND v.clip_type = 'clipTypeMagicClip'
        AND v.timestamp < fe.first_export_at
        AND v.timestamp >= ep.project_created_at
    GROUP BY ep.project_id, fe.take_duration_bucket, fe.first_export_at, ep.project_created_at
)

SELECT
    take_duration_bucket,
    MEDIAN(n_views_before_first_export) AS median_views,
    PERCENTILE_CONT(0.25) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY n_views_before_first_export) AS p25_views,
    PERCENTILE_CONT(0.75) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY n_views_before_first_export) AS p75_views,
    AVG(n_views_before_first_export) AS mean_views,
    COUNT(*) AS n_projects
FROM views_before_export
GROUP BY take_duration_bucket
ORDER BY 
    CASE take_duration_bucket
        WHEN 'Under 30 min' THEN 1
        WHEN '30-45 min' THEN 2
        WHEN '45-60 min' THEN 3
        WHEN '60+ min' THEN 4
    END
business_question: What is the distribution of views before the first export for magic clips, by the clip take duration bucket?

query_text:
SELECT * FROM (WITH latest_day AS (
    SELECT MAX(pivot_day) AS pivot_day
    FROM ANALYTICS.BI.DAILY_CUSTOMER_MRR
),
dates AS (
    SELECT
        pivot_day AS current_day,
        DATEADD(MONTH, -1, pivot_day) AS prior_month_same_day,
        DATEADD(DAY, -1, DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', pivot_day)) AS prior_month_end
    FROM latest_day
),
snapshots AS (
    SELECT
        d.pivot_day,
        COALESCE(d.product_type, 'Unknown') AS product_type,
        SUM(d.mrr) AS mrr
    FROM ANALYTICS.BI.DAILY_CUSTOMER_MRR d
    JOIN dates x ON d.pivot_day IN (x.current_day, x.prior_month_same_day, x.prior_month_end)
    WHERE d.is_latest_pivot_day_of_period = TRUE
    GROUP BY 1, 2
),
pivoted AS (
    SELECT
        s.product_type,
        MAX(IFF(s.pivot_day = x.current_day, s.mrr, NULL)) AS current_mrr,
        MAX(IFF(s.pivot_day = x.prior_month_same_day, s.mrr, NULL)) AS prior_month_same_day_mrr,
        MAX(IFF(s.pivot_day = x.prior_month_end, s.mrr, NULL)) AS prior_month_end_mrr
    FROM snapshots s
    CROSS JOIN dates x
    GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT
    product_type,
    current_mrr::NUMBER(18, 2) AS current_mrr,
    prior_month_end_mrr::NUMBER(18, 2) AS last_month_end_mrr,
    (current_mrr - prior_month_end_mrr)::NUMBER(18, 2) AS change_vs_last_month_end_mrr,
    (DIV0NULL(current_mrr - prior_month_end_mrr, NULLIF(prior_month_end_mrr, 0)) * 100)::NUMBER(18, 2) AS change_vs_last_month_end_pct,
    prior_month_same_day_mrr::NUMBER(18, 2) AS prior_month_same_day_mrr
FROM pivoted

UNION ALL

SELECT
    'Total' AS product_type,
    SUM(current_mrr)::NUMBER(18, 2) AS current_mrr,
    SUM(prior_month_end_mrr)::NUMBER(18, 2) AS last_month_end_mrr,
    (SUM(current_mrr) - SUM(prior_month_end_mrr))::NUMBER(18, 2) AS change_vs_last_month_end_mrr,
    (DIV0NULL(SUM(current_mrr) - SUM(prior_month_end_mrr), NULLIF(SUM(prior_month_end_mrr), 0)) * 100)::NUMBER(18, 2) AS change_vs_last_month_end_pct,
    SUM(prior_month_same_day_mrr)::NUMBER(18, 2) AS prior_month_same_day_mrr
FROM pivoted
ORDER BY CASE WHEN product_type = 'Total' THEN 2 ELSE 1 END, current_mrr DESC) AS semantic_agent_query LIMIT 500
business_question: What is the month-over-month change in current MRR by product type (and the total), comparing the latest day to the previous month’s end?

query_text:
WITH edit_to_export AS (
    SELECT 
        DATEDIFF('minute', edit.CREATED_AT, export.EXPORTED_AT) as minutes_to_export
    FROM ANALYTICS.FS.CLIPS edit
    JOIN ANALYTICS.FS.CLIPS export ON edit.CLIP_ID = export.SOURCE_CLIP_ID
    JOIN ANALYTICS.FS.USERS u ON edit.CREATED_BY_USER_ID = u.USER_ID
    WHERE 
        edit.IS_EDIT = TRUE
        AND export.IS_EXPORT = TRUE
        AND u.CREATED_AT >= DATEADD(day, -30, CURRENT_DATE())
        AND edit.IS_MAGIC_CLIP = FALSE
        AND edit.IS_MAGIC_EPISODE = FALSE
        AND (edit.IS_MAGIC_SEGMENT = FALSE OR edit.IS_MAGIC_SEGMENT IS NULL)
        AND (edit.IS_MAGIC_HOOK = FALSE OR edit.IS_MAGIC_HOOK IS NULL)
        AND edit.CLIP_DURATION_IN_MINUTES >= 5
        AND DATEDIFF('minute', edit.CREATED_AT, export.EXPORTED_AT) >= 0
)
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN minutes_to_export <= 1 THEN '0-1 min'
        WHEN minutes_to_export <= 5 THEN '1-5 min'
        WHEN minutes_to_export <= 15 THEN '5-15 min'
        WHEN minutes_to_export <= 30 THEN '15-30 min'
        WHEN minutes_to_export <= 60 THEN '30-60 min'
        WHEN minutes_to_export <= 120 THEN '1-2 hours'
        WHEN minutes_to_export <= 360 THEN '2-6 hours'
        WHEN minutes_to_export <= 720 THEN '6-12 hours'
        WHEN minutes_to_export <= 1440 THEN '12-24 hours'
        WHEN minutes_to_export <= 4320 THEN '1-3 days'
        WHEN minutes_to_export <= 10080 THEN '3-7 days'
        ELSE '7+ days'
    END as time_bucket,
    COUNT(*) as count,
    ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER(), 1) as pct
FROM edit_to_export
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 
    CASE time_bucket
        WHEN '0-1 min' THEN 1
        WHEN '1-5 min' THEN 2
        WHEN '5-15 min' THEN 3
        WHEN '15-30 min' THEN 4
        WHEN '30-60 min' THEN 5
        WHEN '1-2 hours' THEN 6
        WHEN '2-6 hours' THEN 7
        WHEN '6-12 hours' THEN 8
        WHEN '12-24 hours' THEN 9
        WHEN '1-3 days' THEN 10
        WHEN '3-7 days' THEN 11
        WHEN '7+ days' THEN 12
    END
business_question: What is the daily distribution of time from clip edit creation to export, for typical clips exported in the last 30 days?

query_text:
WITH

company_properties AS (
	SELECT
		comp.company_id,
		ANY_VALUE(comp.created_at) AS created_at,
		ANY_VALUE(comp.company_market) AS company_market,
		ANY_VALUE(comp.company_size) AS company_size,
		ANY_VALUE(comp.csm_assigned) AS csm_assigned,
		MIN_BY(
			deals.last_touch_source,
			CASE WHEN deals.is_won_deal AND deals.is_new_sales_deal THEN deals.created_at END
		) AS last_touch_source
	FROM ANALYTICS.trf.hubspot__companies comp
	LEFT JOIN ANALYTICS.trf.hubspot__deals deals
		ON comp.company_id = deals.company_id
	GROUP BY 1
),

account_company_properties AS (
	SELECT
		mapping.account_id,
		MAX_BY(company.company_market, company.created_at) AS company_market,
		MAX_BY(company.last_touch_source, company.created_at) AS last_touch_source,
		MAX_BY(company.company_size, company.created_at) AS company_size,
		MAX_BY(company.csm_assigned, company.created_at) AS csm_assigned
	FROM ANALYTICS.trf.core__company_to_account_mapping mapping
	INNER JOIN company_properties company
		ON mapping.company_id = company.company_id
	GROUP BY 1
)

query_text:
SELECT
        'self_service' AS product_type,
        'Self_Service_Mobile_plan'            AS metric_name,
        ANALYTICS.PUBLIC.GET_FISCAL_QUARTER(acquisition_period) AS period ,
        periods_from_acquisition,
        COALESCE(
          SUM(CASE WHEN first_product_group = 'Mobile plan' THEN self_service_GROSS_MARGIN END)
          / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN (first_product_group = 'Mobile plan') THEN cohort_size END), 0),
          0
        ) AS ltv,
        
        SUM(ltv) 
          OVER (PARTITION BY ANALYTICS.PUBLIC.GET_FISCAL_QUARTER(acquisition_period) 
            ORDER BY periods_from_acquisition asc rows between unbounded preceding and current row
          ) AS cum_ltv
        
      FROM analytics.bi.self_service_ltv_estimates
      GROUP BY 1,2,3,4

query_text:
WITH params AS (
    SELECT
        CURRENT_DATE() - 1 AS curr_snapshot,
        DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', CURRENT_DATE() - 1) AS curr_cal_q_start,
        DATEADD(QUARTER, -1, DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', CURRENT_DATE() - 1)) AS prev_cal_q_start
),
base AS (
    SELECT
        d.deal_id,
        d.deal_type,
        d.last_touch_source,
        d.is_closed,
        d.deal_mrr,
        d.closed_at::DATE AS closed_date,
        d.contract_start_date AS close_inferred_date
    FROM ANALYTICS.FS.DEALS d
    WHERE d.is_closed = FALSE
      AND d.deal_type IN ('Agency New Sales', 'Enterprise New Sales', 'Europe New Sales')
),
calendar_quarter_bounds AS (
    SELECT
        (SELECT curr_snapshot FROM params) AS curr_snapshot,
        (SELECT prev_cal_q_start + DATEDIFF(DAY, prev_cal_q_start, curr_snapshot) FROM params) AS prev_snapshot,
        DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', (SELECT curr_snapshot FROM params)) AS curr_q_start,
        DATEADD(DAY, -1, DATEADD(QUARTER, 1, DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', (SELECT curr_snapshot FROM params)))) AS curr_q_end,
        DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', (SELECT prev_cal_q_start FROM params)) AS prev_q_start,
        DATEADD(DAY, -1, DATEADD(QUARTER, 1, DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', (SELECT prev_cal_q_start FROM params)))) AS prev_q_end
),
classified AS (
    SELECT
        b.deal_id,
        b.deal_type,
        CASE
            WHEN b.last_touch_source = 'Inbound' THEN 'Inbound'
            WHEN b.last_touch_source = 'Outbound' THEN 'Outbound'
            ELSE 'Other'
        END AS channel,
        b.deal_mrr
    FROM base b
    WHERE b.last_touch_source IN ('Inbound', 'Outbound')
),
-- NOTE: FS.DEALS does not provide a point-in-time snapshot history of open pipeline
-- We'll approximate "open as of snapshot" by using the current open deals set for both quarters,
-- and constrain to those expected to close in the quarter via contract_start_date when available.
-- If contract_start_date is NULL, deal is excluded (can't determine expected close quarter).
open_in_quarter AS (
    SELECT
        cqb.curr_snapshot,
        cqb.prev_snapshot,
        cqb.curr_q_start,
        cqb.curr_q_end,
        cqb.prev_q_start,
        cqb.prev_q_end,
        cl.deal_id,
        cl.deal_type,
        cl.channel,
        cl.deal_mrr,
        d.contract_start_date::DATE AS expected_close_date
    FROM calendar_quarter_bounds cqb
    JOIN classified cl ON 1=1
    JOIN ANALYTICS.FS.DEALS d ON cl.deal_id = d.deal_id
    WHERE d.contract_start_date IS NOT NULL
),
agg AS (
    SELECT
        'curr' AS period,
        deal_type,
        channel,
        SUM(deal_mrr) AS pipeline_mrr,
        COUNT(DISTINCT deal_id) AS deal_cnt,
        DIV0(SUM(deal_mrr), NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT deal_id), 0)) AS acv
    FROM open_in_quarter
    WHERE expected_close_date BETWEEN curr_q_start AND curr_q_end
    GROUP BY 1,2,3

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        'prev' AS period,
        deal_type,
        channel,
        SUM(deal_mrr) AS pipeline_mrr,
        COUNT(DISTINCT deal_id) AS deal_cnt,
        DIV0(SUM(deal_mrr), NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT deal_id), 0)) AS acv
    FROM open_in_quarter
    WHERE expected_close_date BETWEEN prev_q_start AND prev_q_end
    GROUP BY 1,2,3
),
pivoted AS (
    SELECT
        deal_type,
        channel,
        MAX(IFF(period='prev', pipeline_mrr, NULL)) AS prev_pipeline,
        MAX(IFF(period='prev', deal_cnt, NULL)) AS prev_cnt,
        MAX(IFF(period='prev', acv, NULL)) AS prev_acv,
        MAX(IFF(period='curr', pipeline_mrr, NULL)) AS curr_pipeline,
        MAX(IFF(period='curr', deal_cnt, NULL)) AS curr_cnt,
        MAX(IFF(period='curr', acv, NULL)) AS curr_acv
    FROM agg
    GROUP BY 1,2
)
SELECT
    (SELECT curr_snapshot FROM calendar_quarter_bounds) AS curr_snapshot,
    (SELECT prev_snapshot FROM calendar_quarter_bounds) AS prev_snapshot,
    (SELECT curr_q_start FROM calendar_quarter_bounds) AS curr_q_start,
    (SELECT curr_q_end FROM calendar_quarter_bounds) AS curr_q_end,
    (SELECT prev_q_start FROM calendar_quarter_bounds) AS prev_q_start,
    (SELECT prev_q_end FROM calendar_quarter_bounds) AS prev_q_end,
    deal_type,
    channel,
    COALESCE(prev_pipeline, 0) AS prev_pipeline,
    COALESCE(prev_cnt, 0) AS prev_cnt,
    COALESCE(prev_acv, 0) AS prev_acv,
    COALESCE(curr_pipeline, 0) AS curr_pipeline,
    COALESCE(curr_cnt, 0) AS curr_cnt,
    COALESCE(curr_acv, 0) AS curr_acv
FROM pivoted
ORDER BY channel, deal_type;
business_question: What is the current-quarter open pipeline vs prior-quarter by deal type and channel, including deal counts and ACV (MRR) in each?

query_text:
WITH dates AS (
    SELECT
        TO_DATE('2026-03-04') AS curr_day,
        DATEADD(DAY, -7, TO_DATE('2026-03-04')) AS prev_day
),
new_visits AS (
    SELECT
        first_visit_at::DATE AS date_day,
        COUNT(DISTINCT identifier) AS new_visits
    FROM ANALYTICS.BA.GROWTH_METRICS
    WHERE first_visit_at::DATE IN ((SELECT curr_day FROM dates), (SELECT prev_day FROM dates))
    GROUP BY 1
),
sign_ups AS (
    SELECT
        created_at::DATE AS date_day,
        COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS sign_ups
    FROM ANALYTICS.FS.USERS
    WHERE created_at::DATE IN ((SELECT curr_day FROM dates), (SELECT prev_day FROM dates))
        AND is_internal_user = FALSE
        AND is_deleted = FALSE
    GROUP BY 1
),
new_trial_accounts AS (
    SELECT
        timestamp::DATE AS date_day,
        COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS new_trial_accounts
    FROM ANALYTICS.STG.STG_SEGMENT__ACCOUNT_TRIAL_STARTED
    WHERE timestamp::DATE IN ((SELECT curr_day FROM dates), (SELECT prev_day FROM dates))
    GROUP BY 1
),
inbound_mqls AS (
    SELECT
        submitted_at::DATE AS date_day,
        COUNT(DISTINCT mql_id) AS inbound_mqls
    FROM ANALYTICS.FS.MQLS
    WHERE submitted_at::DATE IN ((SELECT curr_day FROM dates), (SELECT prev_day FROM dates))
    GROUP BY 1
),
sqls AS (
    SELECT
        CAST(sql_created_date AS TIMESTAMP)::DATE AS date_day,
        COUNT(DISTINCT sql_id) AS sqls
    FROM ANALYTICS.BI.SALES_FUNNEL_ANALYSIS
    WHERE last_touch_source = 'Inbound'
        AND CAST(sql_created_date AS TIMESTAMP)::DATE IN ((SELECT curr_day FROM dates), (SELECT prev_day FROM dates))
    GROUP BY 1
),
deals AS (
    SELECT
        created_at::DATE AS date_day,
        COUNT(DISTINCT deal_id) AS deals
    FROM ANALYTICS.FS.DEALS
    WHERE created_at::DATE IN ((SELECT curr_day FROM dates), (SELECT prev_day FROM dates))
    GROUP BY 1
),
new_paid_customers AS (
    SELECT
        pivot_day AS date_day,
        COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) AS new_paid_customers
    FROM ANALYTICS.BI.DAILY_CUSTOMER_MRR
    WHERE pivot_day IN ((SELECT curr_day FROM dates), (SELECT prev_day FROM dates))
        AND status_wo_early_cancellations IN ('New', 'Reactivation')
    GROUP BY 1
),
combined AS (
    SELECT
        d.curr_day AS date_day,
        COALESCE(nv.new_visits, 0) AS new_visits,
        COALESCE(su.sign_ups, 0) AS sign_ups,
        COALESCE(nta.new_trial_accounts, 0) AS new_trial_accounts,
        COALESCE(im.inbound_mqls, 0) AS inbound_mqls,
        COALESCE(sq.sqls, 0) AS sqls,
        COALESCE(dl.deals, 0) AS deals,
        COALESCE(npc.new_paid_customers, 0) AS new_paid_customers,
        DIV0(COALESCE(npc.new_paid_customers, 0), NULLIF(COALESCE(nv.new_visits, 0), 0)) AS cvr_new_visits_to_paid
    FROM dates d
    LEFT JOIN new_visits nv ON nv.date_day = d.curr_day
    LEFT JOIN sign_ups su ON su.date_day = d.curr_day
    LEFT JOIN new_trial_accounts nta ON nta.date_day = d.curr_day
    LEFT JOIN inbound_mqls im ON im.date_day = d.curr_day
    LEFT JOIN sqls sq ON sq.date_day = d.curr_day
    LEFT JOIN deals dl ON dl.date_day = d.curr_day
    LEFT JOIN new_paid_customers npc ON npc.date_day = d.curr_day

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        d.prev_day AS date_day,
        COALESCE(nv.new_visits, 0) AS new_visits,
        COALESCE(su.sign_ups, 0) AS sign_ups,
        COALESCE(nta.new_trial_accounts, 0) AS new_trial_accounts,
        COALESCE(im.inbound_mqls, 0) AS inbound_mqls,
        COALESCE(sq.sqls, 0) AS sqls,
        COALESCE(dl.deals, 0) AS deals,
        COALESCE(npc.new_paid_customers, 0) AS new_paid_customers,
        DIV0(COALESCE(npc.new_paid_customers, 0), NULLIF(COALESCE(nv.new_visits, 0), 0)) AS cvr_new_visits_to_paid
    FROM dates d
    LEFT JOIN new_visits nv ON nv.date_day = d.prev_day
    LEFT JOIN sign_ups su ON su.date_day = d.prev_day
    LEFT JOIN new_trial_accounts nta ON nta.date_day = d.prev_day
    LEFT JOIN inbound_mqls im ON im.date_day = d.prev_day
    LEFT JOIN sqls sq ON sq.date_day = d.prev_day
    LEFT JOIN deals dl ON dl.date_day = d.prev_day
    LEFT JOIN new_paid_customers npc ON npc.date_day = d.prev_day
),
pivoted AS (
    SELECT
        MAX(IFF(date_day = (SELECT curr_day FROM dates), new_visits, NULL)) AS new_visits_curr,
        MAX(IFF(date_day = (SELECT prev_day FROM dates), new_visits, NULL)) AS new_visits_prev,
        MAX(IFF(date_day = (SELECT curr_day FROM dates), sign_ups, NULL)) AS sign_ups_curr,
        MAX(IFF(date_day = (SELECT prev_day FROM dates), sign_ups, NULL)) AS sign_ups_prev,
        MAX(IFF(date_day = (SELECT curr_day FROM dates), new_trial_accounts, NULL)) AS new_trial_accounts_curr,
        MAX(IFF(date_day = (SELECT prev_day FROM dates), new_trial_accounts, NULL)) AS new_trial_accounts_prev,
        MAX(IFF(date_day = (SELECT curr_day FROM dates), inbound_mqls, NULL)) AS inbound_mqls_curr,
        MAX(IFF(date_day = (SELECT prev_day FROM dates), inbound_mqls, NULL)) AS inbound_mqls_prev,
        MAX(IFF(date_day = (SELECT curr_day FROM dates), sqls, NULL)) AS sqls_curr,
        MAX(IFF(date_day = (SELECT prev_day FROM dates), sqls, NULL)) AS sqls_prev,
        MAX(IFF(date_day = (SELECT curr_day FROM dates), deals, NULL)) AS deals_curr,
        MAX(IFF(date_day = (SELECT prev_day FROM dates), deals, NULL)) AS deals_prev,
        MAX(IFF(date_day = (SELECT curr_day FROM dates), cvr_new_visits_to_paid, NULL)) AS cvr_curr,
        MAX(IFF(date_day = (SELECT prev_day FROM dates), cvr_new_visits_to_paid, NULL)) AS cvr_prev
    FROM combined
)
SELECT * FROM (
    SELECT
        'New Visits' AS metric,
        new_visits_curr::FLOAT AS current_value,
        new_visits_prev::FLOAT AS wow_value,
        (new_visits_curr - new_visits_prev)::FLOAT AS wow_delta,
        DIV0((new_visits_curr - new_visits_prev), NULLIF(ABS(new_visits_prev), 0)) AS wow_pct
    FROM pivoted

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        'Sign-Ups' AS metric,
        sign_ups_curr::FLOAT AS current_value,
        sign_ups_prev::FLOAT AS wow_value,
        (sign_ups_curr - sign_ups_prev)::FLOAT AS wow_delta,
        DIV0((sign_ups_curr - sign_ups_prev), NULLIF(ABS(sign_ups_prev), 0)) AS wow_pct
    FROM pivoted

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        'New Trial Accounts' AS metric,
        new_trial_accounts_curr::FLOAT AS current_value,
        new_trial_accounts_prev::FLOAT AS wow_value,
        (new_trial_accounts_curr - new_trial_accounts_prev)::FLOAT AS wow_delta,
        DIV0((new_trial_accounts_curr - new_trial_accounts_prev), NULLIF(ABS(new_trial_accounts_prev), 0)) AS wow_pct
    FROM pivoted

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        'Inbound MQLs' AS metric,
        inbound_mqls_curr::FLOAT AS current_value,
        inbound_mqls_prev::FLOAT AS wow_value,
        (inbound_mqls_curr - inbound_mqls_prev)::FLOAT AS wow_delta,
        DIV0((inbound_mqls_curr - inbound_mqls_prev), NULLIF(ABS(inbound_mqls_prev), 0)) AS wow_pct
    FROM pivoted

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        'Inbound SQLs' AS metric,
        sqls_curr::FLOAT AS current_value,
        sqls_prev::FLOAT AS wow_value,
        (sqls_curr - sqls_prev)::FLOAT AS wow_delta,
        DIV0((sqls_curr - sqls_prev), NULLIF(ABS(sqls_prev), 0)) AS wow_pct
    FROM pivoted

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        'Deals Created' AS metric,
        deals_curr::FLOAT AS current_value,
        deals_prev::FLOAT AS wow_value,
        (deals_curr - deals_prev)::FLOAT AS wow_delta,
        DIV0((deals_curr - deals_prev), NULLIF(ABS(deals_prev), 0)) AS wow_pct
    FROM pivoted

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        'CVR New Visits  Paid Users' AS metric,
        cvr_curr::FLOAT AS current_value,
        cvr_prev::FLOAT AS wow_value,
        (cvr_curr - cvr_prev)::FLOAT AS wow_delta,
        DIV0((cvr_curr - cvr_prev), NULLIF(ABS(cvr_prev), 0)) AS wow_pct
    FROM pivoted
)
ORDER BY metric;
business_question: How did we change day-over-day for core funnel metrics (visits, signups, trials, MQLs, SQLs, deals, new paid customers) and the conversion rate between the two latest days?

query_text:
WITH new_customers AS (
    SELECT
        pivot_day AS day,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN status_wo_early_cancellations IN ('New', 'Reactivation') THEN customer_id END) AS new_customers
    FROM ANALYTICS.BI.DAILY_CUSTOMER_MRR
    WHERE pivot_day IN ('2026-03-04', DATEADD(DAY, -7, '2026-03-04'))
    GROUP BY 1
),
new_visits AS (
    SELECT
        first_visit_at::DATE AS day,
        COUNT(DISTINCT identifier) AS new_visits
    FROM ANALYTICS.BA.GROWTH_METRICS
    WHERE first_visit_at::DATE IN ('2026-03-04', DATEADD(DAY, -7, '2026-03-04'))
    GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT
    nc.day,
    nc.new_customers,
    nv.new_visits,
    DIV0(nc.new_customers, nv.new_visits) AS cvr_new_visits_to_paid_users
FROM new_customers nc
JOIN new_visits nv USING (day);

query_text:
WITH daily_counts AS (
    SELECT
        pivot_day,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE
            WHEN status_wo_early_cancellations NOT IN ('Churn', 'Lost') THEN customer_id
        END) AS total_customers,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE
            WHEN status_wo_early_cancellations IN ('New', 'Reactivation') THEN customer_id
        END) AS total_new_customers,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE
            WHEN status_wo_early_cancellations = 'Churn' THEN customer_id
        END) AS total_churned_customers
    FROM ANALYTICS.BI.DAILY_CUSTOMER_MRR
    WHERE pivot_day IN ('2026-03-04', DATEADD(DAY, -7, '2026-03-04'))
    GROUP BY pivot_day
)
SELECT
    curr.pivot_day AS current_day,
    prev.pivot_day AS wow_day,

    curr.total_customers,
    prev.total_customers AS total_customers_wow,
    curr.total_customers - prev.total_customers AS total_customers_wow_delta,
    ROUND(DIV0(curr.total_customers - prev.total_customers, NULLIF(prev.total_customers, 0)) * 100, 2) AS total_customers_wow_pct,

    curr.total_new_customers,
    prev.total_new_customers AS total_new_customers_wow,
    curr.total_new_customers - prev.total_new_customers AS total_new_customers_wow_delta,
    ROUND(DIV0(curr.total_new_customers - prev.total_new_customers, NULLIF(prev.total_new_customers, 0)) * 100, 2) AS total_new_customers_wow_pct,

    curr.total_churned_customers,
    prev.total_churned_customers AS total_churned_customers_wow,
    curr.total_churned_customers - prev.total_churned_customers AS total_churned_customers_wow_delta,
    ROUND(DIV0(curr.total_churned_customers - prev.total_churned_customers, NULLIF(prev.total_churned_customers, 0)) * 100, 2) AS total_churned_customers_wow_pct,

    (curr.total_new_customers - curr.total_churned_customers) AS net_new_customers,
    (prev.total_new_customers - prev.total_churned_customers) AS net_new_customers_wow,
    (curr.total_new_customers - curr.total_churned_customers) - (prev.total_new_customers - prev.total_churned_customers) AS net_new_customers_wow_delta,
    ROUND(
        DIV0(
            (curr.total_new_customers - curr.total_churned_customers) - (prev.total_new_customers - prev.total_churned_customers),
            NULLIF(ABS(prev.total_new_customers - prev.total_churned_customers), 0)
        ) * 100,
        2
    ) AS net_new_customers_wow_pct

FROM daily_counts curr
JOIN daily_counts prev
  ON curr.pivot_day = '2026-03-04'
 AND prev.pivot_day = DATEADD(DAY, -7, '2026-03-04');
business_question: What is the week-over-week change in total customers, new customers, churned customers, and net new customers for the latest day?

query_text:
WITH dates AS (
    SELECT
        TO_DATE('2026-03-04') AS day_curr,
        DATEADD(DAY, -7, TO_DATE('2026-03-04')) AS day_wow
),
-- Snapshot metrics for each day (MRR + ARR)
snapshots AS (
    SELECT
        d.pivot_day,
        SUM(d.mrr)::NUMERIC(18, 2) AS mrr,
        (SUM(d.mrr) * 12)::NUMERIC(18, 2) AS arr
    FROM ANALYTICS.BI.DAILY_CUSTOMER_MRR d
    WHERE d.pivot_day IN ((SELECT day_curr FROM dates), (SELECT day_wow FROM dates))
    GROUP BY 1
),
-- Month-to-date flow metrics up to each day (New/Expansion/Churn/etc.)
flow_mtd_curr AS (
    SELECT
        (SELECT day_curr FROM dates) AS as_of_day,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.customer_group_status IN ('New','Reactivation') THEN d.delta_mrr ELSE 0 END)::NUMERIC(18, 2) AS new_mrr,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.customer_group_status = 'New-to-Business' THEN d.delta_mrr ELSE 0 END)::NUMERIC(18, 2) AS new_to_business_mrr,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.customer_group_status = 'Expansion' THEN d.delta_mrr ELSE 0 END)::NUMERIC(18, 2) AS expansion_mrr,
        ABS(SUM(CASE WHEN d.customer_group_status = 'Churn' THEN d.delta_mrr ELSE 0 END))::NUMERIC(18, 2) AS churn_mrr,
        ABS(SUM(CASE WHEN d.customer_group_status = 'Reduction' THEN d.delta_mrr ELSE 0 END))::NUMERIC(18, 2) AS reduction_mrr,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.customer_group_status <> 'No Change' THEN d.delta_mrr ELSE 0 END)::NUMERIC(18, 2) AS net_new_mrr
    FROM ANALYTICS.BI.DAILY_CUSTOMER_MRR d
    WHERE d.pivot_day >= DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', (SELECT day_curr FROM dates))
      AND d.pivot_day <= (SELECT day_curr FROM dates)
),
flow_mtd_wow AS (
    SELECT
        (SELECT day_wow FROM dates) AS as_of_day,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.customer_group_status IN ('New','Reactivation') THEN d.delta_mrr ELSE 0 END)::NUMERIC(18, 2) AS new_mrr,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.customer_group_status = 'New-to-Business' THEN d.delta_mrr ELSE 0 END)::NUMERIC(18, 2) AS new_to_business_mrr,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.customer_group_status = 'Expansion' THEN d.delta_mrr ELSE 0 END)::NUMERIC(18, 2) AS expansion_mrr,
        ABS(SUM(CASE WHEN d.customer_group_status = 'Churn' THEN d.delta_mrr ELSE 0 END))::NUMERIC(18,  2) AS churn_mrr,
        ABS(SUM(CASE WHEN d.customer_group_status = 'Reduction' THEN d.delta_mrr ELSE 0 END))::NUMERIC(18, 2) AS reduction_mrr,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.customer_group_status <> 'No Change' THEN d.delta_mrr ELSE 0 END)::NUMERIC(18, 2) AS net_new_mrr
    FROM ANALYTICS.BI.DAILY_CUSTOMER_MRR d
    WHERE d.pivot_day >= DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', (SELECT day_wow FROM dates))
      AND d.pivot_day <= (SELECT day_wow FROM dates)
),
flow_combined AS (
    SELECT * FROM flow_mtd_curr
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM flow_mtd_wow
),
wide AS (
    SELECT
        s.pivot_day,
        s.arr,
        s.mrr,
        f.new_mrr,
        f.new_to_business_mrr,
        (f.expansion_mrr - f.reduction_mrr)::NUMERIC(18, 2) AS net_expansion_mrr,
        f.churn_mrr,
        f.net_new_mrr
    FROM snapshots s
    JOIN flow_combined f ON f.as_of_day = s.pivot_day
),
final AS (
    SELECT
        'ARR' AS metric,
        MAX(CASE WHEN pivot_day = (SELECT day_curr FROM dates) THEN arr END) AS value_curr,
        MAX(CASE WHEN pivot_day = (SELECT day_wow FROM dates) THEN arr END) AS value_wow
    FROM wide

    UNION ALL SELECT 'MRR',
        MAX(CASE WHEN pivot_day = (SELECT day_curr FROM dates) THEN mrr END),
        MAX(CASE WHEN pivot_day = (SELECT day_wow FROM dates) THEN mrr END)
    FROM wide

    UNION ALL SELECT 'New MRR (MTD)',
        MAX(CASE WHEN pivot_day = (SELECT day_curr FROM dates) THEN new_mrr END),
        MAX(CASE WHEN pivot_day = (SELECT day_wow FROM dates) THEN new_mrr END)
    FROM wide

    UNION ALL SELECT 'New-to-Business MRR (MTD)',
        MAX(CASE WHEN pivot_day = (SELECT day_curr FROM dates) THEN new_to_business_mrr END),
        MAX(CASE WHEN pivot_day = (SELECT day_wow FROM dates) THEN new_to_business_mrr END)
    FROM wide

    UNION ALL SELECT 'Net Expansion MRR (MTD)',
        MAX(CASE WHEN pivot_day = (SELECT day_curr FROM dates) THEN net_expansion_mrr END),
        MAX(CASE WHEN pivot_day = (SELECT day_wow FROM dates) THEN net_expansion_mrr END)
    FROM wide

    UNION ALL SELECT 'Churned MRR (MTD)',
        MAX(CASE WHEN pivot_day = (SELECT day_curr FROM dates) THEN churn_mrr END),
        MAX(CASE WHEN pivot_day = (SELECT day_wow FROM dates) THEN churn_mrr END)
    FROM wide

    UNION ALL SELECT 'Net New MRR (MTD)',
        MAX(CASE WHEN pivot_day = (SELECT day_curr FROM dates) THEN net_new_mrr END),
        MAX(CASE WHEN pivot_day = (SELECT day_wow FROM dates) THEN net_new_mrr END)
    FROM wide
)
SELECT
    metric,
    value_curr::NUMERIC(18,2) AS value_2026_03_04,
    value_wow::NUMERIC(18,2) AS value_2026_02_25,
    (value_curr - value_wow)::NUMERIC(18,2) AS wow_abs_change,
    ROUND(DIV0NULL((value_curr - value_wow) * 100.0, NULLIF(value_wow, 0)), 2) AS wow_pct_change
FROM final
ORDER BY CASE metric
    WHEN 'MRR' THEN 1
    WHEN 'ARR' THEN 2
    WHEN 'New MRR (MTD)' THEN 3
    WHEN 'New-to-Business MRR (MTD)' THEN 4
    WHEN 'Net Expansion MRR (MTD)' THEN 5
    WHEN 'Churned MRR (MTD)' THEN 6
    WHEN 'Net New MRR (MTD)' THEN 7
    ELSE 99
END;
business_question: How did our MRR/ARR and MTd movements (New, Expansion, Churn, Net New) differ between two dates, and what is the absolute and percent change?

query_text:
WITH base AS (
    SELECT
        pivot_day,
        DATE_TRUNC('WEEK', pivot_day)::DATE AS week_start,
        SUM(mrr) AS mrr,
        SUM(CASE WHEN customer_group_status IN ('New', 'Reactivation') THEN delta_mrr ELSE 0 END) AS new_mrr,
        SUM(CASE WHEN customer_group_status = 'New-to-Business' THEN delta_mrr ELSE 0 END) AS new_to_business_mrr,
        SUM(CASE WHEN customer_group_status = 'Expansion' THEN delta_mrr ELSE 0 END) AS expansion_mrr,
        SUM(CASE WHEN customer_group_status = 'Reduction' THEN delta_mrr ELSE 0 END) AS reduction_mrr,
        SUM(CASE WHEN customer_group_status = 'Churn' THEN delta_mrr ELSE 0 END) AS churn_delta_mrr,
        SUM(CASE WHEN customer_group_status <> 'No Change' THEN delta_mrr ELSE 0 END) AS net_new_mrr
    FROM ANALYTICS.BI.DAILY_CUSTOMER_MRR
    WHERE pivot_day IN ('2026-03-04'::DATE, DATEADD('DAY', -7, '2026-03-04'::DATE))
        AND is_latest_pivot_day_of_period = TRUE
    GROUP BY 1, 2
),
calc AS (
    SELECT
        pivot_day,
        mrr,
        (mrr * 12) AS arr,
        new_mrr,
        new_to_business_mrr,
        (expansion_mrr + reduction_mrr) AS net_expansion_mrr,
        churn_delta_mrr,
        net_new_mrr
    FROM base
),
pivoted AS (
    SELECT
        MAX(IFF(pivot_day = '2026-03-04'::DATE, arr, NULL)) AS arr_curr,
        MAX(IFF(pivot_day = DATEADD('DAY', -7, '2026-03-04'::DATE), arr, NULL)) AS arr_prev,
        MAX(IFF(pivot_day = '2026-03-04'::DATE, mrr, NULL)) AS mrr_curr,
        MAX(IFF(pivot_day = DATEADD('DAY', -7, '2026-03-04'::DATE), mrr, NULL)) AS mrr_prev,
        MAX(IFF(pivot_day = '2026-03-04'::DATE, new_mrr, NULL)) AS new_mrr_curr,
        MAX(IFF(pivot_day = DATEADD('DAY', -7, '2026-03-04'::DATE), new_mrr, NULL)) AS new_mrr_prev,
        MAX(IFF(pivot_day = '2026-03-04'::DATE, new_to_business_mrr, NULL)) AS ntb_curr,
        MAX(IFF(pivot_day = DATEADD('DAY', -7, '2026-03-04'::DATE), new_to_business_mrr, NULL)) AS ntb_prev,
        MAX(IFF(pivot_day = '2026-03-04'::DATE, net_expansion_mrr, NULL)) AS net_exp_curr,
        MAX(IFF(pivot_day = DATEADD('DAY', -7, '2026-03-04'::DATE), net_expansion_mrr, NULL)) AS net_exp_prev,
        MAX(IFF(pivot_day = '2026-03-04'::DATE, churn_delta_mrr, NULL)) AS churn_curr,
        MAX(IFF(pivot_day = DATEADD('DAY', -7, '2026-03-04'::DATE), churn_delta_mrr, NULL)) AS churn_prev,
        MAX(IFF(pivot_day = '2026-03-04'::DATE, net_new_mrr, NULL)) AS net_new_curr,
        MAX(IFF(pivot_day = DATEADD('DAY', -7, '2026-03-04'::DATE), net_new_mrr, NULL)) AS net_new_prev
    FROM calc
)
SELECT * FROM pivoted;
business_question: What was the week-over-week change in ARR and MRR, and what drove the delta (new, new-to-business, expansion, churn) for the latest week?

query_text:
WITH last_7 AS (
    SELECT
        pivot_day,
        SUM(mrr)::NUMERIC(18, 2) AS total_mrr
    FROM ANALYTICS.BI.DAILY_CUSTOMER_MRR
    WHERE pivot_day IN (
        CURRENT_DATE() - 1,
        DATEADD('DAY', -7, CURRENT_DATE() - 1)
    )
        AND is_latest_pivot_day_of_period = TRUE
    GROUP BY 1
), month_end AS (
    SELECT
        period,
        SUM(mrr)::NUMERIC(18, 2) AS total_mrr
    FROM ANALYTICS.BI.DAILY_CUSTOMER_MRR
    WHERE period IN (
        DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', CURRENT_DATE() - 1),
        DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', DATEADD('MONTH', -1, CURRENT_DATE() - 1))
    )
        AND is_latest_pivot_day_of_period = TRUE
    GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT
    (SELECT total_mrr FROM last_7 WHERE pivot_day = CURRENT_DATE() - 1) AS current_mrr,
    (SELECT total_mrr FROM last_7 WHERE pivot_day = DATEADD('DAY', -7, CURRENT_DATE() - 1)) AS mrr_last_week,
    (SELECT total_mrr FROM month_end WHERE period = DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', CURRENT_DATE() - 1)) AS mrr_last_month_end,
    (SELECT total_mrr FROM month_end WHERE period = DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', DATEADD('MONTH', -1, CURRENT_DATE() - 1))) AS mrr_prev_month_end;
business_question: What is the current MRR, how did it compare to last week, and how did last month’s end MRR compare to the prior month?

query_text:
SELECT * FROM (WITH monthly AS (
    SELECT
        period,
        SUM(mrr)::NUMERIC(18, 2) AS mrr
    FROM ANALYTICS.BI.MONTHLY_CUSTOMER_MRR
    WHERE pivot_day = LAST_DAY(period)
      AND period IN ('2026-01-01'::DATE, '2026-02-01'::DATE)
    GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT
    period,
    mrr,
    mrr - LAG(mrr) OVER (ORDER BY period) AS mom_change_mrr,
    DIV0NULL(mrr - LAG(mrr) OVER (ORDER BY period), LAG(mrr) OVER (ORDER BY period)) AS mom_change_pct
FROM monthly
ORDER BY period) AS semantic_agent_query LIMIT 500

query_text:
WITH subscribed_users AS (
    SELECT
        USER_ID,
        CHANNEL_GROUP,
        SUBSCRIPTION_START_DATE,
        CHURN_MONTH_START_DATE,
        DATEDIFF('day', SUBSCRIPTION_START_DATE, CHURN_MONTH_START_DATE) AS days_to_churn
    FROM ANALYTICS.BI.MARKETING_FUNNEL_ANALYSIS
    WHERE SUBSCRIPTION_START_DATE IS NOT NULL
      -- Only include subscriptions at least 31 days old so they had a chance to churn in month 1
      AND SUBSCRIPTION_START_DATE <= DATEADD('day', -31, CURRENT_DATE())
      -- Focus on recent-ish cohorts for relevance (last 12 months)
      AND SUBSCRIPTION_START_DATE >= DATEADD('month', -12, CURRENT_DATE())
),

churn_analysis AS (
    SELECT
        CHANNEL_GROUP,
        COUNT(*) AS total_subscribed,
        COUNT_IF(CHURN_MONTH_START_DATE IS NOT NULL AND days_to_churn <= 31) AS churned_first_month,
        ROUND(100.0 * COUNT_IF(CHURN_MONTH_START_DATE IS NOT NULL AND days_to_churn <= 31) / COUNT(*), 2) AS first_month_churn_rate_pct
    FROM subscribed_users
    GROUP BY 1
)

SELECT
    CHANNEL_GROUP,
    total_subscribed,
    churned_first_month,
    first_month_churn_rate_pct
FROM churn_analysis
ORDER BY total_subscribed DESC
business_question: What is the first-month churn rate by channel group for subscriptions started in the last 12 months?

select 
        p.person_id,
        ANY_VALUE(p.full_name) AS full_name, 
        ANY_VALUE(p.email) AS email,
        ANY_VALUE(p.start_date) AS hiring_date,
        -- AE start date derived from work history
        MIN(IFF(w.job_title ILIKE '%account executive%', w.from_date, NULL)) AS start_date,
        -- Termination date derived from lifecycle history
        MAX(IFF(lc.status = 'terminated', lc.from_date, NULL)) AS termination_date
    from ANALYTICS.STG.STG_HIBOB__PEOPLE p
    LEFT JOIN ANALYTICS.STG.STG_HIBOB__WORK_HISTORY w
        ON p.person_id = w.person_id
    LEFT JOIN ANALYTICS.STG.STG_HIBOB__LIFECYCLE_HISTORY lc
        ON p.person_id = lc.person_id
    GROUP BY p.person_id

query_text:
select

query_text:
WITH
deals AS (
	SELECT * REPLACE (
		IFF(TRIM(LOWER(deal_type)) = 'renewals',
			renewal_expansion_mrr,
			deal_mrr
		) AS deal_mrr 
        )
	FROM ANALYTICS.bi.sales_deals
	WHERE is_won
),

commission_exceptions AS (
	SELECT *
	FROM ANALYTICS.stg.stg_google_drive__commission_exceptions_to_override
),

rep_quotas AS (
	SELECT
		
		rep_id,
		sales_team,
		team_lead,
		team_lead_id,
		director,
		director_id,
		quota_period,
		is_manager,
		is_director,
		quota_start_date,
		quota_end_date
	FROM ANALYTICS.stg.stg_google_drive__sales_representative_targets
	WHERE department = 'Sales'
),

owners AS (
	SELECT
		full_name,
		owner_id,
		email AS owner_email
	FROM ANALYTICS.stg.stg_hubspot__owners
),

early_churn_deals AS (
	SELECT
		deal_id,
		deal_churn_date,
		entered_at AS churn_accounted_date,
		accounted_quarter_name AS quarter_churn_was_accounted,
		is_same_q_churn
	FROM ANALYTICS.bi.early_churn_for_commission_reduction
    WHERE deal_closed_at::DATE >= '2024-11-01'
),

reps_with_id AS (
	SELECT
		o.owner_id,
		o.full_name AS rep_name,
		o.owner_email AS rep_email,
		ot.owner_email AS team_lead_email,
		od.owner_email AS director_email,
		r.*
	FROM rep_quotas r
	LEFT JOIN owners o ON r.rep_id = o.owner_id
	LEFT JOIN owners ot ON r.team_lead_id = ot.owner_id
	LEFT JOIN owners od ON r.director_id = od.owner_id
),

deals_with_multipliers AS (
	SELECT
		d.*,
		
		CASE
					WHEN (deal_mrr > 4250 AND deal_created_quarter_name = '2025-Q3' and d.deal_closed_quarter_name = '2025-Q4') THEN 1.15
					WHEN (deal_mrr > 4250 AND deal_created_quarter_name = '2025-Q3' and d.deal_closed_quarter_name = '2025-Q3') THEN 1.15
				ELSE 0
			END AS above_4250_mrr_deals_opened_in_q3_multiplier,CASE
					WHEN (pricing_company_level = 'Enterprise' AND deal_created_quarter_name = deal_closed_quarter_name AND (deal_type ilike '%europe%' OR deal_type ilike '%agency%') and d.deal_closed_quarter_name = '2025-Q3') THEN 1.1
				ELSE 0
			END AS enterprise_pricing_deals_created_and_closed_same_quarter_multiplier,CASE
					WHEN (deal_type in ('Agency New Sales', 'Europe New Sales')
AND deal_mrr > 1000 AND deal_mrr > 1000 and d.deal_closed_quarter_name = '2025-Q3') THEN 1.1
				ELSE 0
			END AS agency_pipeline_deal_over_1000_mrr_multiplier,CASE
					WHEN (pricing_company_level = 'Strategic' AND (deal_created_quarter_name = '2025-Q2' OR deal_created_quarter_name = '2025-Q3')
 and d.deal_closed_quarter_name = '2025-Q3') THEN 1.15
				ELSE 0
			END AS strategic_pricing_deal_opened_in_q2_or_q3_multiplier,CASE
					WHEN (term_length = 'two_years' AND deal_payment_interval = 'Every 2 Years' and d.deal_closed_quarter_name = '2025-Q3') THEN 1.5
					WHEN (term_length = 'two_years' AND deal_payment_interval = 'Every 2 Years' and d.deal_closed_quarter_name = '2025-Q4') THEN 1.5
				ELSE 0
			END AS two_year_deal_both_years_paid_upfront_multiplier,CASE
					WHEN (term_length = 'two_years' AND deal_payment_interval = 'Annually' and d.deal_closed_quarter_name = '2025-Q3') THEN 1.3
					WHEN (term_length = 'two_years' AND deal_payment_interval = 'Annually' and d.deal_closed_quarter_name = '2025-Q4') THEN 1.3
				ELSE 0
			END AS two_year_deal_paid_annually_multiplier,CASE
					WHEN (lower(add_on_line_item) ilike '%webinar%' and d.deal_closed_quarter_name = '2025-Q3') THEN 1.0
					WHEN (lower(add_on_line_item) ilike '%webinar%' and d.deal_closed_quarter_name = '2025-Q4') THEN 2.0
				ELSE 0
			END AS webinar_add_on_multiplier,CASE
					WHEN (0=1 and d.deal_closed_quarter_name = '2025-Q3') THEN 0.5
					WHEN (0=1 and d.deal_closed_quarter_name = '2025-Q4') THEN 0.5
				ELSE 0
			END AS overachievement_multiplier,CASE
					WHEN (won_with_ae_assist and d.deal_closed_quarter_name = '2025-Q3') THEN 0.5
					WHEN (won_with_ae_assist and d.deal_closed_quarter_name = '2025-Q4') THEN 0.5
				ELSE 0
			END AS upsell_with_ae_assist_multiplier

		
		,
		(
		d.deal_mrr * (
			1
				+ (COALESCE(NULLIF(above_4250_mrr_deals_opened_in_q3_multiplier, 0), 1) - 1)
				+ (COALESCE(NULLIF(above_4250_mrr_deals_opened_in_q3_multiplier, 0), 1) - 1)
				+ (COALESCE(NULLIF(enterprise_pricing_deals_created_and_closed_same_quarter_multiplier, 0), 1) - 1)
				+ (COALESCE(NULLIF(agency_pipeline_deal_over_1000_mrr_multiplier, 0), 1) - 1)
				+ (COALESCE(NULLIF(strategic_pricing_deal_opened_in_q2_or_q3_multiplier, 0), 1) - 1)
				+ (COALESCE(NULLIF(two_year_deal_both_years_paid_upfront_multiplier, 0), 1) - 1)
				+ (COALESCE(NULLIF(two_year_deal_both_years_paid_upfront_multiplier, 0), 1) - 1)
				+ (COALESCE(NULLIF(two_year_deal_paid_annually_multiplier, 0), 1) - 1)
				+ (COALESCE(NULLIF(two_year_deal_paid_annually_multiplier, 0), 1) - 1)
				+ (COALESCE(NULLIF(overachievement_multiplier, 0), 1) - 1)
				+ (COALESCE(NULLIF(overachievement_multiplier, 0), 1) - 1)
				+ (COALESCE(NULLIF(upsell_with_ae_assist_multiplier, 0), 1) - 1)
				+ (COALESCE(NULLIF(upsell_with_ae_assist_multiplier, 0), 1) - 1))
		) +
		(
        COALESCE(d.webinar_add_on_mrr, 0)* (
            1
            
                + (COALESCE(NULLIF(webinar_add_on_multiplier, 0), 1) - 1)
                + (COALESCE(NULLIF(webinar_add_on_multiplier, 0), 1) - 1))
        ) AS owner_eligible_mrr
		FROM deals d
),

upsells_team_lookup AS (
	
	SELECT
		d.*,
		
		COALESCE(
			rd.rep_id, 
			rs.rep_id 
		) AS rep_id
	FROM deals_with_multipliers d
	LEFT JOIN reps_with_id rs
		ON d.source_deal_owner_id = rs.owner_id
		AND d.closed_at::DATE BETWEEN rs.quota_start_date AND rs.quota_end_date
	LEFT JOIN reps_with_id rd
		ON d.deal_owner_id = rd.owner_id
		AND d.closed_at::DATE BETWEEN rd.quota_start_date AND rd.quota_end_date
	
	WHERE (
		(TRIM(LOWER(d.deal_type)) = 'renewals' AND expansion_mrr > 0)
		OR (TRIM(LOWER(d.deal_type)) = 'upsell pipeline')
	)
	AND (
		d.closed_at <= DATEADD(month, 6, d.source_deal_close_date)
		OR d.won_with_ae_assist
	)
),

include_leadership AS (
	
	SELECT
		d.*,
		d.closed_at AS close_ts,
		
		r.rep_id AS rep_id_for_commission,
		r.rep_name AS rep_name_for_commission,
		r.rep_email,
		r.sales_team AS sales_team_for_commission,
		r.team_lead_id AS team_lead_id_for_commission,
		r.team_lead AS team_lead_name_for_commission,
		r.team_lead_email,
		r.director_id AS director_id_for_commission,
		r.director AS director_name_for_commission,
		r.director_email,
		r.is_director
	FROM deals_with_multipliers d
	LEFT JOIN reps_with_id r
		ON r.owner_id = d.deal_owner_id
		AND d.closed_at::DATE BETWEEN r.quota_start_date AND r.quota_end_date
	WHERE LOWER(d.deal_type) NOT IN ('renewals', 'upsell pipeline')

	UNION ALL

	
	SELECT
		utl.* EXCLUDE (rep_id),
		utl.closed_at AS close_ts,
		
		utl.rep_id AS rep_id_for_commission,
		r.rep_name AS rep_name_for_commission,
		r.rep_email,
		r.sales_team AS sales_team_for_commission,
		r.team_lead_id AS team_lead_id_for_commission,
		r.team_lead AS team_lead_name_for_commission,
		r.team_lead_email,
		r.director_id AS director_id_for_commission,
		r.director AS director_name_for_commission,
		r.director_email,
		r.is_director
	FROM upsells_team_lookup utl
	LEFT JOIN reps_with_id r
		ON utl.rep_id = r.owner_id
		AND utl.closed_at::DATE BETWEEN r.quota_start_date AND r.quota_end_date
),

final AS (
	SELECT
		il.* REPLACE(
            
			IFF(ce.deal_id IS NOT NULL, ce.rep_id, il.rep_id_for_commission) AS rep_id_for_commission,
			IFF(ce.deal_id IS NOT NULL, ce.rep_name, il.rep_name_for_commission) AS rep_name_for_commission,
			IFF(ce.deal_id IS NOT NULL, ce.rep_email, il.rep_email) AS rep_email,
			IFF(ce.deal_id IS NOT NULL, ce.team_lead_id, il.team_lead_id_for_commission) AS team_lead_id_for_commission,
			IFF(ce.deal_id IS NOT NULL, ce.team_lead_name, il.team_lead_name_for_commission) AS team_lead_name_for_commission,
			IFF(ce.deal_id IS NOT NULL, ce.team_lead_email, il.team_lead_email) AS team_lead_email,
			IFF(ce.deal_id IS NOT NULL, ce.director_id, il.director_id_for_commission) AS director_id_for_commission,
			IFF(ce.deal_id IS NOT NULL, ce.director_name, il.director_name_for_commission) AS director_name_for_commission,
			IFF(ce.deal_id IS NOT NULL, ce.director_email, il.director_email) AS director_email
		),
		ecd.deal_churn_date,
		ecd.churn_accounted_date,
		ecd.quarter_churn_was_accounted,
		ecd.is_same_q_churn
	FROM include_leadership il
	LEFT JOIN commission_exceptions ce
		ON il.deal_id = ce.deal_id
	LEFT JOIN early_churn_deals ecd
		ON il.deal_id = ecd.deal_id
)

query_text:
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('DAY', "ACTIVITY_DATE") AS "ACTIVITY_DATE",
  DAYNAME(ACTIVITY_DATE) AS "DAY_NAME",
  COUNT(IFF(ACTIVITY = 'First Visit', 1, NULL)) AS "# First Visit",
  IFF(
    COUNT(IFF(ACTIVITY = 'First Visit', 1, NULL)) > 0,
    CONCAT(
      TO_CHAR(
        ROUND(
          (
            COUNT(IFF(ACTIVITY = 'Sign Up', 1, NULL)) / COUNT(IFF(ACTIVITY = 'First Visit', 1, NULL))
          ) * 100,
          2
        )
      ),
      '%'
    ),
    NULL
  ) AS "CVR First Visit To Sign Up",
  COUNT(IFF(ACTIVITY = 'Sign Up', 1, NULL)) AS "# Sign Ups",
  IFF(
    COUNT(IFF(ACTIVITY = 'Sign Up', 1, NULL)) > 0,
    CONCAT(
      TO_CHAR(
        ROUND(
          (
            COUNT(IFF(ACTIVITY = 'New', 1, NULL)) / COUNT(IFF(ACTIVITY = 'Sign Up', 1, NULL))
          ) * 100,
          2
        )
      ),
      '%'
    ),
    NULL
  ) AS "CVR Sign Up To Customers",
  COUNT(IFF(ACTIVITY = 'New', 1, NULL)) AS "# New Customers",
  SUM(CASE WHEN MRR_ACTIVITY = 'New' THEN DELTA_MRR END) * 12 AS "New ARR",
  IFF(
    COUNT(IFF(ACTIVITY = 'New', 1, NULL)) > 0,
    (
      SUM(CASE WHEN MRR_ACTIVITY = 'New' THEN DELTA_MRR END) * 12
    ) / COUNT(IFF(ACTIVITY = 'New', 1, NULL)),
    0
  ) AS "New ARPU",
  COUNT(IFF(ACTIVITY = 'Reactivation', 1, NULL)) AS "# Reactivated",
  SUM(CASE WHEN MRR_ACTIVITY = 'Reactivation' THEN DELTA_MRR END) * 12 AS "Reactivated ARR",
  IFF(
    COUNT(IFF(ACTIVITY = 'Reactivation', 1, NULL)) > 0,
    (
      SUM(CASE WHEN MRR_ACTIVITY = 'Reactivation' THEN DELTA_MRR END) * 12
    ) / COUNT(IFF(ACTIVITY = 'Reactivation', 1, NULL)),
    0
  ) AS "Reactivated ARPU",
  COUNT(IFF(ACTIVITY = 'Expansion', 1, NULL)) AS "# Expansions",
  SUM(CASE WHEN MRR_ACTIVITY = 'Expansion' THEN DELTA_MRR END) * 12 AS "Expansion ARR",
  IFF(
    COUNT(IFF(ACTIVITY = 'Expansion', 1, NULL)) > 0,
    (
      SUM(CASE WHEN MRR_ACTIVITY = 'Expansion' THEN DELTA_MRR END) * 12
    ) / COUNT(IFF(ACTIVITY = 'Expansion', 1, NULL)),
    0
  ) AS "Expansion ARPU",
  COUNT(IFF(ACTIVITY = 'Reduction', 1, NULL)) AS "# Reductions",
  SUM(CASE WHEN MRR_ACTIVITY = 'Reduction' THEN DELTA_MRR END) * 12 AS "Reduction ARR",
  IFF(
    COUNT(IFF(ACTIVITY = 'Reduction', 1, NULL)) > 0,
    (
      SUM(CASE WHEN MRR_ACTIVITY = 'Reduction' THEN DELTA_MRR END) * 12
    ) / COUNT(IFF(ACTIVITY = 'Reduction', 1, NULL)),
    0
  ) AS "Reduction ARPU",
  COUNT(IFF(ACTIVITY = 'Churn', 1, NULL)) AS "# Churns",
  SUM(CASE WHEN MRR_ACTIVITY = 'Churn' THEN DELTA_MRR END) * 12 AS "Churn ARR",
  IFF(
    COUNT(IFF(ACTIVITY = 'Churn', 1, NULL)) > 0,
    (
      SUM(CASE WHEN MRR_ACTIVITY = 'Churn' THEN DELTA_MRR END) * 12
    ) / COUNT(IFF(ACTIVITY = 'Churn', 1, NULL)),
    0
  ) AS "Churn ARPU",
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ACTIVITY IN ('New', 'Reactivation') THEN customer_id END) - COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ACTIVITY IN ('Churn') THEN customer_id END) AS "Net New Customers",
  SUM(DELTA_MRR) AS "Net New MRR",
  IFF(
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ACTIVITY IN ('New', 'Reactivation') THEN customer_id END) - COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ACTIVITY IN ('Churn') THEN customer_id END) > 0,
    SUM(DELTA_MRR) * 12 / COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ACTIVITY IN ('New', 'Reactivation') THEN customer_id END) - COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ACTIVITY IN ('Churn') THEN customer_id END),
    0
  ) AS "Net New ARPU",
  SUM(DELTA_MRR) * 12 AS "Net New ARR"
FROM analytics.atm.daily_self_service_metrics
WHERE
  (
    (
      ACTIVITY_DATE <= CURRENT_DATE - 1
    )
  )
GROUP BY
  DATE_TRUNC('DAY', "ACTIVITY_DATE"),
  DAYNAME(ACTIVITY_DATE)
ORDER BY
  "# First Visit" DESC
LIMIT 10000 /* 6dcd92a04feb50f14bbcf07c661680ba; */

WITH
monthly_nrr AS (
        SELECT 
                * REPLACE (

                                TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(
                                        company_market,
                                        '()',
                                        '',
                                        1, 0, 'i' 
                                )) AS company_market ,

                                TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(
                                        last_touch_source,
                                        '()',
                                        '',
                                        1, 0, 'i' 
                                )) AS last_touch_source 

                ) 
        FROM analytics.bi.acq_period_monthly_grr_nrr_new
        WHERE customer_group_first_business_period >= '2021-01-01'

                        AND customer_group_product_type NOT IN( 'Self-Service')
                        AND customer_group_first_business_period = '2024-03-01'
and company_market = 'Enterprise'
and last_touch_source = 'Inbound'

cohorts_size AS (
        SELECT
                company_market, last_touch_source,
                COUNT(DISTINCT customer_group_id) AS cohort_size,
                 FALSE  AS is_residual_group
        FROM monthly_nrr

        group by 1,2

        QUALIFY SUM(cohort_size) OVER (PARTITION BY is_residual_group) >= 0 
)
