query_text:
WITH 
requests_raw as (
    SELECT
        ai.timestamp,
        ai.id as request_id,
        ai.resource_id as user_id,
        ai.thread_id,
        ai.run_id,
        ai.request,
        case
            when m.product_type in ('Business', 'Self-Service') 
            then m.product_type
            
            when ai.timestamp
                between a.trial_started_at
                and least(a.trial_cancelled_at, a.trial_ended_at, a.trial_expired_at)
            then 'Trial'
            else 'Free'
        end as account_type

    from analytics.stg.stg_eds__ai_agent_result ai
    left join ANALYTICS.FS.USERS u on ai.resource_id = u.user_id
    left join analytics.bi.daily_customer_mrr m on u.account_id = m.account_id and date(ai.timestamp) = m.pivot_day
    join analytics.fs.accounts a on u.account_id = a.account_id
    where 1=1
        and year >= 2025
        and timestamp >= '2025-09-21 00:00:00.000'
        and domain = 'editor'
    qualify row_number() over(partition by ai.id order by timestamp desc) = 1 -- 7% of requests are duplicated rows
)

, requests_parsed AS (
    select 
        * exclude(r1,r2,r3,r4,r5,r6),
        r6 as request_str_bofore_translate,
        row_number() over(partition by thread_id order by timestamp asc) as rn_in_thread, 
        row_number() over(partition by run_id order by timestamp asc) as rn_in_run
    from 
    (
    select 
        *,
        REGEXP_REPLACE(request, '\\n|\\t','') as r1,
        SUBSTR(r1, 37) as r2,
        replace(r2,'\\302\\240', '') as r3,
        replace(r3, '"', '') as r4,
        left(r4, LENGTH(r4) - 2) as r5,
        replace(r5,'\\', '') as r6
        
    from requests_raw
    where r6 IS NOT NULL 
      and trim(r6) != ''
    )
)

, requests_to_english as (
select 
    *,
    CASE
    --------------------------------------------------
    -- German: Audio / quality / cleanup
    --------------------------------------------------
    WHEN LOWER(TRIM(request_str_bofore_translate)) IN ('ton verbessern') THEN 'improve sound'
    
    --------------------------------------------------
    -- German: remove unnecessary parts / pauses / filler
    --------------------------------------------------
    WHEN LOWER(TRIM(request_str_bofore_translate)) IN ('unn303266tige teile entfernen', 'unnötige teile entfernen') 
        THEN 'remove unnecessary parts'
        
    WHEN request_str_bofore_translate ILIKE 'Pausen, F303274llw303266rter und St303266rger303244usche entfernen%'
      OR request_str_bofore_translate ILIKE 'Pausen, Füllwörter und Störgeräusche entfernen%'
      OR request_str_bofore_translate ILIKE 'Entfernt Pausen, F303274llw303266rter und St303266rger303244usche%'
      OR request_str_bofore_translate ILIKE 'Entfernt Pausen, Füllwörter und Störgeräusche%'
        THEN 'remove pauses, filler words and background noise'
        
    --------------------------------------------------
    -- German: visuals / layouts / captions
    --------------------------------------------------
    WHEN LOWER(TRIM(request_str_bofore_translate)) IN ('visuals verbessern') 
        THEN 'enhance visuals'
        
    WHEN request_str_bofore_translate ILIKE 'F303274ge intelligente Layouts und Untertitel hinzu%'
      OR request_str_bofore_translate ILIKE 'füge intelligente layouts und untertitel hinzu%'
        THEN 'add smart layouts and captions'
        
    WHEN LOWER(TRIM(request_str_bofore_translate)) IN ('bild f303274r soziale medien erstellen', 'bild für soziale medien erstellen')
        THEN 'create a social media image'
        
    WHEN LOWER(TRIM(request_str_bofore_translate)) IN ('untertitel f303274r einen instagram-beitrag erstellen',
                                      'untertitel für einen instagram-beitrag erstellen')
        THEN 'create a caption for an instagram post'
        
    --------------------------------------------------
    -- German: share-ready / show notes / descriptions / blog
    --------------------------------------------------
    WHEN LOWER(TRIM(request_str_bofore_translate)) IN ('zum teilen bereit machen') 
        THEN 'make ready to share'
        
    WHEN LOWER(TRIM(request_str_bofore_translate)) IN ('show notes generieren f303274r youtube',
                                      'show notes generieren für youtube')
        THEN 'generate show notes for youtube'
        
    WHEN LOWER(TRIM(request_str_bofore_translate)) IN ('show notes generieren f303274r spotify',
                                      'show notes generieren für spotify')
        THEN 'generate show notes for spotify'
        
    WHEN LOWER(TRIM(request_str_bofore_translate)) IN ('beschreibung der episode erstellen')
        THEN 'create an episode description'
        
    WHEN request_str_bofore_translate ILIKE 'Bitte erstelle einen ausf303274hrlichen Blogbeitrag%'
      OR request_str_bofore_translate ILIKE 'bitte erstelle einen ausführlichen blogbeitrag%'
        THEN 'create a blog post'
        
    --------------------------------------------------
    -- German: promo trailer
    --------------------------------------------------
    WHEN LOWER(TRIM(request_str_bofore_translate)) IN ('promo-trailer-clip erstellen')
        THEN 'create a promo trailer clip'
        
    --------------------------------------------------
    -- German: show notes variants
    --------------------------------------------------
    WHEN LOWER(TRIM(request_str_bofore_translate)) IN ('shownotes', 'shownotes bitte', 'please create shownotes')
        THEN 'create show notes'
        
    --------------------------------------------------
    -- Multilingual yes / no normalization
    -- (only for single-token confirmations)
    --------------------------------------------------
    WHEN LOWER(TRIM(request_str_bofore_translate)) IN ('ja', 'si', 'oui', 'sim') 
        THEN 'yes'
        
    WHEN LOWER(TRIM(request_str_bofore_translate)) IN ('nein') 
        THEN 'no'
        
    WHEN LOWER(TRIM(request_str_bofore_translate)) IN ('ja bitte', 'ja, bitte', 'ja bitte.', 'ja bitte!') 
        THEN 'yes please'
        
    --------------------------------------------------
    -- Fallback: leave as-is
    --------------------------------------------------
    ELSE request_str_bofore_translate
    END AS request_str

    from requests_parsed

)
, clip_per_request as (
select 
    cc.request_id
    , max_by(e.clip_id, e.timestamp) clip_id
    
from requests_to_english cc
left join analytics.stg.stg_segment__clip_editor_opened e
    on cc.user_id = e.user_id
    and e.timestamp < cc.timestamp
group by 1
)

, classified_suggestions as (
select 
        *,
        case
            -- quick edites
            when request_str = 'Make ready to share' then                       'Make ready to share'
            when request_str in ('Improve sound', 'Improve sound\302\240') then 'Improve sound'
            when request_str = 'Remove unnecessary parts' then                  'Remove unnecessary parts'
            when request_str = 'Enhance visuals' then                           'Enhance visuals'
            -- AI tolls             
            when request_str = 'Find fluff' then                                'Find fluff'
            when request_str = 'Fix eye contact' then                           'Fix eye contact'
            when request_str = 'Apply magic audio' then                         'Apply magic audio'
            when request_str = 'Remove pauses' then                             'Remove pauses'
            when request_str in ('Remove filler words', 'Clean fluff, pauses and filler words') 
                                                                           then 'Remove filler words'
            when request_str = 'Apply smart mute' then                          'Apply smart mute'
            when request_str  in ('Apply smart layouts', 'Apply smart layouts and captions')
                                                                            then 'Enhance visuals'
            when request_str = 'Add background music' then                      'Add background music'
            when request_str = 'Add B-roll footage' then                        'Add B-roll footage'
            -- promote
            when request_str = 'Create a magic clip' then                       'Create a magic clip'
            when request_str = 'Create a promo trailer clip' then               'Create a promo trailer clip'
            when request_str = 'Generate a thumbnail' then                       'Generate a thumbnail'
            when request_str = 'Create a social media image' then               'Create a social media image'
            when request_str = 'Give 5 options for an episode title' then       'Give 5 options for an episode title'
            when request_str = 'Create an episode description' then             'Create an episode description'
            when request_str like 'Create show notes for Youtube%' then            'Create show notes'
            when request_str like 'Create show notes for Spotify%' then            'Create show notes'
            when request_str like 'Create show notes for Apple Podcasts%' then     'Create show notes'
            when request_str = 'Create a newsletter email' then                 'Create a newsletter email'
            when request_str = 'Create a blog post' then                        'Create a blog post'
            when request_str = 'Create a LinkedIn post' then                    'Create a LinkedIn post'
            when request_str = 'Create a caption for an Instagram post' then    'Create a caption for an Instagram post'
            when request_str = 'Create a thread for X' then                     'Create a thread for X'
            when request_str = 'Create a list with the top insights' then       'Create a list with the top insights'

        end as suggestion_sub_category,

        case when suggestion_sub_category is not null then True else False end as is_suggestion,
        case 
            when 
                suggestion_sub_category in (
                    'Make ready to share',
                    'Improve sound', 'Improve soundÂ ',
                    'Remove unnecessary parts',
                    'Enhance visuals'
                )
            then 'Quick edites'

            when suggestion_sub_category in (
                    'Find fluff',
                    'Fix eye contact',
                    'Apply magic audio',
                    'Remove pauses',
                    'Remove filler words', 'Clean fluff, pauses and filler words',
                    'Apply smart mute',
                    'Apply smart layouts', 'Apply smart layouts and captions',
                    'Add background music',
                    'Add B-roll footage' 
                    )
            then 'AI tools'

            when suggestion_sub_category in (
                    'Create a magic clip',
                    'Create a promo trailer clip',
                    'Generate a thumbnail',
                    'Create a social media image',
                    'Give 5 options for an episode title',
                    'Create an episode description',
                    'Create show notes',
                    'Create a newsletter email',
                    'Create a blog post',
                    'Create a LinkedIn post',
                    'Create a caption for an Instagram post',
                    'Create a thread for X',
                    'Create a list with the top insights'
            )
            then 'Promote'
        end as suggestion_category,
        case 
            when 
                suggestion_sub_category in (
                    'Make ready to share',
                    'Improve sound',
                    'Remove unnecessary parts',
                    'Enhance visuals',
                    'Find fluff',
                    'Fix eye contact',
                    'Apply magic audio',
                    'Remove pauses',
                    'Remove filler words',
                    'Apply smart mute',
                    'Enhance visuals',
                    'Add background music',
                    'Add B-roll footage'
                )
            then 'edit clip'

            when suggestion_sub_category in (
                    'Create a magic clip',
                    'Create a promo trailer clip'
                )
            then 'create clip'

            when suggestion_sub_category in (
                    'Generate a thumbnail',
                    'Create a social media image'
                )
            then 'create image'

            when suggestion_sub_category in (
                    'Give 5 options for an episode title',
                    'Create an episode description',
                    'Create show notes',
                    'Create a newsletter email',
                    'Create a blog post',
                    'Create a LinkedIn post',
                    'Create a caption for an Instagram post',
                    'Create a thread for X',
                    'Create a list with the top insights'
                )
            then 'create text'

        end as required_output,
        rn_in_thread = 1 as is_first_in_thread
        
from requests_to_english
)

, requests_with_clip_info as (
select 
    cs.*
    , c.clip_id
        
from classified_suggestions cs
left join clip_per_request c
    on cs.request_id = c.request_id
)

, tools as (
select 
        run_id
        , max(timestamp) as first_tool_timestamp
        , max_by(tool_name, timestamp) as first_tool_name
        , max_by(tool_call_id, timestamp) as first_tool_call_id
        , array_agg(tool_call_id) tool_call_id_array
        , min(timestamp) as last_tool_timestamp
        , min_by(tool_name, timestamp) as last_tool_name
        , min_by(tool_call_id, timestamp) as last_tool_call_id
        , count(1) num_tool_calls
        , count(distinct tool_name) distinct_tools
        , ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT tool_name) as tool_name_array
FROM analytics.stg.stg_eds__ai_agent_tool_result
group by 1
)
, add_tools as (
        select 
                r.*
                , t.* exclude(run_id)
        from requests_with_clip_info r
        left join tools t
            on r.run_id = t.run_id
            
)
select 
        *
from add_tools
where date(timestamp) between '2025-10-20' and '2025-12-04'

query_text:
with 
cte as (
select 
        row_number() over(partition by user_id order by timestamp) = 1 as first_request_of_user_in_table,
        
        case when request_category not in ('Follow up', 'Other', 'Undo') then request_category else null end non_other_category,
        coalesce(
            LAST_VALUE(non_other_category IGNORE NULLS) OVER (partition by user_id, thread_id ORDER BY timestamp ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW),
            'Other'
        )as intent_category,
        request_category,

        CASE
    --------------------------------------------------
    -- edit clip
    --------------------------------------------------
    WHEN REQUEST_CATEGORY IN (
        'Layout',
        'Add B-roll footage',
        'Insert music',
        'Intro and outro',
        'Apply smart mute',
        'Aspect ratio',
        'Clean fluff, pauses and filler words',
        'Find fluff',
        'Remove filler words',
        'Improve video quality',
        'Merge sections',
        'Syncing issues / misaligned tracks',
        'Transcript accuracy issue',
        'Transcript language issue',
        'Insert ad breaks',
        'Preview or playback request',
        'Improve sound',
        'Delete specific part',
        'Add background music',
        'Edit captions',
        'Transcript styling & placement',
        'Brand',
        'Remove pauses',
        'Speed control',
        'Upload media',
        'Audio mixing & controls',
        'Chapters & timestamps',
        'Enhance visuals',
        'Remove unnecessary parts',
        'Text overlay',
        'Search',
        'Apply magic audio',
        'Make ready to share',
        'Fix eye contact',
        'Add captions'
    ) THEN 'edit clip'

    --------------------------------------------------
    -- create text
    --------------------------------------------------
    WHEN REQUEST_CATEGORY IN (
        'Download transcript',
        'Create show notes',
        'Create description',
        'Create a list with the top insights',
        'Give 5 options for an episode title',
        'Create social media post',
        'Create summary',
        'Create a LinkedIn post',
        'Create a blog post',
        'Create keywords',
        'Create an episode description',
        'Create a caption for an Instagram post',
        'Create a newsletter email',
        'Create a thread for X'
    ) THEN 'create text'

    --------------------------------------------------
    -- create clip
    --------------------------------------------------
    WHEN REQUEST_CATEGORY IN (
        'Create hook',
        'Export video',
        'Create a magic clip',
        -- 'Download tracks',
        'Create a short promo clip'
    ) THEN 'create clip'

    --------------------------------------------------
    -- create image
    --------------------------------------------------
    WHEN REQUEST_CATEGORY IN (
        'Export image',
        'Generate a thumbnail',
        'Create a social media image'
    ) THEN 'create image'

    --------------------------------------------------
    -- create audio
    --------------------------------------------------
    WHEN REQUEST_CATEGORY IN (
        'Export audio'
    ) THEN 'create audio'

    --------------------------------------------------
    -- Unknown
    --------------------------------------------------
    WHEN REQUEST_CATEGORY IN (
        'Undo',
        'Other',
        'Follow up',
        'AI issues / processing problems'
    ) THEN 'Unknown'
    else required_output

    END AS required_output,

    * exclude(required_output, request_category)        
from ANALYTICS.BA.CO_CREATOR_EDITOR_CLASSIFIED_REQUESTS
 -- where request_id in ('648b67d5-bb03-4080-914a-b21e05eadd3e', 'c0b6a4a7-5828-4627-ba4d-cd1ebecf1a3b',  '01667979-9d3c-4471-b2c8-ec565dc51763', '639ea749-2259-4a60-8b05-25738dbf36ef')

)

-- select * from cte order by user_id, timestamp;
, cte2 as (

        select 
            *,
            lag(intent_category) ignore nulls over(partition by user_id, thread_id order by timestamp) as prev_intent_category
        from cte

)

, cte3 as 
(select 
        

        case 
            when is_first_in_thread then true
            when first_request_of_user_in_table then true
            when prev_intent_category is null then true -- edge case where first request by user is other
            when intent_category = prev_intent_category then False
            when intent_category != prev_intent_category then True
        end is_new_intent,
        SUM(CASE WHEN is_new_intent THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) OVER (PARTITION BY user_id, thread_id ORDER BY timestamp ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS intent_group,

        *
from cte2
),

cte4 as (
select 
    MIN_BY(request_id, timestamp) OVER (PARTITION BY user_id, thread_id, clip_id, intent_group) AS intent_id,
    * exclude(is_new_intent, intent_group, first_request_of_user_in_table, non_other_category, prev_intent_category)
from cte3
)

, cte5 as (
select 
    row_number() over(partition by intent_id order by timestamp) as rn_request_per_intent,
    * 
from cte4
)

, suggestion as (select distinct request_category from analytics.ba.co_creator_editor_classified_requests where is_suggestion = True)

, cte6 as (

select 
        intent_id,
        intent_category,
        user_id,
        max(case 
            when rn_request_per_intent = 1
             and is_suggestion
             -- and intent_category in (select request_category from suggestion)
            then 'suggestion'
            when rn_request_per_intent = 1
             and is_suggestion = False
             and intent_category in (select request_category from suggestion)
            then 'free text classified as suggestion'
            when rn_request_per_intent = 1
            then 'free text'
        end) suggestion_type,
    
        min(rn_in_thread) as rn_in_thread,
        min_by(required_output, timestamp) as required_output,
        min(timestamp) as timestamp,
        count(1) as num_requests,
        count_if(request_category = 'Follow up') num_followups,
        count_if(request_category = 'Other') num_others,
        count_if(request_category = 'Undo') num_undos,
        min(thread_id) as thread_id,
        min(clip_id) as clip_id,
        array_agg(distinct run_id) run_id_array,
        array_agg(request_id) as requests_array,
        min_by(request_str, timestamp) as first_request_str,
        array_agg(request_str) request_str_array,
        ARRAY_DISTINCT(ARRAY_FLATTEN(ARRAY_AGG(tool_name_array))) tool_name_array,
        sum(num_tool_calls) as num_tool_calls,
        max(case when num_tool_calls > 0 then true else false end) is_tool_called,
        ARRAY_DISTINCT(ARRAY_FLATTEN(ARRAY_AGG(tool_call_id_array))) tool_call_id_array,
        ARRAY_SIZE(ARRAY_DISTINCT(ARRAY_FLATTEN(ARRAY_AGG(tool_call_id_array)))) num_distinct_tool_calls,
        min_by(first_tool_name, timestamp) as first_tool_name

from cte5
group by all
)

, intent_level as (
select 
    *,
    lead(timestamp) over(partition by user_id order by timestamp) as next_intent_timestamp,
from cte6
)

, exported_source_clip_dedup as (
select 
    source_clip_id
    , case when max(is_export::int) = 1 then true else false end as was_exported
    , case when max(was_edited::int) = 1 then true else false end as was_edited
    , case when max(was_meaningful_export::int) = 1 then true else false end as was_meaningful_export
    , min(exported_at) as first_clip_exported_at
    , max(exported_at) as last_clip_exported_at
from analytics.fs.clips
group by 1
)

, intents as (
select 
        co.*,
        case when c.clip_id is not null then true else false end is_in_clips_table,
        c.clip_duration_in_seconds / 60.00 as clip_duration_minutes,
        case
            when c.is_magic_clip then 'magic clip'
            when c.is_magic_episode then 'magic episoide'
            when c.is_magic_hook then 'magic hook'
            when c.is_magic_segment then 'magic segment'
            else 'non magic clip'
            
        end as magic_type,

        
        coalesce(cs.was_exported, false) as was_exported,
        coalesce(cs.was_edited, false) as was_edited,
        coalesce(cs.was_meaningful_export, false) as was_meaningful_export,
        
        cs.first_clip_exported_at,
        cs.last_clip_exported_at
        
from intent_level co
left join analytics.fs.clips c on co.clip_id=c.clip_id
left join exported_source_clip_dedup cs on co.clip_id = cs.source_clip_id
)

, magic_clips_created_after_intent as (

select
    i.intent_id
    , case when max(case when c.clip_id is not null then 1 else 0 end) = 1 then True else False end as is_magic_clip_created_following_intent
    , max(c.created_at) as magic_clip_created_at
    , case when max(case when ec.was_exported then 1 else 0 end) = 1 then True else False end as is_magic_clip_created_following_intent_was_exported
    , min(ec.first_clip_exported_at) magic_clip_exported_at
    , case when max(case when ec.was_meaningful_export then 1 else 0 end) = 1 then True else False end as is_magic_clip_created_following_intent_was_meaningfull_export
    
from analytics.fs.clips c
join intents i 
    on c.created_by_user_id = i.user_id 
    and c.created_at between i.timestamp and least(i.timestamp + interval '5 minute')--, i.next_intent_timestamp) -- clip created after intent but not before next intent, and within 1 minute from intent
    and (c.is_magic_clip or c.is_magic_hook)
join exported_source_clip_dedup ec 
    on c.clip_id = ec.source_clip_id
group by 1
)

select 
    i.*,
    case 
        when i.timestamp < i.first_clip_exported_at then 'before export'
        when i.timestamp > i.first_clip_exported_at then 'after export'
    end as export_timing
    -- coalesce(m.is_magic_clip_created_following_intent, False) as is_magic_clip_created_following_intent,
    -- coalesce(m.is_magic_clip_created_following_intent_was_exported, False) as is_magic_clip_created_following_intent_was_exported,
    -- coalesce(m.is_magic_clip_created_following_intent_was_meaningfull_export, False) as is_magic_clip_created_following_intent_was_meaningfull_export,
    -- magic_clip_exported_at,
    -- magic_clip_created_at
    
from intents i 
-- left join magic_clips_created_after_intent m on i.intent_id = m.intent_id

with 
cte as (
select 
        row_number() over(partition by user_id order by timestamp) = 1 as first_request_of_user_in_table,
        
        case when request_category not in ('Follow up', 'Other', 'Undo') then request_category else null end non_other_category,
        coalesce(
            LAST_VALUE(non_other_category IGNORE NULLS) OVER (partition by user_id, thread_id ORDER BY timestamp ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW),
            'Other'
        )as intent_category,
        request_category,

        CASE
    --------------------------------------------------
    -- edit clip
    --------------------------------------------------
    WHEN REQUEST_CATEGORY IN (
        'Layout',
        'Add B-roll footage',
        'Insert music',
        'Intro and outro',
        'Apply smart mute',
        'Aspect ratio',
        'Clean fluff, pauses and filler words',
        'Find fluff',
        'Remove filler words',
        'Improve video quality',
        'Merge sections',
        'Syncing issues / misaligned tracks',
        'Transcript accuracy issue',
        'Transcript language issue',
        'Insert ad breaks',
        'Preview or playback request',
        'Improve sound',
        'Delete specific part',
        'Add background music',
        'Edit captions',
        'Transcript styling & placement',
        'Brand',
        'Remove pauses',
        'Speed control',
        'Upload media',
        'Audio mixing & controls',
        'Chapters & timestamps',
        'Enhance visuals',
        'Remove unnecessary parts',
        'Text overlay',
        'Search',
        'Apply magic audio',
        'Make ready to share',
        'Fix eye contact',
        'Add captions'
    ) THEN 'edit clip'

    --------------------------------------------------
    -- create text
    --------------------------------------------------
    WHEN REQUEST_CATEGORY IN (
        'Download transcript',
        'Create show notes',
        'Create description',
        'Create a list with the top insights',
        'Give 5 options for an episode title',
        'Create social media post',
        'Create summary',
        'Create a LinkedIn post',
        'Create a blog post',
        'Create keywords',
        'Create an episode description',
        'Create a caption for an Instagram post',
        'Create a newsletter email',
        'Create a thread for X'
    ) THEN 'create text'

    --------------------------------------------------
    -- create clip
    --------------------------------------------------
    WHEN REQUEST_CATEGORY IN (
        'Create hook',
        'Export video',
        'Create a magic clip',
        -- 'Download tracks',
        'Create a short promo clip'
    ) THEN 'create clip'

    --------------------------------------------------
    -- create image
    --------------------------------------------------
    WHEN REQUEST_CATEGORY IN (
        'Export image',
        'Generate a thumbnail',
        'Create a social media image'
    ) THEN 'create image'

    --------------------------------------------------
    -- create audio
    --------------------------------------------------
    WHEN REQUEST_CATEGORY IN (
        'Export audio'
    ) THEN 'create audio'

    --------------------------------------------------
    -- Unknown
    --------------------------------------------------
    WHEN REQUEST_CATEGORY IN (
        'Undo',
        'Other',
        'Follow up',
        'AI issues / processing problems'
    ) THEN 'Unknown'
    else required_output

    END AS required_output,

    * exclude(required_output, request_category)        
from ANALYTICS.BA.CO_CREATOR_EDITOR_CLASSIFIED_REQUESTS
where request_id in ('648b67d5-bb03-4080-914a-b21e05eadd3e', 'c0b6a4a7-5828-4627-ba4d-cd1ebecf1a3b',  '01667979-9d3c-4471-b2c8-ec565dc51763', '639ea749-2259-4a60-8b05-25738dbf36ef')

)

-- select * from cte order by user_id, timestamp;
, cte2 as (

        select 
            *,
            lag(intent_category) ignore nulls over(partition by user_id, thread_id order by timestamp) as prev_intent_category
        from cte

)

, cte3 as 
(select 
        

        case 
            when is_first_in_thread then true
            when first_request_of_user_in_table then true
            when prev_intent_category is null then true -- edge case where first request by user is other
            when intent_category = prev_intent_category then False
            when intent_category != prev_intent_category then True
        end is_new_intent,
        SUM(CASE WHEN is_new_intent THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) OVER (PARTITION BY user_id, thread_id ORDER BY timestamp ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS intent_group,

        *
from cte2
),

cte4 as (
select 
    MIN_BY(request_id, timestamp) OVER (PARTITION BY user_id, thread_id, clip_id, intent_group) AS intent_id,
    * exclude(is_new_intent, intent_group, first_request_of_user_in_table, non_other_category, prev_intent_category)
from cte3
)

, cte5 as (
select 
    row_number() over(partition by intent_id order by timestamp) as rn_request_per_intent,
    * 
from cte4
)

, suggestion as (select distinct request_category from analytics.ba.co_creator_editor_classified_requests where is_suggestion = True)

, cte6 as (

select 
        intent_id,
        intent_category,
        user_id,
        max(case 
            when rn_request_per_intent = 1
             and is_suggestion
             -- and intent_category in (select request_category from suggestion)
            then 'suggestion'
            when rn_request_per_intent = 1
             and is_suggestion = False
             and intent_category in (select request_category from suggestion)
            then 'free text classified as suggestion'
            when rn_request_per_intent = 1
            then 'free text'
        end) suggestion_type,
    
        min(rn_in_thread) as rn_in_thread,
        min_by(required_output, timestamp) as required_output,
        min(timestamp) as timestamp,
        count(1) as num_requests,
        count_if(request_category = 'Follow up') num_followups,
        count_if(request_category = 'Other') num_others,
        count_if(request_category = 'Undo') num_undos,
        min(thread_id) as thread_id,
        min(clip_id) as clip_id,
        array_agg(distinct run_id) run_id_array,
        array_agg(request_id) as requests_array,
        array_agg(request_str) request_str_aray,
        ARRAY_DISTINCT(ARRAY_FLATTEN(ARRAY_AGG(tool_name_array))) tool_name_array,
        sum(num_tool_calls) as num_tool_calls,
        max(case when num_tool_calls > 0 then true else false end) is_tool_called,
        ARRAY_DISTINCT(ARRAY_FLATTEN(ARRAY_AGG(tool_call_id_array))) tool_call_id_array,
        ARRAY_SIZE(ARRAY_DISTINCT(ARRAY_FLATTEN(ARRAY_AGG(tool_call_id_array)))) num_distinct_tool_calls,
        min_by(first_tool_name, timestamp) as first_tool_name

from cte5
group by all
)--,
select * from cte6
;
